name: NRSC HQ
subject: Filibuster in serious danger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Petition to save the filibuster | Fellow patriot,

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6ebfd7b1ca8049c3b54c4122b65945c7&_e=ItYZAr0CjMEg_GGCJ8eY4CiYLU6-9Fxo1Jvd3E2veZp0_I_PV88nw48Xq2bNX4Hb-5uZZVj_KnrEbpxCCytWCkbqIY8LL0TUYuZCL2amnqKevKxYHF5fjwAGvw_n492dFH_PKxV6mKZVl6VmJaA07QdHOXXk0sK9Xc3sW-2hYjxLl70ah0z4ONI5JUX5Yz7DVNI5jUZlPOp_7P4ZijS8ZPOXNKavZ6Z9h96O-NyOFqhmPr0yvZOhMGyqrV_XhMDt875i0NOLxPlcCEoNfELGUPS_E_54XUOn-ZuOEHpalN34G56-dfq2IUgl3q91cVfhieP6eATqMa9XBJRaSMSLXBCgynreSDRBK8Ei5NLwTbrnLpMmk1xKZetfcDHOnS7xemKIl-edR5QFiku7Tu5KkvhJUM3QauQskoBuav71pUAzA48OJxnGuDJF-N7DsX8jniZQFznbt0KDj393Z2V9sw%3D%3D)
We’ve known for a while that Senate Democrat Leader Chuck Schumer wanted to gut the filibuster in order to jam divisive, partisan legislation through the Senate.

Instead of leaving elections and voting laws to the states where it belongs, Chuck Schumer wants to usurp the power of state legislators and radically transform our society by making it **easier to commit voter fraud**.

He wants to TRASH of one of the instruments the Senate has used since 1806 to make sure that the voice of the minority party matters.

**Democrats are so afraid of losing their majority in this November’s election that they’re resorting to dangerous tactics in an all-out effort to keep control of the Senate.**

We need your help to make sure Senator Schumer fails in his efforts to gut the filibuster.

If you believe “nuking” the filibuster is a terrible idea, then we need your immediate help. There are a handful of Democrat senators up for reelection this year that think they can stay under the radar by not taking a public position on the matter.

**[Will you chip in $1 or more today to help us wage a maximum pressure campaign encouraging them to declare if they stand with Senator Schumer or not?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6ebfd7b1ca8049c3b54c4122b65945c7&_e=ItYZAr0CjMEg_GGCJ8eY4CiYLU6-9Fxo1Jvd3E2veZp0_I_PV88nw48Xq2bNX4Hb-5uZZVj_KnrEbpxCCytWCkbqIY8LL0TUYuZCL2amnqKevKxYHF5fjwAGvw_n492dFH_PKxV6mKZVl6VmJaA07QdHOXXk0sK9Xc3sW-2hYjxLl70ah0z4ONI5JUX5Yz7DVNI5jUZlPOp_7P4ZijS8ZPOXNKavZ6Z9h96O-NyOFqhmPr0yvZOhMGyqrV_XhMDtu3jWTlDa4njKz5UQKOjB4WDvIFOOe3kdZl6r-avyuN2abx77itLURfw3zNMhNoPNEHe3nE7PTc7sVIU77gnjt99SybVGTAaFBIBbKiU58ouKZo_xb8S-jAA2RZt1pQAsASaaejb38P3n4dEIgxne4eRLOFoiKRsiO0CYws213uHRHhIjrqTsfq6ondqbaXFqc8g7EQ8M3zjSX1cH9HaDAQ%3D%3D)**

[** SAVE THE FILIBUSTER
CHIP IN $1 ORE MORE TODAY->**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6ebfd7b1ca8049c3b54c4122b65945c7&_e=ItYZAr0CjMEg_GGCJ8eY4CiYLU6-9Fxo1Jvd3E2veZp0_I_PV88nw48Xq2bNX4Hb-5uZZVj_KnrEbpxCCytWCkbqIY8LL0TUYuZCL2amnqKevKxYHF5fjwAGvw_n492dFH_PKxV6mKZVl6VmJaA07QdHOXXk0sK9Xc3sW-2hYjxLl70ah0z4ONI5JUX5Yz7DVNI5jUZlPOp_7P4ZijS8ZPOXNKavZ6Z9h96O-NyOFqhmPr0yvZOhMGyqrV_XhMDtifYvaJ8g-jtQT-g3ZkpB1Va8fnQyNMWcqxabVqd6Dx64Zp_v8MMOziogS69PIiK98JEwyfroL6WUTVgyFxbNBdl-fjdoLMZpIUGhdXV1GD3kjpJTvBFyrs3NnZp2Howin_qGgcmQlOBweM3lMQW5l_M_AgPulz2Mqh_HbDN2H3KFDUJiVeZ89_IVq0AR_2EG89jVKEkQC5n_ykO4No4Pjg%3D%3D)

Democrats want to act now because they know that if they’re able to make their mark on how states conduct elections, it will be difficult – if not outright impossible - for Republicans to reverse Democrat power grabs down the road.

**BUT THERE’S MORE:** Democrats are so determined to change the rules of the Senate before the fall election arrives that they’re even resorting to publicly shaming members of their own party who don’t support their move to get rid of the filibuster.

We desperately need your help to make sure that voters around the country, and especially in states with Senate elections this year, know that Democrats will stop at NOTHING to undermine the rules of the Senate in order to give them a leg up come November.

**[Will you chip in $1 or more today to help us here at the NRSC make sure voters know Democrats don’t want to play by the rules?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6ebfd7b1ca8049c3b54c4122b65945c7&_e=ItYZAr0CjMEg_GGCJ8eY4CiYLU6-9Fxo1Jvd3E2veZp0_I_PV88nw48Xq2bNX4Hb-5uZZVj_KnrEbpxCCytWCkbqIY8LL0TUYuZCL2amnqKevKxYHF5fjwAGvw_n492dFH_PKxV6mKZVl6VmJaA07QdHOXXk0sK9Xc3sW-2hYjxLl70ah0z4ONI5JUX5Yz7DVNI5jUZlPOp_7P4ZijS8ZPOXNKavZ6Z9h96O-NyOFqhmPr0yvZOhMGyqrV_XhMDtT1QLAko2w7AUGX0yqDsUTvZsMUxS839pqAZGKZj6Q8SZMd_jF6sFuZpVpQTTVjRq263LL1qSv_xI8TfuxPAi7Q5F_S3hhKwx6M1-L5jYbaPw-qffjoPKyz9g_kHVn-bLp7LhOGpz76SwsjmudCuzeuW9aqzKjzRE5_ZfVFz_4cQ_Y6dZW4Pt3VbMoqv8305WIJ4rLtNLGdXBvQyE72xtwg%3D%3D)**

Thank you,
TEAM NRSC

If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. body:
| | | Friend -- Records indicate your Democratic membership still requires _**ACTIVATION**_ this month, and we're running WAY behind tonight's fundraising goal.

[**Chip in $5 to activate your membership by midnight. Your gift will help Democrats defend the Senate so we can fully reverse the damage Trump inflicted on this country >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/5993?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20220109-DemMembership-MembershipEOM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220109-DemMembership-MembershipEOM-Pros-sl1&akid=2517%2E9716520%2Exw-h0Y)

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/5993?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20220109-DemMembership-MembershipEOM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220109-DemMembership-MembershipEOM-Pros-sl1&akid=2517%2E9716520%2Exw-h0Y) | **SUPPORTER: DPWILLIS67@GMAIL.COM**
---
**JANUARY 2022 MEMBERSHIP: NOT ACTIVATED**
**SUGGESTED GIFT: $5**

**[Activate My Membership](https://go.dscc.org/go/5993?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20220109-DemMembership-MembershipEOM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220109-DemMembership-MembershipEOM-Pros-sl1&akid=2517%2E9716520%2Exw-h0Y)**

name: NRSC HQ
subject: Filibuster in serious danger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Petition to save the filibuster | Fellow patriot,

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=71693f7b61f2466dac8a1db268d94318&_e=lQwgS3hb-eU5JWQbbFVvJ6BlJbjUucyHDXGLsJ3VQigEvoTrSRRBxQAowk4dJTbHqLYR2Go9R-pneJgIYLt0Fstmp7O_ZzhtoElRisPON9urZ2CATQ6WSzf7GeShIa2nCbrGOZyHzLnoAMdhEfNDGhCFcqSIfoFxpulaUb51ItKC9PsLWkl08LFHeECHoDEuosDqQ4ch6j6OzKBmsE-Jrj1QcphbzU1JG85myJrYCwmcf0PomjmxVx99_BUmCRRecsUnRhCTrqpyM6_f9MbqB2fDYCC7TU_I6OWAgA8rBskbjv70fUwkjmJ_BqqCKouRxzau6Y0vls8WFIR3akzrZeImCJXExuqhMixlSojpJZXzphOSWQo9XeAVw7roY6byJxNEBiPjkhv8kiMMNlbeTsTXZPbOHqHP6q8kF1ZXmIDmtQcyL5MV2vtc7-TTOKI-VugPtG-iS24d8wddpG2j8EJlsIyZ1quDaoYXsHsx-WY%3D)
We’ve known for a while that Senate Democrat Leader Chuck Schumer wanted to gut the filibuster in order to jam divisive, partisan legislation through the Senate.

Instead of leaving elections and voting laws to the states where it belongs, Chuck Schumer wants to usurp the power of state legislators and radically transform our society by making it **easier to commit voter fraud**.

He wants to TRASH of one of the instruments the Senate has used since 1806 to make sure that the voice of the minority party matters.

**Democrats are so afraid of losing their majority in this November’s election that they’re resorting to dangerous tactics in an all-out effort to keep control of the Senate.**

We need your help to make sure Senator Schumer fails in his efforts to gut the filibuster.

If you believe “nuking” the filibuster is a terrible idea, then we need your immediate help. There are a handful of Democrat senators up for reelection this year that think they can stay under the radar by not taking a public position on the matter.

**[Will you chip in $1 or more today to help us wage a maximum pressure campaign encouraging them to declare if they stand with Senator Schumer or not?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=71693f7b61f2466dac8a1db268d94318&_e=lQwgS3hb-eU5JWQbbFVvJ6BlJbjUucyHDXGLsJ3VQigEvoTrSRRBxQAowk4dJTbHqLYR2Go9R-pneJgIYLt0Fstmp7O_ZzhtoElRisPON9urZ2CATQ6WSzf7GeShIa2nCbrGOZyHzLnoAMdhEfNDGhCFcqSIfoFxpulaUb51ItKC9PsLWkl08LFHeECHoDEuosDqQ4ch6j6OzKBmsE-Jrj1QcphbzU1JG85myJrYCwmcf0PomjmxVx99_BUmCRRejvdgXxojs2dkoIfsHNj3GGl-xL4SeREiA8RQ-BdSc4FwcGYoudcF4WvXEctlHgGA7OIGBnhj2zOCwPvFjDinClAEFZtoeRcf0fDmAhZMSgp9wV2aGXDsMD7LWlRZCGtmOuVPhKi82T6w-WiWVP2W4IdhTPYxz12RkZqXs4wGiueYbNdefsA94PNDfNRmJfwTpyOas1CDQ_xCyJ3-ZdelM-zfPC92C_NW4kwIGddKnik%3D)**

[** SAVE THE FILIBUSTER
CHIP IN $1 ORE MORE TODAY->**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=71693f7b61f2466dac8a1db268d94318&_e=lQwgS3hb-eU5JWQbbFVvJ6BlJbjUucyHDXGLsJ3VQigEvoTrSRRBxQAowk4dJTbHqLYR2Go9R-pneJgIYLt0Fstmp7O_ZzhtoElRisPON9urZ2CATQ6WSzf7GeShIa2nCbrGOZyHzLnoAMdhEfNDGhCFcqSIfoFxpulaUb51ItKC9PsLWkl08LFHeECHoDEuosDqQ4ch6j6OzKBmsE-Jrj1QcphbzU1JG85myJrYCwmcf0PomjmxVx99_BUmCRReLD0XDEyA1zoPo2r8SJoeYOE4zdyx-267Cla5wHlvzypayfV4gAdQwLUDsxVPrG-jjkUxbZ5kTtSBsGjpR6DAzMM5IEh-jeYIJW2ivMzEKYQyxkDBb28os8KNgRq4KGRZ58AUAPMFrqErW3AYEb_s6jE5mLBdpjqfuDIYKxm6InfTpBm-PC8nbByY6clpYBLWjY0F5JcJvw01TntmfwZwL7KZ2LbAOGPXLlyCGm3bz1g%3D)

Democrats want to act now because they know that if they’re able to make their mark on how states conduct elections, it will be difficult – if not outright impossible - for Republicans to reverse Democrat power grabs down the road.

**BUT THERE’S MORE:** Democrats are so determined to change the rules of the Senate before the fall election arrives that they’re even resorting to publicly shaming members of their own party who don’t support their move to get rid of the filibuster.

We desperately need your help to make sure that voters around the country, and especially in states with Senate elections this year, know that Democrats will stop at NOTHING to undermine the rules of the Senate in order to give them a leg up come November.

**[Will you chip in $1 or more today to help us here at the NRSC make sure voters know Democrats don’t want to play by the rules?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=71693f7b61f2466dac8a1db268d94318&_e=lQwgS3hb-eU5JWQbbFVvJ6BlJbjUucyHDXGLsJ3VQigEvoTrSRRBxQAowk4dJTbHqLYR2Go9R-pneJgIYLt0Fstmp7O_ZzhtoElRisPON9urZ2CATQ6WSzf7GeShIa2nCbrGOZyHzLnoAMdhEfNDGhCFcqSIfoFxpulaUb51ItKC9PsLWkl08LFHeECHoDEuosDqQ4ch6j6OzKBmsE-Jrj1QcphbzU1JG85myJrYCwmcf0PomjmxVx99_BUmCRRe_bn4K9JgA_4aEGB9gpZcchU7vC39eC2cpePqkr2jG1i3GIy-6AZrCSGNcQ9iVnpbhc4V43wYFVbhish-6gGHBrSGBUy-KXFXjOIll7fu6d-lIEUHdceaeq29KC3nX3HsRL-KRmXQLmncLY295JkpBI6H6YVoi8S0B3Qxm3VDvhhP2efso0Eas0u1hPmBjFBennOGN6feL19GQaPD0pqR5FaXoFG1kL9fBOh_JmnjW18%3D)**

Thank you,
TEAM NRSC

If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. [T&C/Privacy Policy.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=71693f7b61f2466dac8a1db268d94318&_e=lQwgS3hb-eU5JWQbbFVvJ-5QQ0L4qVn37ro9iZbsK4U7mgw6RfD0C0FL4OC7St5Q06qWrwNkFGM7bqUt53-AYz5s3Gckm06eV0paev58BAVn_14v4rUVJ1Bi6K9WT3S_mZibe_-RDH7jPygzboKLkvYv410jTgq7BKgFUAkB855QKvmlr7wV-FaW_iP5AVo1i6817iaaJ5yCV8bM8nDhlvXNO1LzaW8Y3CFYS4unyO7JsYjyxcJ195Lmo-FGyky5fXL_-5KYWkM8GyDAxcZ0-AkFbyLWT6NR7WxEpc9u1J0liDVDuS9pKK5Xi7Mh0OOS)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathleen=20Brown?=
subject: Ronny Jackson Drunkenly Harassed Women
body:
Pentagon and CNN report... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a3e87b05988f/ronny-jackson-drunkenly-harassed-women?e=4712f71bea)
---
|
---
[](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=599260b179&e=4712f71bea)
|
---
True story: In 2018, Donald Trump nominated his White House physician - my opponent Ronny Jackson - to lead the Department of Veterans Affairs. But Ronny couldn’t get confirmed by the Senate. Why? Well, [CNN reported](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=0905f80a2e&e=4712f71bea) that while he was on duty, **Ronny got drunk in the middle of the night and started pounding on a female colleague’s hotel room door.**
| [Donate now to kick one harasser out of Congress](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=af47e1a70d&e=4712f71bea)
---

Ronny Jackson is not fit to serve in Congress. I will beat him, but I cannot do it alone. Can you chip in to help our campaign?
| [Donate now to kick one harasser out of Congress](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=13c72fbf2e&e=4712f71bea)

name: Jim Renacci for Governor
subject: Keep our children free
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Renacci for Ohio
body:
They want to mask our kids in schools
| | | [ ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxdUMtugzAQ_BpzAxmbGHLgkJamh7aqVFXqETn2Etz4gYxpSr6-JqE9VLJW8szOaHZkzQ5byRJVE0wIznOMi5ziIquYLPIy32JGKGEgUIFN9qmMB8uFUJlwJulrQTtMBJe8BHHIgVcV64CW0ZJWRSdpous-hGFEdIfIPr4RxOQhOyvrQS4mEVst08759Oi-wFvnIyx6pwSkwaWGnwDR_RRMa0CqySDagOFKI8IWcHSTF3GjsUK33AxadfNKifjl6mgjeTsQb9NltCeAoY26VvRKyxih7TzAr8rZADbcHNNLz54eP8KlP0W6tVrJSPwDeyXjkQ171e_f7jnxtRzOSms1sjI2d1zCXitb09WovEOEXFWEXNshxbx7ees387BJo03KrXlYOHIfZ5gH-FtcPbK1AoLK5gdhnZIb)
---
Friend,

The so-called _“health leaders”_ of The Ohio Hospital Association are supporting Governor DeWine’s push for **mandatory** mask policies for our kids in schools. This mandatory mask policy would mean that our children will be masked for 8 hours a day, which is blatant **CHILD ABUSE**.

Kids need to be able to breathe freely and interact with others normally for their social and emotional well-being. We cannot stand by on the sidelines and watch not only our children’s’ **freedoms** be taken away from them, but also the**long-term psychological impacts** this will have on their lives.

_Can I count on you for YOUR support?_

name: Flip Florida Blue
subject: Ron DeSantis has $50+ MILLION to attack Charlie
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
And GOP super PACs and anti-abortion groups are already reaching out to voters. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40525573/324755712/968455067?refcode=20220110_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWRlMzNmZS0xNzcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v2QF_dK81JTQmtjD96kkaEwLURmEq7XoL26Qgvqr8Q4=)
---

**URGENT, team: Ron DeSantis has more than _$50 MILLION_ to spend attacking Charlie thanks to his out-of-touch, out-of-state billionaire donors. And GOP super PACs and anti-abortion groups are _already_ reaching out to voters!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40525574/324755713/968455067?refcode=20220110_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWRlMzNmZS0xNzcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v2QF_dK81JTQmtjD96kkaEwLURmEq7XoL26Qgvqr8Q4=)
---
It’s no exaggeration to say that the governor’s race here in Florida will be one of the most consequential elections this year. **Because if Ron DeSantis wins re-election, he _will_ run for president** – and if Trump isn’t in the running, DeSantis is leading the pack for the Republican nomination.

We all know what that would mean for our country: Four (or even eight) years of putting wild, far-right priorities and billionaire special interests ahead of the people. And that’s something we just can’t afford.

**That’s why we need your support to make sure Charlie can get his message out ASAP. [These efforts early on in the election year will be critical to establishing a foundation for victory in November, so please, pitch in anything you can today to help us keep up our work.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40525575/324755714/968455067?refcode=20220110_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWRlMzNmZS0xNzcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v2QF_dK81JTQmtjD96kkaEwLURmEq7XoL26Qgvqr8Q4=)**

If we’re successful and Charlie defeats Ron DeSantis on Election Day, Florida will finally have a governor who treats things like climate change and COVID-19 like the threats they really are, and who focuses on protecting voting rights and strengthening our economy – not the pet issues of far-right billionaire donors.

And if DeSantis loses, **it will also make it much harder for him to run for president** in 2024 or any other year in the future – which will mean the entire country will be able to breathe a small breath of relief.

But team, we’re going to need your help to make it happen. DeSantis’ allies are working overtime (and spending BIG) to try and buy his way to re-election and ultimately the White House. We won’t be able to stop them without grassroots support every step of the way.

**[So please: Pitch in anything you can today to help Charlie get his message out and keep building the campaign we need to defeat Ron DeSantis. The future of Florida and the entire _country_ depends on our success.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40525576/324755715/968455067?refcode=20220110_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWRlMzNmZS0xNzcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v2QF_dK81JTQmtjD96kkaEwLURmEq7XoL26Qgvqr8Q4=)**

name: Alex Lasry
subject: Flipping this seat will take all of us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin
body:
National Republicans and Donald Trump have made it very clear that they’re not backing down from winning this race.

---
Peter,

**Yesterday, Ron Johnson announced his official reelection campaign for Senator.** Since then, we’ve seen a HUGE swell of support for our campaign to take him down because Wisconsinites are sick and tired of Ron Johnson.

National Republicans and Donald Trump have made it very clear that they’re not backing down from winning this race, and Ron Johnson is going to do whatever it takes to win another term.

I’m a basketball guy, and right now, the clock is ticking down to prove we have what it takes to win this game. If we fall short today, we may not be able to recover and take home the championship -- defeating Ron Johnson.

We have the chance to elect a Senator who will work with Tammy Baldwin and deliver for the people of Wisconsin. That’s why I need you on this team today.

**I’m asking you to make a contribution of whatever you can today to help us win here. You can use this link to give:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lasry_jan2022](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40525716/324756188/1691506499?refcode=EM_FR_220110rojolaunch2_N_AL_90DA_5_NG_N_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDQxYzdiMC0xODcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5kOK8mTE2GpF6a1hTnsMqRxxt6b5eJYx2Qmvv_GHiDQ=)**

Let’s do this,

Alex Lasry
---

****
---

Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin
Lasry for Wisconsin
P.O. Box 511549
Milwaukee, WI 53203
United States

name: Herschel Walker
subject: It’s a “dead heat”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. |
---
Peter,

We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59207978:Jwgp1VEZN:m:1:3253819041:3575216376CC8E1087D53A19760275D4:r)
That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%!

While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider:
1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8.
2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%.
3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race.

**[Today we're asking you to consider a gift of $3 or more to our campaign to strike while the iron is hot and flip this Senate seat RED.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59207978:Jwgp1VEZN:m:1:3253819041:3575216376CC8E1087D53A19760275D4:r)**

We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. _**[Can we count on you to act now?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59207978:Jwgp1VEZN:m:1:3253819041:3575216376CC8E1087D53A19760275D4:r)**_

If polls are this tight ten months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish.

body:

Let's Talk About Climate

A VIRTUAL event!
Due to COVID this event is now a virtual event.
ONE WEEK FROM TODAY!
Tuesday, January 11th 6pm-8pm

image of ... [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/Virtual_ClimateEvent.png]Hi Peter,

Please join us for this virtual event! Dr. William Schlesinger (Dean Emeritus from the Duke University Nicholas School of the Environment) and Susannah Tuttle (faith leader and environmental justice advocate) will moderate a conversation with Dr. Ashley Ward, climate-health expert and candidate for U.S. Congress, NC District 6.
This will be an engaging and informative Q&A on how climate change is impacting our communities, and what's ahead for policy solutions.

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: $1 million in attacks from a Super PAC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40526682/324760089/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDlkOTY5OS0xZDcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jOsbNtTdbOoQUxQ1dAINIudRj4HgqJpsU5AqcThBeFo=&emci=dd059689-da71-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=709d9699-1d72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40526683/324760090/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDlkOTY5OS0xZDcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jOsbNtTdbOoQUxQ1dAINIudRj4HgqJpsU5AqcThBeFo=&emci=dd059689-da71-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=709d9699-1d72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
When Donald Trump was elected, I submitted my request to retire from the U.S. Navy after nearly 4 decades of military service. I never expected I’d one day run for office, but I felt called to continue to serve in whatever way was most meaningful.
People told me to prepare myself – to prepare my family – for what lay ahead. They warned me of the nasty attacks, that politics is a ‘blood sport.’ **I never thought a Super PAC would run over a million dollars in TV ads attacking me for serving in the U.S. Navy, but that’s exactly what happened.**
They tried to say that because my military service took me and my family from state-to-state, from country-to-country, that I somehow wasn’t an Iowan anymore. They pretended my upbringing in rural, northwest Iowa never happened. They ignored the sacrifices that my wife, my kids, and my family made in my service.
**And worst of all, they attacked and denigrated every servicemember and every military family that has to pack up, change schools, say goodbye to friends, and sometimes spend holidays thousands of miles away from each other.**
This time, I’m taking on an even greater challenge. And in my campaign to defeat Republican Senator Chuck Grassley, things are going to get even nastier. I am sure of it, because control of the Senate hinges on our race and whether or not we can turn Iowa blue.
**In order to be ready to fight back, we need to raise another $50,000 before our critical deadline tonight, but right now, we’re still falling pretty short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so if we’re going to have the resources we need to win, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now:**

clean_body: Hello, When Donald Trump was elected, I submitted my request to retire from the U.S. Navy after nearly 4 decades of military service. I never expected I’d one day run for office, but I felt called to continue to serve in whatever way was most meaningful. People told me to prepare myself – to prepare my family – for what lay ahead. They warned me of the nasty attacks, that politics is a ‘blood sport.’ I never thought a Super PAC would run over a million dollars in TV ads attacking me for serving in the U.S. Navy, but that’s exactly what happened. They tried to say that because my military service took me and my family from state-to-state, from country-to-country, that I somehow wasn’t an Iowan anymore. They pretended my upbringing in rural, northwest Iowa never happened. They ignored the sacrifices that my wife, my kids, and my family made in my service. And worst of all, they attacked and denigrated every servicemember and every military family that has to pack up, change schools, say goodbye to friends, and sometimes spend holidays thousands of miles away from each other. This time, I’m taking on an even greater challenge. And in my campaign to defeat Republican Senator Chuck Grassley, things are going to get even nastier. I am sure of it, because control of the Senate hinges on our race and whether or not we can turn Iowa blue. In order to be ready to fight back, we need to raise another $50,000 before our critical deadline tonight, but right now, we’re still falling pretty short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so if we’re going to have the resources we need to win, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = All the Super PAC money in the world can’t defeat grassroots support from people like you. I’m so grateful to have you on the team, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: Vernon Jones for Governor
subject: Press Release: Vernon Jones Files A Complaint with Georgia's Secretary of State's Office
body:
Possible Violation of The Rules of the State Election Board
---
| | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE January 10, 2022
PRESS CONTACT: [GAPRESS@JONESFORGEORGIA.COM](mailto:GAPRESS@JONESFORGEORGIA.COM)
---
| |
---
PRESS RELEASE:VERNON JONES FILES A COMPLAINT WITH GEORGIA'S SECRETARY OF STATE'S OFFICE
---
| |
---
|
---
| ATLANTA, January 10, 2022
Background; Vernon Jones, R Gubernatorial Candidate, filed a complaint with Georgia's Secretary of State office requesting they open an investigation regarding a possible violation of the rules of the State Election Board.
RULE 183-1-14-0.6-.14 Secure Absentee Ballot Drop Boxes (2)A drop box shall only be located on county or municipal government property generally accessible to the public.
The alleged violation involves Dekalb County's placement of an Absentee dropbox on privately owned property. This location was advertised, listed, and used in violation of the state election laws.
"This is more evidence that Gubernatorial Candidates, Stacey Abrams, her cohort Brian Kemp, and others are not interested in election integrity. I will always be a fighter and protector of election integrity and voters' rights."
---
|
Below are the Rules of the State Election Board Regarding Absentee Ballot Drop Off Boxes and links to the codes regarding where a ballot dropbox may be located. These rules were used in the 2020 General Election and the 2021 Runoffs.
---
|

RULES OF STATE ELECTION BOARD CHAPTER 183-1 GEORGIA ELECTION CODE SUBJECT 183-1-14 ABSENTEE VOTING TABLE OF CONTENTS 183-1-14-0.6-.14 Secure Absentee Ballot Drop Boxes RULE 183-1-14-0.6-.14 Secure Absentee Ballot Drop Boxes (1) For the Elections held on June 9, 2020, County registrars are authorized to establish one or more drop box locations as a means for absentee by mail electors to deliver their ballots to the county registrars. Placing a voted absentee ballot into the drop box shall be deemed delivery pursuant to [O.C.G.A. § 21-2-385](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00173lODz8Ve-QpCzpegLAL_FB3wpFYHEwmNJ28StglbOPwbsNYzyxQf6vu9aOTo6khPyRdJhppZhRIy5iQXETq_w-6ILjEYtZXJw4l_NkxwbShTiupx7e6c37tbfFhsA780eEBGdlSrVveWIjKnflndGnW6w0WgXH_5l8BJTtlK05pMhzInqwrHaFIxdr34BSs4kUJOZK1fFaXcqmydV8aRQ==&c=vBu56HiuSGlFqCWCu-kZ4_QiadSuBm6jYwP0ADoQLYOrds_QkacT7Q==&ch=zJtHMo4Zi2gumSBRvjtA9H_RmHReg27TurlQdWWvVmWj953ewPRw7w==)[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00173lODz8Ve-QpCzpegLAL_FB3wpFYHEwmNJ28StglbOPwbsNYzyxQf6vu9aOTo6khPyRdJhppZhRIy5iQXETq_w-6ILjEYtZXJw4l_NkxwbShTiupx7e6c37tbfFhsA780eEBGdlSrVveWIjKnflndGnW6w0WgXH_5l8BJTtlK05pMhzInqwrHaFIxdr34BSs4kUJOZK1fFaXcqmydV8aRQ==&c=vBu56HiuSGlFqCWCu-kZ4_QiadSuBm6jYwP0ADoQLYOrds_QkacT7Q==&ch=zJtHMo4Zi2gumSBRvjtA9H_RmHReg27TurlQdWWvVmWj953ewPRw7w==)and is subject to the limitations on who may deliver a ballot on behalf of an elector. (2) A drop box shall only be located on county or municipal government property generally accessible to the public. (3) Drop box locations may open beginning 49 days before Election Day and shall close at 7:00 p.m. on Election Day. On Election Day, every drop box shall be closed and ballots collected at 7:00 p.m. Counties shall provide notice of the location of each drop box by posting such information on the home page of the county election website no later than the day the drop boxes are placed in a location. (4) Drop box locations must have adequate lighting and use a video recording device to monitor each drop box location. The video recording device must either continuously record the drop box location or use motion detection that records one frame, or more, per minute until detection of motion triggers continuous recording. (5) Video recordings of the drop box locations must be retained by the county registrars for 30 days after the final certification of the election, or until conclusion of any contest involving an election on the ballot in the county jurisdiction, whichever is later, and shall be made available to Secretary of State investigators upon request. (6) A drop box shall be constructed of durable material able to withstand vandalism and inclement weather. The opening slot of a drop box shall not allow ballots to be tampered with or removed and shall be designed to minimize the ability for liquid to be poured into the drop box or rain water to seep in. (7) A drop box shall be securely fastened to the ground or an immovable fixture. Page 1 of 2 (8) If the drop box utilizes a drop-slot into a building, the ballots must drop into a locked container, and both the drop-slot and the container must be monitored by video recording devices. (9) A drop box shall be clearly labeled "OFFICIAL ABSENTEE BALLOT DROP BOX". Each drop box location shall clearly display signage developed by the Secretary of State regarding Georgia law related to absentee ballot harvesting and destroying, defacing, or delaying delivery of ballots. (10) The county registrars must arrange for collection of the ballots from each drop box location at least once every 24 hours. On Election Day, every drop box shall be closed and ballots collected at 7:00 p.m. Collection of ballots from a drop box must be made by a team of at least two people. Any person collecting ballots from a drop box must have sworn an oath in the same form as the oath for poll officers set forth in O.C.G.A. § 21-2-95. The collection team shall complete and sign a ballot transfer form upon removing the ballots from the drop box, which shall include the date, time, location and number of ballots. The ballots from the drop box shall be immediately transported to the county registrar and processed and stored in the same manner as absentee ballots returned by mail are processed and stored. The county registrar or a designee thereof shall sign the ballot transfer form upon receipt of the ballots from the collection team. Authority: O.C.G.A. § 21-2-31

[O.C.G.A. § 21-2-385](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00173lODz8Ve-QpCzpegLAL_FB3wpFYHEwmNJ28StglbOPwbsNYzyxQf6vu9aOTo6khPyRdJhppZhRIy5iQXETq_w-6ILjEYtZXJw4l_NkxwbShTiupx7e6c37tbfFhsA780eEBGdlSrVveWIjKnflndGnW6w0WgXH_5l8BJTtlK05pMhzInqwrHaFIxdr34BSs4kUJOZK1fFaXcqmydV8aRQ==&c=vBu56HiuSGlFqCWCu-kZ4_QiadSuBm6jYwP0ADoQLYOrds_QkacT7Q==&ch=zJtHMo4Zi2gumSBRvjtA9H_RmHReg27TurlQdWWvVmWj953ewPRw7w==)[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00173lODz8Ve-QpCzpegLAL_FB3wpFYHEwmNJ28StglbOPwbsNYzyxQf6vu9aOTo6khPyRdJhppZhRIy5iQXETq_w-6ILjEYtZXJw4l_NkxwbShTiupx7e6c37tbfFhsA780eEBGdlSrVveWIjKnflndGnW6w0WgXH_5l8BJTtlK05pMhzInqwrHaFIxdr34BSs4kUJOZK1fFaXcqmydV8aRQ==&c=vBu56HiuSGlFqCWCu-kZ4_QiadSuBm6jYwP0ADoQLYOrds_QkacT7Q==&ch=zJtHMo4Zi2gumSBRvjtA9H_RmHReg27TurlQdWWvVmWj953ewPRw7w==)-(a) At any time after receiving an official absentee ballot, but before the day of the primary or election, except electors who are confined to a hospital on the day of the primary or election, the elector shall vote his or her absentee ballot, then fold the ballot and enclose and securely seal the same in the envelope on which is printed "Official Absentee Ballot." This envelope shall then be placed in the second one, on which is printed the form of the oath of the elector; the name and oath of the person assisting, if any; and other required identifying information. The elector shall then fill out, subscribe, and swear to the oath printed on such envelope. Such envelope shall then be securely sealed and the elector shall then personally mail or personally deliver same to the board of registrars or absentee ballot clerk, provided that mailing or delivery may be made by the elector's mother, father, grandparent, aunt, uncle, brother, sister, spouse, son, daughter, niece, nephew, grandchild, son-in-law, daughter-in-law, mother-in-law, father-in-law, brother-in-law, sister-in-law, or an individual residing in the household of such elector. The absentee ballot of a disabled elector may be mailed or delivered by the caregiver of such disabled elector, regardless of whether such caregiver resides in such disabled elector's household. The absentee ballot of an elector who is in custody in a jail or other detention facility may be mailed or delivered by any employee of such jail or facility having custody of such elector. An elector who is confined to a hospital on a primary or election day to whom an absentee ballot is delivered by the registrar or absentee ballot clerk shall then and there vote the ballot, seal it properly, and return it to the registrar or absentee ballot clerk. If the elector registered to vote for the first time in this state by mail and has not previously provided the identification required by [Code Section 21-2-220](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00173lODz8Ve-QpCzpegLAL_FB3wpFYHEwmNJ28StglbOPwbsNYzyxQf6vu9aOTo6khJhWT7ZZWNkBUKAc_Y1dIhG_O9Anj6D3Ze4H5uVsIq-J4K12X3D2ie4JCOLKySphxmeIqUEYBIQiKee802ceMNHQzr2jEHmDpmf5iyFohsqrXtIa3bRrLEpoaMTW4Gr7wLGaSNeG1BPeXT_cXA4LawhBkhk9BjLaCfdWNVNAFwJqJoAfkMUsUVE5tfvcFNfoCcApHV_nXyrt2Ccow_bM3zp2fNzH11rwEBIHl3Ju5s0461aFtVh3i5oDWQWNZp20bkhnmrEhE_hzDB1i6rA0SHihcrFSXz2_cnRvIhDJkFmjHq3WYtULhxTiFD1a1aP1yMLHibQ-lgRmD4uN2shnd7ZFyIXgRtbAWo6OUEOQjkMejisMiOv-tBQ==&c=vBu56HiuSGlFqCWCu-kZ4_QiadSuBm6jYwP0ADoQLYOrds_QkacT7Q==&ch=zJtHMo4Zi2gumSBRvjtA9H_RmHReg27TurlQdWWvVmWj953ewPRw7w==) and votes for the first time by absentee ballot and fails to provide the identification required by [Code Section 21-2-220](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00173lODz8Ve-QpCzpegLAL_FB3wpFYHEwmNJ28StglbOPwbsNYzyxQf6vu9aOTo6khJC2YYE1VZHM57xDP7GPtdga2JlhmZFhQYf2S23lFu-CiwppZZxuS2z_6lFxyb8lNPDEcD5woJCUnExy4RcJD394rUZAozOANPwfvBGguGbTLv0pMNuILvXBpxTbNVGoWWO7hvXGENjF92V2l6zM1puq9-h4cW-b7fgTOMwsVr6_eXaH78BUbA26Gk6qw4jktl3X6tJ825bNRxDJo0lFaWqxbrnl4uprFWWKLooOIgDZH8HDY7RrgWB9ymGoev9bLPvc69yMX4dXEvOqW3JNe4PGVEWOO4AMDlU4XNxPbhqElesiKVs5VnUQ-JiSn5Kzj0B5-CHSVnBh5af-ZlclCGEpZu064MBLWKcILI0cFpZvZDZWZsHH2fQ==&c=vBu56HiuSGlFqCWCu-kZ4_QiadSuBm6jYwP0ADoQLYOrds_QkacT7Q==&ch=zJtHMo4Zi2gumSBRvjtA9H_RmHReg27TurlQdWWvVmWj953ewPRw7w==) with such absentee ballot, such absentee ballot shall be treated as a provisional ballot and shall be counted only if the registrars are able to verify the identification and registration of the elector during the time provided pursuant to [Code Section 21-2-419](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00173lODz8Ve-QpCzpegLAL_FB3wpFYHEwmNJ28StglbOPwbsNYzyxQf6vu9aOTo6kh-bYrkiFANVIae9Pe7h_wfDR6M66CdX2leUr2Gnt-6Z_gZnAfUsyGFagB6Mg5oOJw-MkGV_Zx50wPY1U6ZfRAcUrkmS1C13wLFSfoIDsunfX9HeuHPYCres4w-4UrK3f7qhR3zRv1KlvPACNTab5zUKfAygoEKiorDACLPQ3sjv11FMW9dpo8U7hAY5sERnC2K6W0YtsuKpWAWgB3Yt1ydGZySp9g6wD7OKP2ZefbEVZ-gHsPb2qG7awgZIpYkPwui3Udq8oc4LbWccPTQWHv7KqokQosyO5JJQ2S3T3Ou1Hbcocs_DIopEAHsUpP33rmsbvupYSU_-8apeTPI2LS057nEDhB6tWt9iRGBFrCcRbIe0doluiYEQ==&c=vBu56HiuSGlFqCWCu-kZ4_QiadSuBm6jYwP0ADoQLYOrds_QkacT7Q==&ch=zJtHMo4Zi2gumSBRvjtA9H_RmHReg27TurlQdWWvVmWj953ewPRw7w==) | About Vernon Jones
---
| |
---
Vernon Jones is running to be the next Governor of the state of Georgia. He is a former member of the GA House of Representatives (1993-2001, 2017-2021) and former Chief Executive Officer of DeKalb County, GA. A former Democrat, Jones officially switched parties in January 2021 after endorsing Donald J. Trump for President and speaking at the 2020 Republican National Convention. The proud Republican is now running to defeat Brian Kemp, as a Pro-Trump candidate who will fight for free and fair elections, and always put Georgia First and Take Georgia Back.

clean_body: Possible Violation of The Rules of the State Election Board | | | | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE January 10, 2022 PRESS CONTACT: mailto:GAPRESS@JONESFORGEORGIA.COM | | PRESS RELEASE:VERNON JONES FILES A COMPLAINT WITH GEORGIA'S SECRETARY OF STATE'S OFFICE | | | | ATLANTA, January 10, 2022 Background; Vernon Jones, R Gubernatorial Candidate, filed a complaint with Georgia's Secretary of State office requesting they open an investigation regarding a possible violation of the rules of the State Election Board. RULE 183-1-14-0.6-.14 Secure Absentee Ballot Drop Boxes (2)A drop box shall only be located on county or municipal government property generally accessible to the public. The alleged violation involves Dekalb County's placement of an Absentee dropbox on privately owned property. This location was advertised, listed, and used in violation of the state election laws. "This is more evidence that Gubernatorial Candidates, Stacey Abrams, her cohort Brian Kemp, and others are not interested in election integrity. I will always be a fighter and protector of election integrity and voters' rights." | Below are the Rules of the State Election Board Regarding Absentee Ballot Drop Off Boxes and links to the codes regarding where a ballot dropbox may be located. These rules were used in the 2020 General Election and the 2021 Runoffs. | RULES OF STATE ELECTION BOARD CHAPTER 183-1 GEORGIA ELECTION CODE SUBJECT 183-1-14 ABSENTEE VOTING TABLE OF CONTENTS 183-1-14-0.6-.14 Secure Absentee Ballot Drop Boxes RULE 183-1-14-0.6-.14 Secure Absentee Ballot Drop Boxes (1) For the Elections held on June 9, 2020, County registrars are authorized to establish one or more drop box locations as a means for absentee by mail electors to deliver their ballots to the county registrars. Placing a voted absentee ballot into the drop box shall be deemed delivery pursuant to is subject to the limitations on who may deliver a ballot on behalf of an elector. (2) A drop box shall only be located on county or municipal government property generally accessible to the public. (3) Drop box locations may open beginning 49 days before Election Day and shall close at 7:00 p.m. on Election Day. On Election Day, every drop box shall be closed and ballots collected at 7:00 p.m. Counties shall provide notice of the location of each drop box by posting such information on the home page of the county election website no later than the day the drop boxes are placed in a location. (4) Drop box locations must have adequate lighting and use a video recording device to monitor each drop box location. The video recording device must either continuously record the drop box location or use motion detection that records one frame, or more, per minute until detection of motion triggers continuous recording. (5) Video recordings of the drop box locations must be retained by the county registrars for 30 days after the final certification of the election, or until conclusion of any contest involving an election on the ballot in the county jurisdiction, whichever is later, and shall be made available to Secretary of State investigators upon request. (6) A drop box shall be constructed of durable material able to withstand vandalism and inclement weather. The opening slot of a drop box shall not allow ballots to be tampered with or removed and shall be designed to minimize the ability for liquid to be poured into the drop box or rain water to seep in. (7) A drop box shall be securely fastened to the ground or an immovable fixture. Page 1 of 2 (8) If the drop box utilizes a drop-slot into a building, the ballots must drop into a locked container, and both the drop-slot and the container must be monitored by video recording devices. (9) A drop box shall be clearly labeled "OFFICIAL ABSENTEE BALLOT DROP BOX". Each drop box location shall clearly display signage developed by the Secretary of State regarding Georgia law related to absentee ballot harvesting and destroying, defacing, or delaying delivery of ballots. (10) The county registrars must arrange for collection of the ballots from each drop box location at least once every 24 hours. On Election Day, every drop box shall be closed and ballots collected at 7:00 p.m. Collection of ballots from a drop box must be made by a team of at least two people. Any person collecting ballots from a drop box must have sworn an oath in the same form as the oath for poll officers set forth in O.C.G.A. § 21-2-95. The collection team shall complete and sign a ballot transfer form upon removing the ballots from the drop box, which shall include the date, time, location and number of ballots. The ballots from the drop box shall be immediately transported to the county registrar and processed and stored in the same manner as absentee ballots returned by mail are processed and stored. The county registrar or a designee thereof shall sign the ballot transfer form upon receipt of the ballots from the collection team. Authority: O.C.G.A. § 21-2-31 ) At any time after receiving an official absentee ballot, but before the day of the primary or election, except electors who are confined to a hospital on the day of the primary or election, the elector shall vote his or her absentee ballot, then fold the ballot and enclose and securely seal the same in the envelope on which is printed "Official Absentee Ballot." This envelope shall then be placed in the second one, on which is printed the form of the oath of the elector; the name and oath of the person assisting, if any; and other required identifying information. The elector shall then fill out, subscribe, and swear to the oath printed on such envelope. Such envelope shall then be securely sealed and the elector shall then personally mail or personally deliver same to the board of registrars or absentee ballot clerk, provided that mailing or delivery may be made by the elector's mother, father, grandparent, aunt, uncle, brother, sister, spouse, son, daughter, niece, nephew, grandchild, son-in-law, daughter-in-law, mother-in-law, father-in-law, brother-in-law, sister-in-law, or an individual residing in the household of such elector. The absentee ballot of a disabled elector may be mailed or delivered by the caregiver of such disabled elector, regardless of whether such caregiver resides in such disabled elector's household. The absentee ballot of an elector who is in custody in a jail or other detention facility may be mailed or delivered by any employee of such jail or facility having custody of such elector. An elector who is confined to a hospital on a primary or election day to whom an absentee ballot is delivered by the registrar or absentee ballot clerk shall then and there vote the ballot, seal it properly, and return it to the registrar or absentee ballot clerk. If the elector registered to vote for the first time in this state by mail and has not previously provided the identification required by == and votes for the first time by absentee ballot and fails to provide the identification required by == with such absentee ballot, such absentee ballot shall be treated as a provisional ballot and shall be counted only if the registrars are able to verify the identification and registration of the elector during the time provided pursuant to == . | | | About Vernon Jones | | Vernon Jones is running to be the next Governor of the state of Georgia. He is a former member of the GA House of Representatives (1993-2001, 2017-2021) and former Chief Executive Officer of DeKalb County, GA. A former Democrat, Jones officially switched parties in January 2021 after endorsing Donald J. Trump for President and speaking at the 2020 Republican National Convention. The proud Republican is now running to defeat Brian Kemp, as a Pro-Trump candidate who will fight for free and fair elections, and always put Georgia First and Take Georgia Back. | | | | | Vernon Jones for Governor | 2951 Piedmont Rd. , Atlanta, GA 30305 | | Sent by mailto:gapress@jonesforgeorgia.com powered by

I have repeatedly stated, though, that [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2559977.1580.1.5946e866d7cb3580a7e56e2f1e3164dd) is way too cozy with **Black Lives Matter** , which is a Domestic Terrorist Organization. Learn more at [www.realJamesLankford.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2559977.1581.1.9ad41c62d0c329f3fc32d17dd4c0b0a6)
One thing you can count on is that I will **NEVER** bow to _#CancelCulture_ or _BLM_.
|
---
Despite the _#FakeNews_ & _Leftist online Trolls_ doing what they do, this last week was **amazing**.
Two _great_ Patriots in Edmond, **Subrina & Theresa**, hosted a _home meet and greet_ where I was able to share my heart, meet many of their friends and have them pray over me.
I also spoke at the **Payne County OK2A** chapter in Cushing, OK, as well as the **LeFlore County OK2A** chapter in Poteau, OK.
On _Thursday, January 13 at 7pm_ , I will be speaking at the **Stephens County GOP** (Faith Church, 1404 W Main St. Duncan, OK 73533).
On _Monday, January 17 at 6pm_ , I will be speaking at the **Beckham County GOP** (101 Meadow Ridge Dr. Elk City, OK 73644).
If you live in Oklahoma and would be willing to host me at your home or business with 10+ friends for a meet and greet in 2022, that would be incredibly helpful. If you live outside of Oklahoma but would be willing to host a fundraiser that would be great. To arrange a meet and greet or a fundraiser, please email caitlin@jacksonlahmeyer.com
Follow me on [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2559977.1582.1.5de8da032f4a10d71a792f2b894011fd), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2559977.1583.1.b25382866169a72531c4ef5ef1827c4c), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2559977.1584.1.8e2a7bece72801d49450cbdc6eba6776), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2559977.1585.1.f800e6ea84c0eff0d96c751353a1dad4), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2559977.1586.1.94fca21ccc8fb60619637786e9ecf985)).
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer

Friend, Last week, my heart sank when I read this disturbing news from WHYY: | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40533840/324785900/768602810?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220110Extremism_ae_full_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGM5YjQ0OS0yODcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=epVoM7zfnDXjfPRcNGhYzoZlTo6HL5Fih681_Pzx2Qs=)
---
School districts censoring information and banning books on civil rights (including race, gender, and LGBTQ issues) is a growing and alarming trend across the country right now, but it’s just the latest sign that extremism is growing here at home in Bucks County.
Last year, it was discovered that more people attended the violent January 6 insurrection on the U.S. Capitol from Bucks County than any other community in the country. That’s frightening. And just this week, a Bucks County school instructed staff to not discuss the events of Jan. 6 with students.
I believe parents have a key role in education, but won't let a few vocal extremists prevent parents and teachers from teaching our complete, honest history.
Unfortunately, right-wing extremism is growing in our community, while things like jobs, healthcare, education, and the environment suffer — all under Brian Fitzpatrick’s watch.
**Something’s gotta give, and to me it’s clear: we need to replace Fitzpatrick and flip this House seat from red to blue in November so we can bring real, positive change to the people of PA-01.**
[If you’re with me, pitch in a few bucks to give our campaign the resources we need to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40533843/324785901/768602810?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220110Extremism_ae_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGM5YjQ0OS0yODcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=epVoM7zfnDXjfPRcNGhYzoZlTo6HL5Fih681_Pzx2Qs=)

Together, I know we can heal divisions, come together as community members, and fight for the change we need to improve the lives of individuals and working families across this district.
Let’s make headlines like this one a thing of the past by taking this seat back in November.

Team, We’re now less than 11 months away from the 2022 election, which will determine whether Democrats maintain our majority in both the House and Senate. Already, Republicans are talking about what they’ll do if they take back the House, and it isn’t good. **Last week, news broke that right-wing Senator Ted Cruz is predicting the GOP will impeach President Joe Biden in 2023 if they regain majority control this November.** In a right-wing podcast, he accused Democrats of using impeachment for partisan gain when they impeached Donald Trump (twice), and went on to say there are “potentially multiple grounds” for impeaching Biden, including the situation at the southern U.S. border. We know why Trump was impeached: because of his dangerous corruption and incitement of a violent insurrection on the U.S. Capitol. Impeachment isn’t something one party uses to get back at another party, _but that’s exactly what Cruz says Republicans plan to do._ **This is just one of MANY reasons why we need to defend our House majority, and in order to do it, we need to elect Gabe and flip this swing district from red to blue.** [**Help us continue to fuel our people-powered campaign between now and November: pitch in $10 or more now!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40535152/324790773/284315840?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220110cruz_TV_full_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDNkYTM3Yy0yYTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fX9P-n_T9uW46nqsWcAnfJGdjD1Zm5-vxmP5WZIGHJ0=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Team, We’re now less than 11 months away from the 2022 election, which will determine whether Democrats maintain our majority in both the House and Senate. Already, Republicans are talking about what they’ll do if they take back the House, and it isn’t good. Last week, news broke that right-wing Senator Ted Cruz is predicting the GOP will impeach President Joe Biden in 2023 if they regain majority control this November. In a right-wing podcast, he accused Democrats of using impeachment for partisan gain when they impeached Donald Trump (twice), and went on to say there are “potentially multiple grounds” for impeaching Biden, including the situation at the southern U.S. border. We know why Trump was impeached: because of his dangerous corruption and incitement of a violent insurrection on the U.S. Capitol. Impeachment isn’t something one party uses to get back at another party, but that’s exactly what Cruz says Republicans plan to do. This is just one of MANY reasons why we need to defend our House majority, and in order to do it, we need to elect Gabe and flip this swing district from red to blue. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = — Team Vasquez | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. body:
This is the largest investment in infrastructure in generations.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40535217/324790896/1378773197?refcode=EM_FR_220110oped_N_SB_90DO_5_G_TESTA_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTk2Zjg5Mi0yYTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5JvX1xDZsLxXNVShGhhRMXgPqbm3oEFtuheJsgaO15g=) Peter,

I may have only been in Congress for a couple of months, but __I’m hard at work delivering results.__

[**_I am about to tell you all the ways we are already delivering for the people of Ohio. But first, can you contribute $10 today to help keep me in Congress and turn Ohio blue?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40535218/324790897/1378773197?refcode=EM_FR_220110oped_N_SB_90DO_5_G_TESTA_l1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTk2Zjg5Mi0yYTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5JvX1xDZsLxXNVShGhhRMXgPqbm3oEFtuheJsgaO15g=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40535219/324790898/1378773197?refcode=EM_FR_220110oped_N_SB_90DO_5_G_TESTA_p1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTk2Zjg5Mi0yYTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5JvX1xDZsLxXNVShGhhRMXgPqbm3oEFtuheJsgaO15g=) As a native Clevelander and former Cuyahoga County Council member, I know firsthand how badly our roads and bridges, airports and rail systems, and water infrastructure and broadband networks need updating and repair. **That is why I was proud to support the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act, the largest investment in infrastructure in generations.**

Here are just a few ways the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act is delivering for Ohio:
* **$1.8 billion** to repave roads, modernize highways, and reduce commute times
* **$240 million** to update drinking and wastewater systems
* The largest investment in public transit, including our bus and rail systems, in our nation’s history
* Expanded access to high-speed internet to more than **250,000 Ohioans**

People have talked for decades about delivering on infrastructure. _In 2021, we actually got it done._ We have so much more work to do, but we must hold our Democratic majority in Congress to do it.

[**_So, Peter, will you join me in celebrating the successes of the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act and ensuring we continue on this road of progress by donating $10 today?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40535220/324790899/1378773197?refcode=EM_FR_220110oped_N_SB_90DO_5_G_TESTA_l2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTk2Zjg5Mi0yYTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5JvX1xDZsLxXNVShGhhRMXgPqbm3oEFtuheJsgaO15g=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40535221/324790900/1378773197?refcode=EM_FR_220110oped_N_SB_90DO_5_G_TESTA_EL5&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTk2Zjg5Mi0yYTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5JvX1xDZsLxXNVShGhhRMXgPqbm3oEFtuheJsgaO15g=)**

name: Tony Vargas
subject: I wish I had better news...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
I hope you’ll understand why this request is so important

|
---

| | I wish I was coming to you with better news but: [**_I missed my end of week fundraising goal yesterday._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40535309/324791417/1129282168?refcode=20220110_em_fr_b1_tony_30_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWM4NzkyMS0yYjcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vdgzEic6MUjMUn5a4Fel9L6QINWT6-r1RyEuKV6xhqc=) [**_I’m 58 donations short of where I need to be right now. If I can close this gap by midnight, I’ll be on track to reach my crucial goal and unseat Republican Congressman Don Bacon. But if I miss it, it’ll be nearly impossible to make up lost ground and fund a winning campaign. So I’m personally asking: will you chip in $10 now?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40535310/324791418/1129282168?refcode=20220110_em_fr_b1_tony_30_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWM4NzkyMS0yYjcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vdgzEic6MUjMUn5a4Fel9L6QINWT6-r1RyEuKV6xhqc=)

This is my most important fundraising deadline so far. Here’s why: I’m just inches away from the official start of the election year. To win this close race, I have to start ramping up my campaign now -- not scaling back. But the truth is: launching our ads, reaching critical voters, and sending mail isn’t cheap. And we have to get started _now_. If I can’t close my fundraising gap today, I’ll miss my crucial goal and have to make drastic changes to my campaign budget and strategy. clean_body: I hope you’ll understand why this request is so important | | | I wish I was coming to you with better news but: = = This is my most important fundraising deadline so far. Here’s why: I’m just inches away from the official start of the election year. To win this close race, I have to start ramping up my campaign now -- not scaling back. But the truth is: launching our ads, reaching critical voters, and sending mail isn’t cheap. And we have to get started now. If I can’t close my fundraising gap today, I’ll miss my crucial goal and have to make drastic changes to my campaign budget and strategy. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for sticking with me, Tony | Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon. name: Greg Casar
subject: Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94297/images/greg%20email%20header.png]

Peter,

One year ago, Ted Cruz stood on the Senate floor and urged his colleagues not to certify Joe Biden’s victory. He pushed Donald Trump’s Big Lie and tried to overturn an election he knew was won fairly. One hour later, armed insurrectionists stormed the Capitol.

After inspiring the mob, Cruz condemned the attack and called the insurrectionists “terrorists.” But then last week, he went on Fox News and apologized for those comments —too afraid of upsetting his extremist base.

Peter, Texans deserve leaders who will stand up for our democracy, not the insurrectionists who attacked our Capitol. If I’m elected, you can rest assured that I’ll fight every day to protect our elections and the voting rights of all Texans, which have been under constant assault since January 6th.

But to do that, I need your support. Can you pitch in $20 to support our campaign and help us protect voting rights and our democracy? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=01.03-email&amount=35]

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=01.06-email&amount=35 ]

Peter, January 6th was one of the darkest days in American history. And unfortunately, right wing attacks on our democracy and our elections have only gotten worse since.
In states like Texas, legislatures are passing extreme voter suppression bills, gerrymandered congressional maps, and are spreading lies and misinformation about fraud in our elections. Elected leaders like Ted Cruz should be using their voices to stop these lies and protect our elections—but instead, they are pouring fuel on the fire.

It’s never been more important that we elect leaders who will fight for our democracy. We must protect voting rights, end voter suppression, and boost confidence in our elections—that’s what I’ll do when I’m elected to Congress.

Pitch in to our campaign to help elect leaders in Texas who will fight for our democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=01.03-email&amount=35]
Thank you,

-Greg
P.S. Visit our campaign store [https://store.casarforcongress.com/] to get a bumper sticker, koozie, or t-shirt in exchange for your donation!
http://facebook.com/gregcasar [http://facebook.com/gregcasar] http://twitter.com/gregcasar [http://twitter.com/gregcasar] http://instagram.com/gregcasar [http://instagram.com/gregcasar]

Greg Casar for Congress

Friend, over the past year, the Republican Party has put our democracy in grave peril:
**FIRST:** Trump spread lies about election fraud that provoked a violent insurrection.
**THEN:** The Republican Party pushed through 400 voter suppression bills in states across the country, including Florida.
**NOW:** It's up to the Senate to protect voting rights and strengthen our democracy against the Republicans' attacks.
Time is running out, friend, and I need all hands on deck in the fight to save our democracy.**I still don't know where you stand, so please take my urgent poll before midnight tonight:**
**Should the Senate take action to protect voting rights?**
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40538190/324799917/518785067?code=jtk2083-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjExZGIwYS0yZjcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NWJCi_URRd8mHGtelWXZiUPSnpnYYfy5x_6281zdHBg=&emci=fd398138-d06f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=9b11db0a-2f72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=20244100)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40538193/324799918/518785067?code=jtk2083-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjExZGIwYS0yZjcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NWJCi_URRd8mHGtelWXZiUPSnpnYYfy5x_6281zdHBg=&emci=fd398138-d06f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=9b11db0a-2f72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=20244100)

name: Secretary Mike Pompeo
subject: I've Made A Decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
People keep asking what my plans are for the next election. Well, I've made a decision.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?396hu--fgxr-4qqlpo2&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-396hu-1sg20-4qqlpo3/)
---

People have been asking me recently what my plans are for the upcoming election. As one of our top America First supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made a decision:

**I’m 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022, and I'm focusing all efforts on just that. **

That’s why I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I’m traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and double down on championing American values.**

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines, I’m staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-396hu-1sg21-4qqlpo4/ "please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.")**

---
My time working as President Trump’s Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, I’ve actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda - from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again. That’s made me some enemies, and they are hoping we fail.

**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. **

That’s why I am hoping you will **[rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-396hu-1sg22-4qqlpo5/ "rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.")** The mainstream media and their Democrat friends want to say that our movement is dead, but we cannot let that happen!

---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-396hu-1sg23-4qqlpo6/)
---

You know me, you know my record and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.

Unapologetically American,
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-396hu-1sg24-4qqlpo7/)
---

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State

---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION** to **29910**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-396hu-1sg25-4qqlpo8/ "PompeoEmailFooter")
---

Make sure you never miss an update from Mike Pompeo and CAVPAC!
Add **info@email.cavpac.com** to your address book!

# **Friend — It’s a B.I.G. day in Georgia! Tonight the Dawgs take the field against Alabama with the national title on the line. **

---
As a UGA alumnus, I couldn’t be prouder. I _Believe In Georgia_ — how about you? And I also believe Georgia is ready for trusted experience and conservative leadership in the U.S. Senate.
I might not be your first choice to compete on a football field, but I’ve scored points for our state and nation on different fields. [**Watch here or below before the big game tonight.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/7366dc2b809eb7f0/81a97b19e801d829c3d6b838967d376c/37793)

---
Now, I’m running for the U.S. Senate because Joe Biden and Raphael Warnock are failing America. And our team is ready to leave it all on the field to take back the U.S. Senate and send a message that Georgia is still a RED state. [**I hope you’ll join us on the field. Too much is at stake to sit on the sidelines.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/7366dc2b809eb7f0/7fb23f7365ffcff3c3d6b838967d376c/37793) **Go Dawgs!**

Gary Black

---
_**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $17 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.

| Hi Peter, it's Anna Nunn here.

I'm the Campaign Manager on Valerie Foushee's campaign for Congress, and today I'm reaching out to Democratic activists to ask for your feedback.

**In order to run the strongest campaign possible, we need to know how people like you like to receive information from campaigns.** Do you like to watch TV advertisements to learn about candidates, or do you only look at ads on Facebook? Do you enjoy getting text messages from candidates, or do you prefer to see information through apps or websites?

[_**Please, take just a moment to fill out our one-question survey. Your insight is valuable and will help us develop the best strategy to reach more voters. ->**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/dqBOGXr26bSB3AFZ7nHl4AW5g1vqlOrPjr0cpl7rF-g=/enlcN9oNOaw8JYn9mq-QMx__kZZsiDPEISFWMpFkz9o=)

Anna Nunn

| | I'll get right to it, team: Thanks to this grassroots team, we had an outstanding fundraising month in December — beating our fundraising goal and more than doubling what we raised in November. It was our best month in the history of this campaign, But what I’m most proud of isn’t the dollar amount. Over 70% of our contributions were $100 or less. This campaign is growing thanks to folks like you across our state chipping in whatever they can, because they believe in this movement. **Despite our strong fundraising numbers, we were _still outraised_** — by likely opponents who are raising large sums from the wealthy and well-connected. This means we have ground to make up to make sure we kick off 2022 in the strongest position. [_**Can you make a $15 donation and help us close the gap? I know we have what it takes to catch up, but there’s only one way we’ll get it done — and that’s together.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40540830/324813445/1838604251?amount=15&refcode=em_20220107_f_s_out&ms=em_20220107_f_s_out&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzE5MTE5OC0zOTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nWYnhMYfJMbfGl9j-9v-rRvho6cF6Q_eh9x0bCJbwGg=) This race isn’t going to be easy, team — but that’s fine by me. I didn’t get into this race because it was an easy career move. I’m running to tackle our state’s biggest challenges and restore its promise to all Massachusetts’ families. But if we’re going to win this fight, we’re going to need resources, and enough of those resources to outwork and out-organize our opponents. I know we can make it happen, but it’ll take folks like you standing with us. And there’s no time we can afford to spare. [_**Chip in $15 to help us not only close our fundraising gap, but make sure we kick 2022 off strong.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40540831/324813446/1838604251?amount=15&refcode=em_20220107_f_s_out&ms=em_20220107_f_s_out&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzE5MTE5OC0zOTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nWYnhMYfJMbfGl9j-9v-rRvho6cF6Q_eh9x0bCJbwGg=) Saludos, Sonia

clean_body: While we’re fueled by folks like you, they rely on high dollar events with the wealthy and well-connected. | | | | | I'll get right to it, team: Thanks to this grassroots team, we had an outstanding fundraising month in December — beating our fundraising goal and more than doubling what we raised in November. It was our best month in the history of this campaign, But what I’m most proud of isn’t the dollar amount. Over 70% of our contributions were $100 or less. This campaign is growing thanks to folks like you across our state chipping in whatever they can, because they believe in this movement. Despite our strong fundraising numbers, we were still outraised — by likely opponents who are raising large sums from the wealthy and well-connected. This means we have ground to make up to make sure we kick off 2022 in the strongest position. = This race isn’t going to be easy, team — but that’s fine by me. I didn’t get into this race because it was an easy career move. I’m running to tackle our state’s biggest challenges and restore its promise to all Massachusetts’ families. But if we’re going to win this fight, we’re going to need resources, and enough of those resources to outwork and out-organize our opponents. I know we can make it happen, but it’ll take folks like you standing with us. And there’s no time we can afford to spare. = Saludos, Sonia | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, . | Paid for by the Committee to Elect Sonia Chang-Díaz

name: Team Baker
subject: Endorsement alert!
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

Friend
We’re thrilled to announce the endorsement of Janet Owens. As the first woman County Executive from Anne Arundel County, she understands what it means to lead locally. The Baker/Navarro ticket embodies progress for ALL Marylanders and she knows that under their leadership our future will shine brighter.
“With great admiration and respect, I wholeheartedly support Rushern Baker for Governor. As the governor, Rushern will champion economic development initiatives that affect all Marylanders and demonstrate a commitment to senior citizen services. Rushern has been a leader, legislator, executive, and most importantly, an extremely honorable man.”
- Janet Owens

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6id5sv44hfkesm4igplfi03no9hf3vtiql4iqv0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2umrr1crhc9o74thhceon1cbic2pr8p9lecon6d3665qj1oj2mkqj8o5lmup3co77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchhcor65cr2curm0pjim2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1chgecob0s3ie49fg)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zod40apv5pb4tmm5cujq9tdr760fos4ke4hguh8o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3j62o70sjh2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkf1fmcofqglt0cd44s31r40rjfv4vj0gidrdn6o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3j62o70sjh2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z86hs1hrt498k14ckoje9m7hnpq29mqhiltlcq68_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3j62o70sjh2bs) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1tnur28l8alg7nvp7bid87c6t4fq6jcvsk7v9go_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3j62o70sjh2bs) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
