name: Seth Magaziner
subject: Our Economic Development and Small Business Plan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SETH MAGAZINER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40540965/324814436/-1862136002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzkxNGZlZC0zYTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XqpugwYTHdFuobxYMBcMqSicJ6gEJd1jh44TYHL7wj4=&emci=f72f51e0-2b72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=8c914fed-3a72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15384964)
Peter,

The COVID-19 pandemic has hit Rhode Island hard, and our economy is lagging. We still have 25,000 fewer jobs than before the pandemic, and our unemployment rate is well above the national average. Rhode Island workers, families and small businesses are facing real hardships, and we need to take immediate action to turn our economy around.

**I believe that with the right leadership, we can build an economy that works for all Rhode Islanders by investing in the creative, entrepreneurial spirit of people in the Ocean State.**

Today, I'm releasing our [Economic Development and Small Business plan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40540966/324814437/-651428388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzkxNGZlZC0zYTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XqpugwYTHdFuobxYMBcMqSicJ6gEJd1jh44TYHL7wj4=&emci=f72f51e0-2b72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=8c914fed-3a72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15384964) to support small businesses, attract employers in high-growth industries, and build on Rhode Island's many strengths to create a vibrant economy so that people can get good jobs here -- without having to leave the state.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40540967/324814438/1212891457?ms=em22_220110_econ_adv_gq_act___SM_ettx&refcode=em22_220110_econ_adv_gq_act___SM_ettx&source=em22_220110_econ_adv_gq_act___SM_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220110_econ_adv_gq_act___SM_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=Icgr4DzhKSDIMLbHyMzw1SNKWKEqgEARtJPKH6JOpTqs3fuXOOEXZaOh%2FvU3umj8BEtom9aw8cs1dIlmDrhkEXmLksdIoKIucyFHcgpMKcUaa6JXk8v3n0UoVKL2%2FEgfaF9nJrfMfW8BYyQF%2BptmrPOHj4Q7B3uxVhZvjOAZh28%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzkxNGZlZC0zYTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XqpugwYTHdFuobxYMBcMqSicJ6gEJd1jh44TYHL7wj4=&emci=f72f51e0-2b72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=8c914fed-3a72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15384964)
---
As your next Governor, I will support our small businesses by providing the tools and resources they need to thrive. We'll set the stage for innovation by attracting high-growth industries where we have a competitive advantage. I will work to improve our state's business climate by building our state's reputation as an attractive place to start and grow a business. And I will invest in strengthening workforce training to build our state's talent and ensure everyone has a chance to succeed.

[**We have an opportunity to build a stronger economy than ever before in Rhode Island, but I need to know you're with me. As Treasurer, I've worked in innovative ways to promote economic growth and create jobs in Rhode Island. By negotiating the relocation of a financial services technology company's headquarters from Massachusetts to Warwick, we brought over 150 good-paying jobs to our state.

My BankLOCAL program has assisted nearly 400 Rhode Island small businesses in obtaining $47 million in loans to expand and hire. The clean energy finance programs I launched have invested more than $120 million into alternative energy and energy efficiency projects in the Ocean State and created nearly 2,000 construction jobs.

Together, we can invest in our people, support small businesses, and attract good-paying jobs to strengthen Rhode Island's economy. clean_body: Peter, The COVID-19 pandemic has hit Rhode Island hard, and our economy is lagging. We still have 25,000 fewer jobs than before the pandemic, and our unemployment rate is well above the national average. Rhode Island workers, families and small businesses are facing real hardships, and we need to take immediate action to turn our economy around. I believe that with the right leadership, we can build an economy that works for all Rhode Islanders by investing in the creative, entrepreneurial spirit of people in the Ocean State. Today, I'm releasing our to support small businesses, attract employers in high-growth industries, and build on Rhode Island's many strengths to create a vibrant economy so that people can get good jobs here -- without having to leave the state. As your next Governor, I will support our small businesses by providing the tools and resources they need to thrive. We'll set the stage for innovation by attracting high-growth industries where we have a competitive advantage. I will work to improve our state's business climate by building our state's reputation as an attractive place to start and grow a business. And I will invest in strengthening workforce training to build our state's talent and ensure everyone has a chance to succeed. As Treasurer, I've worked in innovative ways to promote economic growth and create jobs in Rhode Island. By negotiating the relocation of a financial services technology company's headquarters from Massachusetts to Warwick, we brought over 150 good-paying jobs to our state. My BankLOCAL program has assisted nearly 400 Rhode Island small businesses in obtaining $47 million in loans to expand and hire. The clean energy finance programs I launched have invested more than $120 million into alternative energy and energy efficiency projects in the Ocean State and created nearly 2,000 construction jobs. Together, we can invest in our people, support small businesses, and attract good-paying jobs to strengthen Rhode Island's economy. Let's Get to Work, Seth = | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY SETH MAGAZINER FOR GOVERNOR VICTORIA ALMEIDA, TREASURER Seth Magaziner for Governor Victoria Almeida, Treasurer PO Box 303 Providence, RI 02901 United States

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Did you see my wife’s email?
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
In case you missed it, I just wanted to make sure you had a chance to read the recent email sent by my lovely wife Annie. Over our four decades of marriage, she has been my North Star and my best friend. If I’m blessed to be your next Governor, I have no doubt that she will make an incredible First Lady of Maryland.
This Wednesday will be the final fundraising deadline before I can no longer accept any donations as the General Assembly enters the 2022 Legislative Session. If you are able, I am asking for your help to meet our final fundraising goal, so that we have the resources we need to grow our operation in the crucial lead up to Election Day.
Click here to chip in. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/annie_010722?amount=20.22&refcode=kicker]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]Forwarded Message Below:
Over the last several months, I’ve had a blast meeting so many of Peter’s friends and supporters on the campaign trail. I’ve had incredible conversations with Marylanders about the kitchen-table issues at their homes, at farmers’ markets, on neighborhood main streets, and in restaurants and cafes. But if I haven’t had a chance to meet you yet, I’m Anne, Peter’s wife of 41 years.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/annie_010722?amount=20.22&refcode=kicker [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/annie_010722?amount=20.22&refcode=kicker]Over his decades of service as a Legislator and as Comptroller, I’ve witnessed his incredible commitment to building a brighter future for Maryland’s communities. He’s dedicated his life to public service because he lives by a code to put others before himself, and that’s exactly what he will continue to do as Maryland’s next Governor. He has a transformative vision to combat climate change, make higher education more affordable for students, invest in the next generation of internet connectivity for all communities, and so much more.
Peter is fired up and ready to win the Democratic nomination in June -- but he needs the help of friends like you to bring his message to every community in our state. Right now, Peter and his team are working hard to meet their critical fundraising deadline on January 12. If you believe in Peter’s vision of transformative change and progress, will you chip in to help him meet his fundraising goal ahead of the important upcoming deadline?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/annie_010722?amount=10&refcode=kicker] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/annie_010722?amount=20.22&refcode=kicker] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/annie_010722?amount=50&refcode=kicker] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/annie_010722?amount=100&refcode=kicker] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/annie_010722?refcode=kicker]Every dollar raised will go toward ensuring Peter’s campaign has the resources he needs to win this highly competitive election. We need him as Governor, and we need you to help us reach our fundraising goal to make that happen.
I can’t thank you enough for your continued support of my husband. He is humbled and honored by the trust that you place in him every day, and I know that he will never let you down as Maryland’s next Governor.
Thank you,
Anne
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/annie_010722?amount=20.22&refcode=kicker]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/efc7e102-7362-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/8b914fed-3a72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjkxNGZlZC0zYTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fYjmj9HCTm9yCXkvlwz2OlRE_0s8k9B5oVUTJJ5japo=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

| | Peter,

I hope you can make it Thursday evening to our event for Dr. Scott Jensen in Bloomington. If you can't, we're going to have plenty of other opportunities in other areas of the state going forward. But THIS event is sure to be awesome. As Dr. Jensen begins gearing up for the [Republican caucus February 1st](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=9b8af11bbf&e=33b11688c1), we want to use this event a SPRINGBOARD for the 2022 campaign.

I even invited some of my friends as special guests! You're _not_ going to want to miss it. Here are the details:
**Location: **Bloomington Knights of Columbus
1114 American Blvd W, Bloomington, MN 55420

**Date and Time** : January 13th, 6-8PM

**RSVP** : RSVP to [Barbara@DrScottJensen.com](mailto:Barbara@DrScottJensen.com?subject=RSVP%20to%20January%2013th%20Event)

[Get a Facebook reminder by clicking here.](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=460e82f37a&e=33b11688c1)
**Any donation is welcome if you come!**
Come meet me, Dr. Jensen, and many other like-minded conservatives this Thursday. It's TIME TO REPLACE Governor Walz with the one guy who can win, my friend: Dr. Scott Jensen! You can also RSVP to the event by clicking the flyer below:

subject: A humble request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40541176/324815128/1927938479?refcode=20220110_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDUxMmJjMi0zYjcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xSKEWgsHOgN2blnapDNkPi4Q_w0I-K4rDDBaP2wNmHo=)
Friends — In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to contribute to my re-election campaign before midnight tonight. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important. Here’s the truth: We’re less than one year out from Election day. And our January deadline is nearly here. But this goal is important for a few more reasons. First, a National Republican Super PAC is running ads to defeat me in this race, and we need the resources to withstand the attack. Now, the reason we’re facing so many attacks is because CNN ranks this seat as one of the most likely to flip in 2022. And our official race ranking just changed from Lean Democratic to Pure Toss Up. But our secret weapon against the corporate special interests is you. Because if we have the resources we need, we’re going to win. It would be the honor of a lifetime to serve Arizona for a full term, but I can’t do that alone. So here’s where I ask: [**Can you please split a contribution to Seth Moulton and our campaign before the January fundraising deadline comes to an end? I would not ask if it weren’t so important. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40541177/324815129/1927938479?refcode=20220110_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDUxMmJjMi0zYjcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xSKEWgsHOgN2blnapDNkPi4Q_w0I-K4rDDBaP2wNmHo=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40541178/324815130/-1534947712?refcode=20211226_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDUxMmJjMi0zYjcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xSKEWgsHOgN2blnapDNkPi4Q_w0I-K4rDDBaP2wNmHo=)
Thank you, —Mark

| Peter, have you heard about our January 12th deadline?

That’s the filing deadline for each Maryland gubernatorial campaign’s contribution data. Once we submit it, every candidate’s finances will go public.

What does that mean for us?

It means that, however, we only have until 11:59 PM on Wednesday until we are legally required to close the books and turn in our numbers for everyone – yes everyone – to see. From reporters, to our opponents, to Marylanders just starting to tune in to this race, everyone will be looking at how much we raise as a sign of our campaign strength.

**That’s why we’re emailing you today — it’s critical that we secure the funds needed to put up a good showing on January 12th... which is coming up fast.**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holland for Kansas

Mark Holland is running for US Senate because Kansas and America deserve a strong, courageous leader who leads with faith, speaks the truth, and is willing to stand up to extremists across the political spectrum. | We are checking in to see if you saw Mark’s remarks on the anniversary of the January 6th Capitol riots.

[You can read Mark’s response in the Kansas City Star here. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40542352/324820309/1354929168?refcode=MH_EM_FR_1MO_220110_1_2&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjllNzgxNS00MDcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VBv5H2GkuntMIgFWCjidgmLYtl1wqtnHnff0ajp3fP8=&emci=19678c07-3f72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=269e7815-4072-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=2432894)

Mark is ready to protect our democracy and stand up for truth and courage. [If you can, please support his campaign today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40542353/324820310/-1390744932?amount=10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_1MO_220110_1_2&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjllNzgxNS00MDcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VBv5H2GkuntMIgFWCjidgmLYtl1wqtnHnff0ajp3fP8=)

**_– BEGIN MARK’s ORIGINAL MESSAGE –_**

Home of the brave.

We all watched on live television as rioters assaulted police officers, smashed windows, and violently broke into our nation’s Capital. This riot is what American politics has become, and will continue to be, if we do not take action to defend our democracy.

January 6 was the culmination of lies. Donald Trump began his term as President lying about the size of his inauguration crowd. A small, obviously wrong, meaningless lie that foretold the greater lies to come. He encapsulated all of his lies by declaring, “What you’re seeing and what you’re reading is not what is happening.” He staked his legitimacy on “alternative facts” and “fake news.” His greatest lie was that the 2020 election was stolen from him (it was not), and this lie led directly to the January 6 riot.

January 6 was the culmination of cowardice. Love him or hate him, Donald Trump leads with intimidation and fear. His personal attacks and scorched-earth tactics have defined his entire business and political life. Trump’s lies would be meaningless if those around him had the courage to stand up to him. Instead, the vast majority of Republican politicians, including Kansas Senator Jerry Moran, are dependent on Trump’s popularity for their own fundraising and re-elections. January 6 would never have happened if Republicans in the House of Representatives and the Senate had the courage to hold Trump accountable from day one.

January 6 is a call to truth and courage. The very freedom we enjoy in this country is dependent on truth. And truth is dependent on courage. I am running for US Senate in Kansas because our state and our nation need a leader who will speak the truth, even when it is unpopular. We need community servants who are more concerned about the greater good than their own reelection. We need politicians who will stand up to their own party when it is wrong.

[We need to protect our democracy and stand up for truth and courage, that's why I'm running for Senate. If you can, please support my campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40542354/324820311/-1390744932?amount=10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_1MO_220110_1_2&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjllNzgxNS00MDcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VBv5H2GkuntMIgFWCjidgmLYtl1wqtnHnff0ajp3fP8=)

Rev. Mark Holland
Former Mayor of Kansas City, Kansas
Kansas Democrat Candidate for US Senate

**Meet Mark:** Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.

body:

_Sponsored message_
Friend, Well, it’s official... **I’M COMING BACK. ** _**I just stepped off the stage from announcing that I’m running for reelection to STOP Nancy Pelosi. **_ I am the **number one target **for Nancy Pelosi and her leftist cronies in 2022. I’ve got news for her... I AM HERE TO STAY. **Nancy Pelosi wants to fire me because the fact of the matter is that I am her WORST NIGHTMARE**. I’m a veteran, conservative, and capitalist. I am leading the fight to take the House away from Nancy and the Socialist Squad, but I can’t do it alone. **I have rejected Pelosi’s socialist agenda and defended the American People at every turn**. I am asking YOU personally to help me take back this country from Pelosi’s grasp. Will you contribute to FIRE PELOSI? # House GOP Leader McCarthy Endorses Juan Ciscomani (AZ-06)

**House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy [announced today](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=f2086e2e85&e=659fba240e) he is endorsing Juan Ciscomani (AZ-06) for U.S. Congress.**

Arizona's new 6th congressional district spans 6 counties in Southern Arizona and one of only two congressional districts in Arizona to include the U.S.-Mexico border. **Our district is a critical, key battleground seat we must flip in 2022 to ensure we take back the House! **

“Juan Ciscomani is a conservative fighter for Southern Arizona, and we need his help in Congress to stop the radical Biden-Pelosi agenda. Juan embodies the American Dream, and he’s working to rebuild it for everyday Arizonans. **Juan's message is resonating with voters across his district, and he has built a strong campaign that will help us Fire Pelosi and Take Back the House in November!** I’m proud to endorse Juan Ciscomani for Congress,” said Leader Kevin McCarthy.
[](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=befa5438ca&e=659fba240e) This endorsement doesn’t happen by accident.
It’s thanks to __**YOUR**__ commitment to helping us build a strong and winning campaign here in Southern Arizona! We are very grateful.
**Let's build on the momentum, and win in 2022!** 🇺🇸

Jackie’s the kind of leader we need in Richmond and her election is tomorrow.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40542401/324820658/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWQwZDE0Ny00MDcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ndMrppkr1y5POR_BY96dQxf847asLDWf3esnHDTbuHg=&emci=66c1628d-3372-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=b5d0d147-4072-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Last year’s elections in Virginia didn’t go the way we wanted them to. But that doesn’t mean we throw our hands in the air and give up. No way. It means we keep fighting to make sure our interests are represented in Richmond. And tomorrow, that fight continues in a crucial special election for Virginia’s House of Delegates. Jackie Hope Glass is running for the open 89th House of Delegates district seat, and she needs our help getting over the finish line. [_**Rush a $5 donation to support Jackie in her special election tomorrow. Her victory will help bolster Democrats’ ranks in the House of Delegates.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40542402/324820661/1934218126?refcode=mw_em_220110_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWQwZDE0Ny00MDcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ndMrppkr1y5POR_BY96dQxf847asLDWf3esnHDTbuHg=) Jackie is such an inspiring figure. She’s a Navy veteran who settled in the heart of Norfolk, and works as a social entrepreneur helping businesses, organizations, and governments to recognize and improve markets and policies influenced by racism, sexism, and classism. She wants to go to Richmond to ensure everyone gets a fair chance to succeed. That means fighting for paid family and medical leave, quality and affordable child care and elder care, and affordable housing. Jackie’s the kind of leader we need in Richmond. Her election is **tomorrow,** and your donation today will ensure the campaign has the resources it needs for a final push towards victory. subject: 5-alarm fire - Dems to end filibuster this week. Act TODAY!
body:
| |
---
Our sources in the Senate have told us that the Democrats intend to destroy the filibuster **this week** in order pass their takeover of our elections – and every other bill on their radical wish list.

**This is a five-alarm fire and America needs you to drop everything and take action this week.**

Luckily, we are using AlignAct again this week, which makes it so fast and easy for you to act! See the three action items (AlignAct calls them “campaigns”) we are running this week. You can share these links directly with others, or you can simply share our weekly action page, which links to all three campaigns.
**Notes:**
1. Phone calls are the #1 preferred method of action, however, with the AlignAct platform, you can email, sign a petition, and target Senators on social media all with a few clicks. Just make sure to also make your phone calls – the phone number and a sample script are loaded into the system for you to use.

2. You can – and should – call/contact Senators who are not yours using the campaigns above, but if you are pressed for time, prioritize your own and call them first.

3. When you use AlignAct for the first time, you will be asked for your address so that they can determine who your Senators are and connect you to the correct offices.

|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
Thank and encourage Sens. Manchin and Sinema to stay strong in their opposition to getting rid of the filibuster.
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-QQmgw)
|
---
Manhattan's new District Attorney, Alvin Bragg, [wants to stop prosecuting criminals](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-g). He sent guidance to his office decriminalizing a range of offenses, including trespassing, turnstile jumping and resisting arrest. He also promised never to seek life without parole regardless of the crime and will only recommend pretrial detention in a tiny number of cases.

The New York Police Benevolent Association immediately pushed back on Bragg's policies because they would leave potentially dangerous criminals on the streets.

Pretending crime isn't happening won't make it go away. Bragg's policies will only exacerbate the situation in New York City as shootings are already [double ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)what they were two years ago. Other cities that have tried similar policies have reaped the [predictably disastrous consequences](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) of ignoring crime.
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._h8YNtndJ-UIpSdFyQ)
Contact your own Senators and urge them to defend the filibuster and vote no on the Democrats’ effort to takeover our elections.
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
|
---
Liberal school districts [played the Biden administration like a fiddle](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) last spring. The administration allocated schools $130 billion through its American Rescue Plan to help with school reopening, only to see administrators use large chunks of this funding on Critical Race Theory.

Chicago spent $32 million of this money on a "comprehensive, culturally responsive curriculum," and the Chicago Teachers Union has now [closed down](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) the schools because they don't want to teach in person. Similarly, Milwaukee used $24 million on "Social Emotional Learning" efforts and is now not opening until at least January 10.

Parents are sick of woke school officials spending taxpayer dollars on political indoctrination efforts while [4,500 schools](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._aWQ9ODIwNzQ4MTUmbWlkPTQ0Nzk3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/OR7I3QbdxyM__grb5fBR2g) have shut back down, using coronavirus as the excuse.
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ0Nzk3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/wHqojO4zMhHP9q8LWM1XTg)
61 Senators, both Democrats and Republicans, signed a letter defending the filibuster in 2017. This campaign targets specific Democrats who signed that letter and who are now pushing to end the filibuster. We need to hold them accountable.
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ0Nzk3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/BY1i9vZXe-QslmoKkCcvjw)
|
---
President Biden continues to push his vaccine mandate even as the county reaps the consequences of his invasive and overly broad policy. About 10,000 Marines haven't complied with the mandate and believe it is a political purge. The mandate has also caused a massive nursing shortage as many Americans are choosing their liberty over their jobs.

The Supreme Court will likely rule on Biden's mandate in the coming days, and we hope they choose liberty over control. The president's choices have hamstrung crucial industries while forcing workers to choose between their job and their conscience and health.
|
---
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIwMTAtOWI0ZWY3Njc0NTNjNDIzY2E5MjMzNWNkZjYyYzQ2MWMiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy9kb25hdGU_bWlkPTQ0Nzk3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/SjiyyT9IP73T51tfHZ0Jrw)
|

subject: re: they say they care about election integrity?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
now that it’s officially an election year, the liberal radicals have let us in on their plan to undermine election integrity.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf5m8idar41orucd6p3hnkngjkrv71j6kegs08o8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3j61pb4clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sj4skpjap76c5pmbd37mjhjepjm69pn9plmc9im2o3nmsr33d9ie9q36t5jemrjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ap5jchg75c36e6qb6p1nm2qmash5u)
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3klbsu8o3eb9jpdmfm4es13huvssi8o8iboqg5g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3j61pb4clh2bs) | |
---
Friend, now that it’s officially an election year, the liberal radicals have let us in on their plan to undermine election integrity.

They’ve done everything they can to “cancel” voter reform so they can look as “woke” as possible.

They’re standing up against states rights, against voter ID, and against election reform that will strengthen our republic.

They don’t want you to know the truth: conservatives are doing everything we can to make it EASY to vote and HARD to cheat in 2022.

And most sane Americans agree - that's exactly what we SHOULD be doing.

_**[I AGREE: STAND WITH RAND >>](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zaknvj579ks8c104afinq83jnvknuvd81sgu8vgo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3j61pb4clh2bs)**_

All the liberal cries of “voter suppression” right now have more to do with their fear of losing than reality.

We know they don’t actually care about making every vote count! That’s why they empowered the cabal of elites in the media and big tech to help sway our last election.

(Which is just part of the reason I’m moving my message from liberal tech giants like YouTube to conservative free speech promoters like Rumble.)

It’s about time we stop with this endless cycle of faux outrage and stand up for ourselves, defend our right to vote, and pledge to support election integrity.

_If they can expect people to show COVID passports to eat and stand in long lines for tests, we can show ID at the polls and stand in line to vote._

If you’re with me, chip in today to take on the woke mob and defend your voice in 2022.
__

clean_body: now that it’s officially an election year, the liberal radicals have let us in on their plan to undermine election integrity. | | Friend, now that it’s officially an election year, the liberal radicals have let us in on their plan to undermine election integrity. They’ve done everything they can to “cancel” voter reform so they can look as “woke” as possible. They’re standing up against states rights, against voter ID, and against election reform that will strengthen our republic. They don’t want you to know the truth: conservatives are doing everything we can to make it EASY to vote and HARD to cheat in 2022. And most sane Americans agree - that's exactly what we SHOULD be doing. All the liberal cries of “voter suppression” right now have more to do with their fear of losing than reality. We know they don’t actually care about making every vote count! That’s why they empowered the cabal of elites in the media and big tech to help sway our last election. (Which is just part of the reason I’m moving my message from liberal tech giants like YouTube to conservative free speech promoters like Rumble.) It’s about time we stop with this endless cycle of faux outrage and stand up for ourselves, defend our right to vote, and pledge to support election integrity. If they can expect people to show COVID passports to eat and stand in long lines for tests, we can show ID at the polls and stand in line to vote. If you’re with me, chip in today to take on the woke mob and defend your voice in 2022. In liberty, Rand Paul | | | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate | Contribution rules: I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). name: Marcus Flowers
subject: Former Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene has a nice ring to it, don’t you think?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]Hi, did you see the email Marcus sent yesterday?
Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently banned from Twitter for spreading disinformation about COVID-19 and putting her followers at severe risk.
We welcome her removal from Twitter -- but the next step is to remove her from office. Can you donate $20 or more now to help us do just that? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
Marcus Flowers is a Veteran, a patriot, and a Democrat -- and he’ll restore honor and integrity to Congress.
Thanks for your support.
---- Begin forwarded message ----
From: Marcus Flowers <info@marcusforgeorgia.com>
Subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene was permanently suspended from Twitter
Sent on Sunday, January 2, 2022 at 1:05 p.m.
It’s official: Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently suspended from Twitter.
She deserved to be removed from the platform because of her dangerous incitements to violence and reckless spreading of harmful disinformation.
But here’s the thing: Our goal was never to get Marjorie Taylor Greene removed from Twitter. Our goal is to remove her from Congress.
I’m a Veteran, a Democrat, and I believe that the people of Georgia’s 14th District deserve so much better than Marjorie Taylor Greene. That’s why I’m running to unseat her in 2022.
So I have to ask: Will you join me in the fight to remove her from Congress by donating $20 or more to my campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
DONATE NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
Marjorie Taylor Greene has been removed from Twitter -- that’s a good thing. But let’s not pretend that was our goal. We have to remove her from office.
Thanks for fighting with me,
Marcus Flowers
Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
Marcus for Georgia
PO Box 532
Rome, GA 30162
United States

name: Dr. Robert J. Lorinser
subject: 𝗜𝗺𝗽𝗼𝗿𝘁𝗮𝗻𝘁 𝗖𝗢𝗩𝗜𝗗 𝗨𝗽𝗱𝗮𝘁𝗲: The "Town Hall for All" will move forward with critical change
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Omicron is creating a temporary dent in normalcy. Dr. Bob is hosting a live, virtual, interactive town hall on Thursday, January 13 to provide voters the opportunity to get to know the Democratic candidate vying for Northern Michigan and the U.P.'s Congressional seat. We have decided to move forward with the virtual edition, but cancel in-person audience. **Dr. Lorinser campaign to proceed as normal with live, virtual, interactive event, cancels in-person audience** **_Learn more and register at votedrbob.com/townhall._** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40542834/324822626/29242929?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjBhODEyMi00MzcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1gBXO7z1e4ZdeHJvjA851Zfg_S9NN_CfnwkC0mSjE40=&emci=2f5c1707-4072-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=8f0a8122-4372-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15167427) **_A well-produced virtual town hall like this requires even more resources. Dr. Bob's incumbent opponent, Jack Bergman, hasn't held a town hall in five years, since his first year in office in 2017. It's unacceptable. [**Read Dr. Bob's constituent engagement plan. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40542838/324822630/817068520?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjBhODEyMi00MzcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1gBXO7z1e4ZdeHJvjA851Zfg_S9NN_CfnwkC0mSjE40=&emci=2f5c1707-4072-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=8f0a8122-4372-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15167427) **[Register for our town hall event.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40542839/324822631/778450092?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjBhODEyMi00MzcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1gBXO7z1e4ZdeHJvjA851Zfg_S9NN_CfnwkC0mSjE40=&emci=2f5c1707-4072-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=8f0a8122-4372-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15167427)** _**IMPORTANT UPDATE: Dr. Lorinser's "Town Hall for All" will move to a live, interactive, virtual-only event. The in-person event at NMU is canceled due to an Omicron variant COVID-19 surge.**_ The virtual stream will proceed as normal on Zoom, Facebook Live, Youtube, and **[VoteDrBob.com/townhall](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40542840/324822635/29242929?fbclid=IwAR177xN7DJsFFlXmyF-yYEsB-w6xNLMK7nMQs_v1x4t6D9ojTCjdwuKqUks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjBhODEyMi00MzcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1gBXO7z1e4ZdeHJvjA851Zfg_S9NN_CfnwkC0mSjE40=&emci=2f5c1707-4072-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=8f0a8122-4372-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15167427)**. Attendees are encouraged to engage directly with Dr. Lorinser from the audience on Zoom during the Q&A portion of the evening.

Dr. Lorinser will give a speech and open the second portion of the town hall for questions from a virtual audience. Use the form below to submit and ensure higher priority for the Q&A.

Similar to Northern Michigan University's decision to hold classes virtually this week, high hospitalizations rates of omicron COVID-19 patients make it prudent for the Lorinser campaign to temporarily suspend in-person campaign activities until the surge subsides.

Safe, in-person events were recently achievable – and will again soon be in the near future, but the most recent surge comes at a bad time to ensure the utmost public safety for a Thursday in-person event.

We must move forward from the pandemic and continue life as normal. We encourage everyone to get their vaccinations and boosters. Please register for the virtual event for further information on Dr. Lorinser's take on how COVID affects daily life and his expert opinion about the omicron variant. **If you are one of the hundreds of participants already registered for the postponed in-person[Town Hall for All with Dr. Bob Lorinser](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40542841/324822643/1133022537?__cft__\[0\]=AZUrAaA1W6V9LeZurf_zeyDpD8PKClUWQk8-CF1dPnU579Gpx4d4sc4fNKoto_QYi8yYSbuoz4iwYbstnOFXyz9VKD-ytdDxPjTM_Kjhcb0drD1dwFcsHaZSwm9j7d6MxOivU83nj9DxsEr3T1b3g9Mf&__tn__=-UK-R&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjBhODEyMi00MzcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1gBXO7z1e4ZdeHJvjA851Zfg_S9NN_CfnwkC0mSjE40=&emci=2f5c1707-4072-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=8f0a8122-4372-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15167427), you have already RSVPed for the virtual event. You do not need to re-register.** **You will receive a link through e-mail to participate and will be able to ask Dr. Bob questions from the Zoom audience. [votedrbob.com/townhall.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40542842/324822650/29242929?fbclid=IwAR3sy5ismiGmBR1ACUM4KlUS9bnZapMIVy5tRLjDDhC4iug7o4Oid1t_Ib8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjBhODEyMi00MzcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1gBXO7z1e4ZdeHJvjA851Zfg_S9NN_CfnwkC0mSjE40=&emci=2f5c1707-4072-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=8f0a8122-4372-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15167427)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40542843/324822657/29242929?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjBhODEyMi00MzcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1gBXO7z1e4ZdeHJvjA851Zfg_S9NN_CfnwkC0mSjE40=&emci=2f5c1707-4072-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=8f0a8122-4372-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15167427) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40542844/324822663/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjBhODEyMi00MzcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1gBXO7z1e4ZdeHJvjA851Zfg_S9NN_CfnwkC0mSjE40=) _**The Dr. Bob Lorinser for Congress campaign is 100% funded by individual donors. Dr. Lorinser will give a speech and open the second portion of the town hall for questions from a virtual audience. Use the form below to submit and ensure higher priority for the Q&A. Similar to Northern Michigan University's decision to hold classes virtually this week, high hospitalizations rates of omicron COVID-19 patients make it prudent for the Lorinser campaign to temporarily suspend in-person campaign activities until the surge subsides. Safe, in-person events were recently achievable – and will again soon be in the near future, but the most recent surge comes at a bad time to ensure the utmost public safety for a Thursday in-person event. We must move forward from the pandemic and continue life as normal. We encourage everyone to get their vaccinations and boosters. Please register for the virtual event for further information on Dr. Lorinser's take on how COVID affects daily life and his expert opinion about the omicron variant. name: Fight Taxes!
subject: Elon Musk Vs. Elizabeth Warren: Which side are you on?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KELLI WARD
body:
Attacking Elon Musk on social media isn’t a wise move.

| | |
---
[Unsubscribe](https://for.az.kelliward.com/unsubscribe.php?M=22208987&C=04032ac65d70499c58422a6a52349eb2&E=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&L=1040&N=144485&AGENCY=PMI) | [View in browser](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=144485&L=77595&F=H&drurl=aHR0cDovL2tlbGxpd2FyZC5jb20vZW1haWwtbGV0dGVycy9rdy1yZXYtYm0tbnR1LTIwMjItMDEtMTA=)
[ |
---
|
--- ](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=144485&L=76262&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC10YXhwYXllcnMtdW5pb24vd2FyZGJlbGlldmU=) |
---
| [](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=144485&L=76262&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC10YXhwYXllcnMtdW5pb24vd2FyZGJlbGlldmU=) Friend,

Recently US Senator Elizabeth Warren attacked Elon Musk on social media for being a “freeloader” and demanded Time’s Person of the Year pay more in taxes...

Attacking Elon Musk on social media isn’t a wise move.

Elon replied, _“And if you opened your eyes for 2 seconds, you would realize I will pay more taxes than any American in history this year.”._

He then added, _“Don’t spend it all at once ... oh wait you did already”. _

Elon Musk is paying over 10 billion dollars in taxes for 2021; the final amount will almost certainly be more than any other individual American has paid in one year during the history of the United States. __**But that’s not enough for Elizabeth Warren. **__

Warren is trying to push a “Wealth Tax” through Congress that would empower the IRS to tax an individual’s “net worth” – property, financial assets, business interests, you name it.

This “Wealth Tax” is allegedly only for the mega rich... but we all know how that works. Remember the Alternative Minimum Tax?

Once the tax is enacted, somehow middle class Americans eventually end up sharing in the pain. After all, Warren’s plan would boost the IRS’s budget by $100 billion. The tax agency will not – I repeat not – use all that money to go after only the wealthy.

[_**The National Taxpayers Union (NTU) is fighting Elizabeth Warren’s socialist tax schemes and we invite you to join us! Donate $10 or more to NTU today >>>**_](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=144485&L=76262&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC10YXhwYXllcnMtdW5pb24vd2FyZGJlbGlldmU=)

My name is Pete Sepp, I serve as the President of the National Taxpayers Union (NTU) and I’ve committed my life’s work to fighting taxes, wasteful spending, and advocating for taxpayers.

I have good news and bad news about taxes for you, Friend.

> **The Bad News:** Socialists like AOC and Senator Elizabeth Warren have become more aggressive than ever before. Far-left politicians are saying with one voice they are not giving up! _Make no mistake, one year into Joe Biden’s Administration, Americans are still at risk of seeing new tax hikes. _
>
> **The Good News:** The National Taxpayers Union has a 52-year history of fighting and WINNING public policy battles with both Republicans and Democrats in power. _In fact, the National Taxpayers Union was a key player in passing both President Ronald Reagan and President Donald Trump’s historic tax cuts! _
>
> The next big fight the National Taxpayers Union is facing will be an epic showdown and I need your help. [**_Please consider making a generous donation to the National Taxpayers Union so we can defeat tax increases, cut wasteful spending, and fight for the taxpayer! You can donate by clicking here >>>_**](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=144485&L=76262&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC10YXhwYXllcnMtdW5pb24vd2FyZGJlbGlldmU=)

NTU has a proven history of winning public policy battles like these. **In fact, we have been named one of the TOP lobbyists for the taxpayers two years in a row!**

Allow me to give you an example of a recent victory:

Joe Biden has DESPERATELY been trying to pass his $2 Trillion “Build Back Better” spending bill. NTU took to the airwaves, sponsored phone banks, created digital advertising, and directly visited with Capitol Hill staff to persuade lawmakers to vote NO on this legislative ticket to bankruptcy.

Recently the bill stalled, with Senator Joe Manchin deciding NOT to support the bill... Now Biden must go back to the drawing board entirely! We need to be prepared for Round 2.

**Another example:** The IRS recently tried to add a new rule empowering them to monitor bank accounts with a balance exceeding $600 to “identify tax fraud.” This is a gross abuse of power and a violation of your 4th Amendment rights.

NTU is educating Hill staff about this rule change and the IRS is already backing off. Now the alleged number is $10,000... But we’re not done fighting this yet.

Friend, as you can see the National Taxpayers Union is the taxpayer’s strongest voice in Washington. My goal is to find new online supporters to help me raise $25,000 ASAP. Can I count on your help?

Please use one of these links to send an URGENT donation to the National Taxpayers Union and help us fight new tax hikes!

Friend, your donation has a DIRECT impact on NTU’s ability to fight for tax reform.

Why are we doing this?

NTU is working to build a freer and more prosperous America. Americans should be able to raise their families, start businesses, save for retirement, take vacations, all without the fear of overbearing government destroying their livelihood, or inflation stealing their wealth.

This isn’t just about taxes. This is about building a better country that empowers free markets and free people to create value and enjoy their lives.

Please join the National Taxpayers Union by making a donation today.

Thank you,

Pete Sepp

Your support is very important to me and crucial to my continued service to the people of the central coast of California.

As a veteran, former public prosecutor, and as someone who has always called the Central Coast home, I know what it means to serve and fight for our values. As a United States Representative during the past five years, it has been my honor to protect and promote our principles and to get things done in Congress so that my constituents have the opportunities to succeed.

That is why I am running for re-election in the newly-formed 19th Congressional District located on the Central Coast. I want to continue my fight to ensure that the federal government works for our home, our working families, and the future of our democracy. Your contribution will further my service and propel forward my campaign for Congress as we quickly approach California’s primary election on June 7, 2022.

Thank you, Peter, for your contribution and please feel free to contact me at any time if there is anything that I can do for you. It is a true honor to serve the Central Coast and, with your support, I hope to continue my service to the people of the 19th Congressional District.

Thank you all, and Happy New Year!

Sincerely,

Congressman Jimmy Panetta

body:

_**“SOLD! For $68,000,000,000,000 to the children and grandchildren of the American taxpayer.”**_
-Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden
Fellow Conservative,

In all my days as an auctioneer, I’ve never seen a bidder more eager to throw money away than this Congress under Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi. **But the buck doesn’t even stop at $68 TRILLION, they’ve thrown away our American values and[that’s why I’ve decided to run for the U.S. Senate seat opening in Missouri.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c67fc0a47d86400da66ca9f458830dc7&_e=ZHJzIAxP_n5_srGGYWtRQfOMILlMkvOf_Cbf_TtzQ7H_VD8zV9VbV-eDhXLuOjIlKMFzx8wLAGlRq8U1tw3vKb5X7FffOrDBFAcvi0WT47qnDo8nXfx4N4zRWQmLr9NZCT5lmzn-oirBTAoH8KHUoJXnBaQn82CRqYxpEiS34ot6migW-krVXTsD4kwgaNGh8QzCRCYBalcNj8ih5D1676mvioAYzCk7VUr-JXA4Tg6XGPs2tX9EmV7rTHShCHImrKe7iOJmk07086dZN6mqNFBrKG_4C1cyBhWkO5_yDldMdTTylMvuaJ0pmSJ1adhF4gr6zZU1waZ7PSlqpqiZ1EiJkUGf5YIiWZgeaJ-AB5F-QRRCCzrVkqX4iQ-l89r4dGDt6DuSiu8ijzdzNTVVD90mFuZq4NSj6GsZWDMXRX9LresfycyCBNoWnsJHNFH_8mE5dwzyITI8NNAoibCmcA%3D%3D)**

My name is Billy Long and I’m a United States Congressman, former small business owner, former radio host and father; but above all, I am a proud conservative American.

I stepped up to the plate to represent Missouri’s 7th Congressional District when Roy Blunt decided to run for the Senate in 2011 and I’m stepping up again to continue my fight in the Senate upon his retirement this year. **We CANNOT allow Democrats to take this seat. name: Kevin Kwan
subject: You're Invited: Join me at a special event in support of Marco Lopez (D)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
I really hope to see you there
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40544438/324830429/-1589231112?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk393-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjQ4YmE5OC00OTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SiQoV7S_H2bOVacTIBe8viUqRWrESMGL_ZyLi3088gw=)
---
Friend, I'm Kevin Kwan, author of Crazy Rich Asians. Usually when I reach out to someone for a favor, I'm asking them to read a new book draft I'm working on. But today, I'm asking you to do something a little different, but just as important:
**Will you join me on Jan. 20 at 4 p.m. PT | 7 p.m. ET for a virtual event in support of Democrat Marco Lopez , the _only_ immigrant candidate for governor in the entire country and soon to be Arizona's next governor?**
| | [RSVP NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40544439/324830430/-1589231112?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk393-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjQ4YmE5OC00OTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SiQoV7S_H2bOVacTIBe8viUqRWrESMGL_ZyLi3088gw=)
---
Marco is exactly the governor Arizona needs. He's a former border city mayor, Obama administration alum and small business owner who has dedicated his entire career to making things better for real people.

I may have written about Crazy Rich Asians, but Marco's opponent is backed by crazy rich Republican megadonors who think they can buy this governorship. The event we're holding on Jan. 20 is going to kick off this election year and make clear – Arizona is not for sale.
It's going to take all of us working together to elect Marco and protect Arizona's future from dangerous extremism. **[So please, RSVP now to join the event on Jan. 20, and I'll see you there!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40544440/324830431/-1589231112?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk393-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjQ4YmE5OC00OTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SiQoV7S_H2bOVacTIBe8viUqRWrESMGL_ZyLi3088gw=)**
| | [RSVP NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40544441/324830432/-1589231112?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk393-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjQ4YmE5OC00OTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SiQoV7S_H2bOVacTIBe8viUqRWrESMGL_ZyLi3088gw=)
---
Thank you,

Kevin Kwan
NYT bestselling author
* * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, [please chip in to power our fight forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40544446/324830433/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk393-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjQ4YmE5OC00OTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SiQoV7S_H2bOVacTIBe8viUqRWrESMGL_ZyLi3088gw=) Thank you so much.
– Marco Lopez | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40544447/324830434/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk393-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjQ4YmE5OC00OTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SiQoV7S_H2bOVacTIBe8viUqRWrESMGL_ZyLi3088gw=)

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: Help me fund the Bus Tour!
body:
My campaign is growing in every corner of the state, and I want to meet the people making it happen.
| | | |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QlmPmzIJrnXfE1Q_vI0T2g2QahWBw-33UvB1DMoYlNGvAJ4E1KDwOmcR-V6gmgupBaTMxELOy_6bVJinYFM9SymL_uAqJnS4a4zrrJLsJba0qQa2uwCpoxjq89Het_jDj6_Ll0aPucdSMLy7e9B5xZaBS2BMdfrUJceGXf1wT0vrTxlggFzrYw==&c=gKkeZ7vdW3ku1Q3IjOl5JoXRpT_cVLvaVLYaDFxUP5rO-JuekNj68A==&ch=SdG-x-CFWOir-7WXV9X_XTVFmHeaBrBJiarbc-948gayYziKJqnTmw==)
---
Peter,
My campaign is growing in every corner of the state, and I want to meet the people making it happen.
I'm traveling across Ohio to talk with conservatives face to face. They share my concerns about fiscal responsibility, protecting the right to bear arms, and protecting the lives of the unborn.
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QlmPmzIJrnXfE1Q_vI0T2g2QahWBw-33UvB1DMoYlNGvAJ4E1KDwOmcR-V6gmgupBaTMxELOy_6bVJinYFM9SymL_uAqJnS4a4zrrJLsJba0qQa2uwCpoxjq89Het_jDj6_Ll0aPucdSMLy7e9B5xZaBS2BMdfrUJceGXf1wT0vrTxlggFzrYw==&c=gKkeZ7vdW3ku1Q3IjOl5JoXRpT_cVLvaVLYaDFxUP5rO-JuekNj68A==&ch=SdG-x-CFWOir-7WXV9X_XTVFmHeaBrBJiarbc-948gayYziKJqnTmw==)
---
But this bus won't run itself. I need your help to get it all across the state.

[Peter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QlmPmzIJrnXfE1Q_vI0T2g2QahWBw-33UvB1DMoYlNGvAJ4E1KDwOmcR-V6gmgupBaTMxELOy_6bVJinYFM9SymL_uAqJnS4a4zrrJLsJba0qQa2uwCpoxjq89Het_jDj6_Ll0aPucdSMLy7e9B5xZaBS2BMdfrUJceGXf1wT0vrTxlggFzrYw==&c=gKkeZ7vdW3ku1Q3IjOl5JoXRpT_cVLvaVLYaDFxUP5rO-JuekNj68A==&ch=SdG-x-CFWOir-7WXV9X_XTVFmHeaBrBJiarbc-948gayYziKJqnTmw==), [will you donate $20.22, $50, $100, or any generous amount to help me fill the gas tank? Click here to donate >>> ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QlmPmzIJrnXfE1Q_vI0T2g2QahWBw-33UvB1DMoYlNGvAJ4E1KDwOmcR-V6gmgupBaTMxELOy_6bVJinYFM9SymL_uAqJnS4a4zrrJLsJba0qQa2uwCpoxjq89Het_jDj6_Ll0aPucdSMLy7e9B5xZaBS2BMdfrUJceGXf1wT0vrTxlggFzrYw==&c=gKkeZ7vdW3ku1Q3IjOl5JoXRpT_cVLvaVLYaDFxUP5rO-JuekNj68A==&ch=SdG-x-CFWOir-7WXV9X_XTVFmHeaBrBJiarbc-948gayYziKJqnTmw==)
This tour will help me reach out to the everyday people who are tired of having their values trampled on by the Radical Left or ignored by lousy RINOs.
So many conservatives in Ohio are concerned about the direction of our country. They realize how out-of-touch politicians are with everyday life. I share their concerns.
That's why I'm calling on the support of all patriotic Ohioans to help fund my bus tour. I don't have the support of the corrupt political Establishment like other campaigns. I'm counting on supporters like you, Peter, to help me travel across the state.
Please click a link below to donate today. A donation of $500 fills up the tank completely. [Donate $20.22 clean_body: My campaign is growing in every corner of the state, and I want to meet the people making it happen. | | | | == Peter, My campaign is growing in every corner of the state, and I want to meet the people making it happen. I'm traveling across Ohio to talk with conservatives face to face. They share my concerns about fiscal responsibility, protecting the right to bear arms, and protecting the lives of the unborn. == But this bus won't run itself. I need your help to get it all across the state. ==, == This tour will help me reach out to the everyday people who are tired of having their values trampled on by the Radical Left or ignored by lousy RINOs. So many conservatives in Ohio are concerned about the direction of our country. They realize how out-of-touch politicians are with everyday life. I share their concerns. That's why I'm calling on the support of all patriotic Ohioans to help fund my bus tour. I don't have the support of the corrupt political Establishment like other campaigns. I'm counting on supporters like you, Peter, to help me travel across the state. Please click a link below to donate today. A donation of $500 fills up the tank completely. == == == == == == == My Senate race is one of the most important elections in the country. Winning in Ohio will ensure conservatives take back the Senate in 2022. The best way to win this election is to get out and meet concerned conservatives and show them I'm not like the politicians who have let them down. I can win in 2022. This bus tour will carry our campaign all the way to the election with the people of Ohio behind me. == Thank you, Mike Gibbons Candidate for U.S. Senate | | | | | | | Gibbons for Ohio | 1375 E 9th St #2500, Cleveland, OH 44114 | | Sent by mailto:info@gibbonsforohio.com in collaboration with |

It’s time to put power back into the hands of workers | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40544645/324831077/54677820?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220110corpgreed_TD_60da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTg0ZjM3NC00YjcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fGwqginqpaJvZxEKLLEwQRFWSUTx6g2rahOncAghO8g=)

Today is a great day to talk about corporate greed, Derek. Throughout the pandemic, big corporations and CEOs received generous COVID relief while jacking up prices, fighting against unions, and blaming inflation for higher prices while pocketing record profits. During an economic and public health crisis, workers are still expected to work and make life-or-death decisions with little to no support. Frankly, it’s unacceptable — no one should have to choose between protecting their health and safety or putting food on the table. That’s why workers all across the country are tired of making poverty wages and unsafe working conditions and are demanding more from our leaders. [**It’s time to put power back into the hands of workers. Add your name to our petition calling Congress to fight for ALL workers and hold corporations accountable for outsourcing jobs, killing small businesses, union-busting, and paying poverty wages >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40544646/324831078/-781428463?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220110corpgreed_TD_60da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTg0ZjM3NC00YjcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fGwqginqpaJvZxEKLLEwQRFWSUTx6g2rahOncAghO8g=&emci=f14956d9-3d72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=6984f374-4b72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=13185894) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40544647/324831079/-781428463?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220110corpgreed_TD_60da_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTg0ZjM3NC00YjcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fGwqginqpaJvZxEKLLEwQRFWSUTx6g2rahOncAghO8g=&emci=f14956d9-3d72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=6984f374-4b72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=13185894)

Chris will champion workers and organized labor because he understands the dignity and value of all work. As a Pitt faculty member, he helped organize with his peers to form a union — at one of western PA’s largest employers. He always stands in solidarity with workers fighting for better wages and conditions, like the folks at Coffee Tree Roasters, UPMC nurses, and so many others here.
**We need more leaders who will fight for the right to organize, strengthen unions, and ensure corporations pay their fair share in taxes.** Chris is committed to building economic prosperity for all Western Pennsylvanians — not just corporations and the wealthy.
Thanks for speaking out on this issue.
Team Deluzio

| Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Democrats have to hold it in order to keep their House majority in 2022. name: Matt West
subject: Our nation is at a crossroads.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Matt West for Congress
body:
Take a look. | Friend, our nation is at a crossroads.
* **At least ten people involved in the Capitol riot were just elected to office last year— and another seven more are running.**
* **Donald Trump’s inner circle of GOP allies are still spreading Big Lie conspiracies like wildfire.**
* **And to top everything off, last year alone, 19 Republican-led states passed egregious voter suppression laws.**

The ONLY way Democrats can preserve our democracy and put an end to the GOP’s dangerous movement is by **_retaining control of the House and passing voting rights legislation._** I am running for Congress in Oregon to make both a reality. **[But I can’t do it alone: will you chip in $25 or more before 11:59 pm tonight to help me get the job done?>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40544725/324831490/2035722763?amount=25&refcode=ea.8ad6d8ad-4b72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ms=ea.8ad6d8ad-4b72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWQ2ZDhhZC00YjcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=92K7imlevbwIz_kcgnWwBnaif8_4_clf3IdAetKPq2A=)** Now you may be asking, “how will winning in Oregon really change anything?” Simply put: Republicans only need five seats to flip the House red in November. Donald Trump’s inner circle of GOP allies are still spreading Big Lie conspiracies like wildfire. And to top everything off, last year alone, 19 Republican-led states passed egregious voter suppression laws. The ONLY way Democrats can preserve our democracy and put an end to the GOP’s dangerous movement is by retaining control of the House and passing voting rights legislation. I am running for Congress in Oregon to make both a reality. = Now you may be asking, “how will winning in Oregon really change anything?” Simply put: Republicans only need five seats to flip the House red in November. Folks, It’s full speed ahead to Election Day and Michael wants to hear from you. Last year he travelled hundreds of miles across Colorado, listening to working parents, small business owners, and outdoor recreation leaders about what they need. With their feedback — and responses to our monthly surveys – Michael negotiated tax cuts for working parents, infrastructure investment that will create jobs for Coloradans and folks nationwide, and strategic action to address climate change. This year, Michael is working to build on that progress and win his reelection campaign so he can continue delivering for families. Folks like you drive Michael’s work, so please take a moment to fill out our first survey of this midterm election year. We want to hear what issues matter to you most and how Michael can help. His first priority is folks like you, so your thoughts today couldn’t be more valuable. [_**Please take a moment to take the Official January Priorities Survey today********. Team – **[I'm about to ask you to make a donation to Maggie Hassan's reelection campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40544795/324831785/-1281091919?refcode=e20220110_aj-opponent&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGEzMTIzMS00YzcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OSrpAg6nS9umvNwQDlofdhctDgr_RCQPLJvW6tsi37E=)** But first, let me explain the stakes of this election now that Chuck Morse, the Republican President of the New Hampshire Senate, has jumped in. * **Morse spearheaded New Hampshire's first abortion ban** in modern history, and explicitly said he opposes ANY exceptions for rape or incest.
* **He wrote legislation to gut Medicare** and raise the retirement age for Granite Staters.
* Morse also crafted an extreme budget that **defunded education and programs for kids while increasing health care costs.**

**With Chuck Morse now in the race, the stakes have never been higher.** That's why I'm reaching out to you today, team. Defending our Senate majority is the only way we can stop Mitch McConnell from blocking Democrats' progress and enacting his right-wing agenda. **[We need your support now more than ever. subject: What could Sean Hannity be hiding?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
We all know that January 6 didn't just happen by accident -- but we still need the truth about who was behind it. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40544835/324831964/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhMjM4NGEzLTRjNzItZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkOTIzYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fIB1Rb0BXt99p31sOOFLgw3gcoFipXin-sK4uKCOb-A=&emci=ddfb697d-3872-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=ca2384a3-4c72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=16335001) Team,

**We all know that January 6 didn't just happen by accident** \-- but we still need the truth about who was behind it.

The House select committee investigating the insurrection has materials that could implicate Fox News host Sean Hannity in the planning of the coup and incriminating text messages sent out while the Capitol was under siege.

Last week, the House select committee issued a letter requesting the voluntary cooperation of Fox News host Sean Hannity to explain his role in the insurrection. But so far, Hannity and Fox News have tried to cover up his involvement and have paid a collective 88 seconds worth of screen time to the committee's request.

We need to know the details of Hannity's role in the January 6 insurrection to better understand the involvement of the right-wing media with the pro-treason movement.

**We believe that Sean Hannity must comply with the lawful requests from the House Committee immediately.** The American people deserve to know the full truth about what happened on January 6. Now we need to know what you think: | **[Should Sean Hannity cooperate with the House select committee?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40544836/324831965/238661974?ms=em22_220110_SHFP_esrv_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&refcode=em22_220110_SHFP_esrv_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&source=em22_220110_SHFP_esrv_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220110_SHFP_esrv_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=FpwBSKw9Q%2BQni8E%2BTV6qO4cbE24ILwZqd%2BasZIhahhMkGfqdyxmv62CM2w7u%2FGozG9HwzUBIyXdf%2B0I1OPgOzmi9IyRkusITwJTbpWRGntucxPf8GtRipujjefEP5OJizLUQHo2Aa2Cneuw9PAm8AQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhMjM4NGEzLTRjNzItZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkOTIzYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fIB1Rb0BXt99p31sOOFLgw3gcoFipXin-sK4uKCOb-A=&emci=ddfb697d-3872-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=ca2384a3-4c72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=16335001)** | [YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40544837/324831966/238661974?ms=em22_220110_SHFP_esrv_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&refcode=em22_220110_SHFP_esrv_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&source=em22_220110_SHFP_esrv_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220110_SHFP_esrv_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=FpwBSKw9Q%2BQni8E%2BTV6qO4cbE24ILwZqd%2BasZIhahhMkGfqdyxmv62CM2w7u%2FGozG9HwzUBIyXdf%2B0I1OPgOzmi9IyRkusITwJTbpWRGntucxPf8GtRipujjefEP5OJizLUQHo2Aa2Cneuw9PAm8AQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhMjM4NGEzLTRjNzItZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkOTIzYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fIB1Rb0BXt99p31sOOFLgw3gcoFipXin-sK4uKCOb-A=&emci=ddfb697d-3872-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=ca2384a3-4c72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=16335001)

PRESS CONTACT: Laurel Imer for Congress Press Office Press@laurelimerforcongress.com (720) 248-7639 ext. 2
CONGRESSIONAL CANDIDATE LAUREL IMER ISSUES A STATEMENT ON ED PERLMUTTERS RETIREMENT FROM THE US HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES
"Ed Perlmutter is no different from any other 2022 Democrat drop-out: he didn't want to lose his re-election bid in 2022. He can see a red wave is coming in the midterms, and we look forward to seeing this race through to the end. We wish Ed Perlmutter a comfortable retirement, but we are thankful Colorado will be receiving new leadership in the 7th. Let's Put America First in CD7 and let's take back the house!"
Laurel Imer Republican Candidate CO-07 ###
About Laurel: Laurel Imer is a Republican candidate in Colorado's 7th Congressional District! In 2020 Laurel was hand-picked by President Donald J. Trump and his team to be his delegate to the Republican National Convention for Congressional District 7. Laurel served as Jefferson County Chair for the Donald Trump Campaign in 2016. Laurel was also picked by President Trump and his team to be one of Colorado's 9 Republican Presidential Electors at the Electoral College for the 2016 Presidential Election. When elected Laurel will work hard to align local and federal issues in education and school choice, immigration, infrastructure, and economic growth, capitalizing on the success of President Trump's America First Policies. Laurel is laser-focused on ending human trafficking, completing the southern border wall, securing election integrity, and Putting America First Again.

Peter,

Republicans across Colorado are actively spreading anti-mask and anti-vaccine rhetoric. Lauren Boebert and her MAGA minions would rather put our communities and children at risk for months on end than work with public health officials to end this pandemic and get our economy back on track.

In fact, one of Dr. Caraveo’s opponents, Lori Saine, was just quoted on a local morning show calling the vaccine “a government medical shield” and stoking misguided fear around vaccine risks.

But we can always count on Dr. Fauci. He has never wavered. Throughout this crisis, he’s been committed entirely to the health and safety of the American people.

During the Trump Administration, he was a voice of reason we knew we could always count on.

And throughout the Biden Administration, he’s helped get vaccines in millions of arms and get us on the path to recovery.

Dr. Caraveo is extremely grateful for the hard work Dr. Fauci has put into combating the COVID-19 pandemic, but she wants to hear from you on this topic, Peter. **Do you approve of Dr. Fauci?**

Lauren Boebert and her MAGA minions would rather put our communities and children at risk for months on end than work with public health officials to end this pandemic and get our economy back on track. In fact, one of Dr. Caraveo’s opponents, Lori Saine, was just quoted on a local morning show calling the vaccine “a government medical shield” and stoking misguided fear around vaccine risks. But we can always count on Dr. Fauci. He has never wavered. Throughout this crisis, he’s been committed entirely to the health and safety of the American people. During the Trump Administration, he was a voice of reason we knew we could always count on. And throughout the Biden Administration, he’s helped get vaccines in millions of arms and get us on the path to recovery. Dr. Caraveo is extremely grateful for the hard work Dr. Fauci has put into combating the COVID-19 pandemic, but she wants to hear from you on this topic, Peter. Do you approve of Dr. Fauci? name: American Action News
subject: Studying his accomplishments is needed
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD.
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z319qb3h5vqmgo5vqb9v03dql3ql35i9l5mg92mo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3gm2o70s5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmtda4nq3tp3qjiauudkdsuid5l2cpsmsli6ofh8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3gm2o70s5h2bs)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi8s9l029phh4egsl711e4b17fucotkfr2b0nmn8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3gm2o70s5h2bs) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z05d19qvp7613pekv94iihvmguelk68mga9vq9mo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3gm2o70s5h2bs)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |
---
American Action News

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to unsubscribe](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2qtsa9om1srr5d0vlskrc9e7m76tjj0lr1t6vl0_)

body:
You don’t know me, but you know Nick Antonucci, and I am asking for just a minute of your time regarding an incredibly critical message about the... | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8c78680f5326/nick-antonucci-needs-your-help?e=559f989661)

| | | [ ](https://ebricks03.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=af534523e1f2bdf0498b9f864&id=09d91ee6e0&e=559f989661 "Antonucci for Congress")
