| | |
---
## A Long Islander Who Understands Long Island
# Nick Antonucci for New York’s 1st Congressional District in 2022
| **You don’t know me, but you know Nick Antonucci, and I am asking for just a minute of your time regarding an incredibly critical message about the future of Long Island and its people. Nick, whom you may know as a teacher, professor, colleague, friend, or neighbor, is running for U.S. Congress. Nick (or “Mr. Antonucci”, as you may know him) is a candidate for the Democratic Nomination in NY’s 1st Congressional District. I’m writing on behalf of the diverse group of educators, business leaders, engineers, and concerned citizens who make up Nick’s campaign leadership team.** **I’ve known Nick since we were 15 years old when we were both part of a group of fine arts students in Sachem High School – music, theatre, creativity and scholastics, we worked hard at it all. Nick and I both found American History and American Politics to be enormously interesting, and we both made them part of our lives from college degrees to career paths. Nick became a teacher in Sachem district and an adjunct professor at Suffolk Community College. When Nick called me to say he was contemplating this campaign, I jumped in wholeheartedly and I am now Nick’s Campaign Manager.** **Why? Let me tell you:**
1. ** I know and admire Nick’s personal and professional characteristics including honesty, integrity, compassion, patriotism, and loyalty.**
2. **Nick’s values align with my own: Care for the less fortunate, saving our environment, prioritizing equity in education, creating an economy that works for families and small businesses– not just corporate giants, and protecting all civil and human rights including the right to vote and the right to bodily autonomy.**
3. **Nick is incredibly smart and hard-working, well-educated in the role government can play in improving people’s lives, and has spent his adult life in service to his family, teaching, church, and community.**

**With Rep. Lee Zeldin announcing that he will not run for re-election, the time is right for a passionate, ethical, patriotic, and “home-grown” Democratic candidate to represent our district in a way that is best for all of us. Nick will never put party over country, and he will never put his own interests above yours. If you would like to help Nick get his message out to a wider audience, we really need you to donate now. Everything costs money – from venues for meetings and rallies to print materials and social media ads; from lists of registered Democrats to postage. Nick is the unknown, underfunded, underdog. We are counting on those who have been touched by Nick in some way to give us the spring board we need to move into the public phase of the campaign. ** **If you believe in Nick, and have the means to do so, we respectfully and gratefully ask you to consider donating $50 or more to help get us to a level playing field with our opponents, who are supported by PACS and wealthy donors. If you are just interested in giving Nick a chance to be heard by a broader audience, a donation of $6 would do the trick (think of it as one cup of coffee). ** **Please go to[NYNick4Congress.com](https://ebricks03.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=af534523e1f2bdf0498b9f864&id=e55cde60e9&e=559f989661) to learn more about Nick, his policy positions, what he hopes to accomplish, and how you can get involved with the campaign. And finally, please follow us on Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter: @NYNick4Congress – and look for our official launch video coming out January 15.** **Reach out with ANY questions or concerns you may have. [info@nynick4congress.com](mailto:info@nynick4congress.com)**
**Dr. Laura Valente** **Campaign Manager** **Antonucci for Congress**
---

clean_body: You don’t know me, but you know Nick Antonucci, and I am asking for just a minute of your time regarding an incredibly critical message about the... | | | | | | | "Antonucci for Congress" | | | A Long Islander Who Understands Long Island Nick Antonucci for New York’s 1st Congressional District in 2022 | You don’t know me, but you know Nick Antonucci, and I am asking for just a minute of your time regarding an incredibly critical message about the future of Long Island and its people. Nick, whom you may know as a teacher, professor, colleague, friend, or neighbor, is running for U.S. Congress. Nick (or “Mr. Antonucci”, as you may know him) is a candidate for the Democratic Nomination in NY’s 1st Congressional District. I’m writing on behalf of the diverse group of educators, business leaders, engineers, and concerned citizens who make up Nick’s campaign leadership team. I’ve known Nick since we were 15 years old when we were both part of a group of fine arts students in Sachem High School – music, theatre, creativity and scholastics, we worked hard at it all. Nick and I both found American History and American Politics to be enormously interesting, and we both made them part of our lives from college degrees to career paths. Nick became a teacher in Sachem district and an adjunct professor at Suffolk Community College. When Nick called me to say he was contemplating this campaign, I jumped in wholeheartedly and I am now Nick’s Campaign Manager. Why? Let me tell you: 1. I know and admire Nick’s personal and professional characteristics including honesty, integrity, compassion, patriotism, and loyalty. 2. Nick’s values align with my own: Care for the less fortunate, saving our environment, prioritizing equity in education, creating an economy that works for families and small businesses– not just corporate giants, and protecting all civil and human rights including the right to vote and the right to bodily autonomy. 3. Nick is incredibly smart and hard-working, well-educated in the role government can play in improving people’s lives, and has spent his adult life in service to his family, teaching, church, and community. With Rep. Lee Zeldin announcing that he will not run for re-election, the time is right for a passionate, ethical, patriotic, and “home-grown” Democratic candidate to represent our district in a way that is best for all of us. Nick will never put party over country, and he will never put his own interests above yours. If you would like to help Nick get his message out to a wider audience, we really need you to donate now. Everything costs money – from venues for meetings and rallies to print materials and social media ads; from lists of registered Democrats to postage. Nick is the unknown, underfunded, underdog. We are counting on those who have been touched by Nick in some way to give us the spring board we need to move into the public phase of the campaign. If you believe in Nick, and have the means to do so, we respectfully and gratefully ask you to consider donating $50 or more to help get us to a level playing field with our opponents, who are supported by PACS and wealthy donors. If you are just interested in giving Nick a chance to be heard by a broader audience, a donation of $6 would do the trick (think of it as one cup of coffee). Please go to to learn more about Nick, his policy positions, what he hopes to accomplish, and how you can get involved with the campaign. And finally, please follow us on Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter: @NYNick4Congress – and look for our official launch video coming out January 15. Reach out with ANY questions or concerns you may have. mailto:info@nynick4congress.com Dr. Laura Valente Campaign Manager Antonucci for Congress | | Your Island. Your Voice. | | | "Donate to help power our grassroots campaign and flip this district blue!" | | $0 The Amount of Money Accepted from Corporate PACs | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Our mailing address is: mailto:info@nynick4congress.com Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . Paid for by Antonucci for Congress Only accepting donations from people like you - never corporate PACs!

Those words mean something to me . | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0bPZYqqRmKw-ebpnqlyWdsbb4WUxyyDpjjPMxiSxHH8sy344_jjY0z77oGhVrMawoFMg1lmH0f4c05gUUDxxyP6UgXMrZpwijQ-F8K8-4RmoA92EK8gQ8c5CdiTZPauZHCIjH5GKHoz8Pm-ajLeJUV1WCLXZseoZTrr38kzpVK0xTzQHI9tnuj7ip_5qlmWqXnKnM36ipd2AV3ISSWjUomOBgJq6e3dK1im_ixsW0fhSg/3il/S8FZ8pQzRhaW9RCMdIem6w/h0/AL_e5yW3gkw8qceoE1LGve8QH6saemx-p1FbftkTbHg) team, I didn’t grow up dreaming of representing my community in Congress. When I was a kid, I witnessed a shooting in front of my house. I knew the victim & I knew the shooter. From that moment, solving every crisis my community faced meant devoting my life to showing up, in solidarity. Those words, in solidarity, mean a lot to me. It’s more than a tweet, more than thoughts and prayers, and more than usually taking the right votes when people are watching.**In solidarity means showing up and being on the frontlines creating real life solutions. Every day.** From organizing in the wake of Laquan McDonald’s murder, to co-authoring the Illinois Council on Women and Girls Act, leading the largest Gun Violence Prevention org in IL, and showing up at 4am for Amazon workers in Chicago area warehouses. **Standing in solidarity is what I do.** [**This campaign is about making that the new minimum we expect from ALL of our representatives. And it is urgent. If you know exactly what I mean, donate $15 to help us win.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yyI9Ec4jqaaYr4Vh8HkLqyHs9yupfQwfpTXeH-HpsP5ZTbuv7qELpAuxdB3Tapy-bc004u-YYNoKylN2H5MYTeDd72osbwI6vrC8s10kZm5gTY8F4yDiK0K0c5b3swtWc8wZyZArosbzy5jQgl7Ey1-if2nSv7kULIXoj1po_hkidyr9Ywn_gMhuqugwX_MkxVCWVm4l2OQQi_JFanttPcUROLjqn-IY0nIsHTGBQOLoCwALcoxCXZx0kua0j8EsfyBARHsgZBeJmt-5LOGhSU/3il/S8FZ8pQzRhaW9RCMdIem6w/h1/YLPzO7I9Op0rTVP4oGwYPzVULne5qMEIJAlHjtAsrlg) clean_body: Those words mean something to me . | | | team, I didn’t grow up dreaming of representing my community in Congress. When I was a kid, I witnessed a shooting in front of my house. I knew the victim & I knew the shooter. From that moment, solving every crisis my community faced meant devoting my life to showing up, in solidarity. Those words, in solidarity, mean a lot to me. It’s more than a tweet, more than thoughts and prayers, and more than usually taking the right votes when people are watching.In solidarity means showing up and being on the frontlines creating real life solutions. Every day. From organizing in the wake of Laquan McDonald’s murder, to co-authoring the Illinois Council on Women and Girls Act, leading the largest Gun Violence Prevention org in IL, and showing up at 4am for Amazon workers in Chicago area warehouses. Standing in solidarity is what I do. The thing I am most proud of about my campaign is that on a given day, you know where to find me. I’ll be out in our communities, standing in solidarity with the people of my district. I’ll see you out there, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

Dear Peter,
The 2022 General Assembly legislative session begins tomorrow afternoon. Last year, we saw some of the most extreme legislation passed in the entire country - the GOP House Supermajority passed bills attacking LGBTQ+ youth, passed permitless gun carry despite pleas from law enforcement officers, and continued to attack women’s reproductive rights with regressive bills. Myself and fellow members of the House Democratic Caucus are going to do everything in our power to protect Tennesseans from the GOP Supermajority, but our best long term strategy is to win back more seats this election year.
Legally, we cannot fundraise during the legislative session and today is the last day we can ask for support. [Can you make a contribution and help Democrats win back more seats in 2022?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40546108/324840469/-361920907?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzZhMWRmOS01MjcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bZi5JcJRkd6xiiTVubM5MNjSNL10NBHkgde4SIZ4aPM=)

Hey, Peter.
**This Saturday, January 15, is a _really_ big day for us here on Team Martin: it’s our campaign’s very first campaign finance filing deadline. [Will you help us make a final push before the deadline to show the strength behind this campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40546114/324840585/-371068714?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220110midmonth1_DJM_opntl_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjk4YWQxOC01MzcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WALZoOY0A6HiDxViOzTS-x21JrywK-rGt1ylj69OPlY=)**

---
Here’s a little more about why this deadline is so important:
By Tennessee law, campaigns are required to file quarterly campaign finance reports leading up to the election. In Tennessee this year, the very first one is January 15, 2022 — just a few days from now! — and it includes everything we’ve raised since we launched this campaign in August. Put simply: It’s a big deal.
These reports aren’t just a bunch of random numbers. Things like the number of grassroots donors, average contribution, and total dollars raised are key indicators of our strength in this race. People all across the state (and the country) will be paying attention to our fundraising results, and we can’t disappoint them.
**The more we raise before we close the books on Saturday, the better our chances of having the resources we need to go up against the GOP dark money machine, take down Bill Lee, and restore honest leadership to our state.**
[**So, what do you say? Can you pitch in a few bucks to help us reach our goal before midnight on Saturday?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40546116/324840587/-371068714?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220110midmonth1_DJM_opntl_SLA_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjk4YWQxOC01MzcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WALZoOY0A6HiDxViOzTS-x21JrywK-rGt1ylj69OPlY=)

In Tennessee this year, the very first one is January 15, 2022 — just a few days from now! — and it includes everything we’ve raised since we launched this campaign in August. Put simply: It’s a big deal. These reports aren’t just a bunch of random numbers. Things like the number of grassroots donors, average contribution, and total dollars raised are key indicators of our strength in this race. People all across the state (and the country) will be paying attention to our fundraising results, and we can’t disappoint them. The more we raise before we close the books on Saturday, the better our chances of having the resources we need to go up against the GOP dark money machine, take down Bill Lee, and restore honest leadership to our state. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks so much for your support. name: Hillsdale College via Backing America
subject: The Beauty of Genesis
body:
Hillsdale College’s popular online course, “The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives,” is still available online for free!
[Unsubscribe](http://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_s=22af8e8f6e0048d5b0569d8b24d124d0&_t=eRlm9gmHyWP4YrfRlAI7IhhvXkD08eGEjo25tRmbk-eTAzU05Cy1zY6SwGW0FYcaI1EcvC-GmNa0aB4oNkvV_g9JESJ3TjUFUa1RIHomocRgCEc7o03THS05fX3fuT5KXlDxiDIRO49G-Daa7qPBUktPW6jXpWEd0rep8HOhgLr7YpiRv60s1ikvCba8firpLr1Oknrc4FYWlQqe4rxculmsk4eg2_WgGftm8_lIdxg%3D)
_Please see a message from our sponsor:_
---
| | | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=22af8e8f6e0048d5b0569d8b24d124d0&_e=Vs_R6_PQ0LhVzK-Zt1VHJEaIYI5xEooNs4KNqbT_ZltnndvsNd2mWWJMn8fssTC9bUdH67qUGvuQjxgVI-83BdlW-MJAC7U1-wWGX6vw1mp_887UnlM6tatmaJ_APALmTAJVraeawzDT2MWZGrymD1DzLVKAFZMaAsrZ52KNlkxAHZPY0ZSsG0e-WhTjEpOPjpKT_4z_l8tG3wSThLkj_9_hPoYIqNSqkBpAsKmImH_V4w2wKbcv8b910MTLQCDjaQQrY88tO7HuL2WUXZi07CMUxq8FZ-C1aapdIWwd5tP453uj576yQuk6Qv-w2RgV3t6K8O-hTlqgXTXR6UqcmITA5DbdB7EyeMHdONxfqmOpPOfglOCzqz3BB7hOM7Icua4Z8uVsaTy3XWHK8uSeh6qYnm5k6rHVz1uu05zk5BSTlumqoPtfe_pa0CDkslLR)
Dear Fellow American,

I hope you're having a good day. I'm writing with some exciting news.

Hillsdale College's popular online course, “The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives,” is still available online for free!

In this six-lecture course, you'll explore some of the major themes of Genesis, including the complex relationship between God and man, and what it reveals about divine and human nature.

“The Genesis Story” is taught by Hillsdale College professor of English Justin Jackson, who has taught this text to undergraduate students here at the College for over 15 years.

This course aims to deepen a student's theological understanding of the Old Testament by revealing the literary beauty and complexity of the text.

The course begins with a lecture and introduction by the President of Hillsdale College, Larry P. Arnn, in which he explains why we teach the Book of Genesis at Hillsdale College and why it's important to both faith and higher education.

Then, Professor Jackson explains the four relationships that dominate the Book of Genesis: God and creation, God and man, man and man, and man and creation.

These relationships are explored in the narratives of Adam and Eve, Abraham and Sarah, Abraham and Isaac, Jacob and Esau, and finally, Joseph.

This course is perfect for personal study, viewing with your family, or for use in small groups such as Bible studies and book clubs.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/genesis](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=22af8e8f6e0048d5b0569d8b24d124d0&_e=Vs_R6_PQ0LhVzK-Zt1VHJEaIYI5xEooNs4KNqbT_ZltnndvsNd2mWWJMn8fssTC9bUdH67qUGvuQjxgVI-83BdlW-MJAC7U1-wWGX6vw1mp_887UnlM6tatmaJ_APALmTAJVraeawzDT2MWZGrymD1DzLVKAFZMaAsrZ52KNlkxAHZPY0ZSsG0e-WhTjEpOPjpKT_4z_l8tG3wSThLkj_9_hPoYIqNSqkBpAsKmImH9kh_BR0PVlZ2XIt52TmtheR0PT7J4qSlB5oXYwyi1fdxiQZjLMilsi0s18BddBLziTTj7fw5TmMJX9GL_8m7deH-KKB8xmP28PnqBoqCRIidXS4-n8EC0_S0N7U5_ZVydatAXBz3ZoNbiGWLSsyd-kQz4mrfMmYXQcGGm-NAWToDU8fX-F64Tqt-TNkxyCoBq2aggh6GRpbCZTRC-j9Tm7)**

Please use the secure link above to explore the beauty of the first book of the Bible with “The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives.”

Warm regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Hillsdale College. All rights reserved.

clean_body: Joe Biden and the Democrats have proven to be a disaster for America. | Everything is at stake, this year Peter. We must mount our strongest effort yet to help Republicans nationwide win tremendous turnaround victories and seize majorities from the Biden-Harris Democrats. That’s what it’s going to take to bring the disastrous, socialist, open borders Democrat agenda to a screeching halt - and set up the opportunity to retake the White House in 2024. But to achieve everything we need between now and next November to make this historic reversal, we’re counting on our most committed supporters Joe Biden and the Democrats have proven to be a disaster for America. They STOPPED all the progress we made on the border wall under President Trump, opened our borders and allowed hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants to flood into our country. That’s just the beginning, too, Peter - they’re rolling out their radical schemes to further shrink our freedoms and increase their control over America: 1. Passing legislation to make it even easier to cheat in elections with their absurdly named “For the People Act” ... 2. Conniving to further erode our Second Amendment rights by increasing background checks and banning whole classes of firearms... 3. Cancelling the Keystone XL pipeline, reducing American energy output, importing more oil from overseas, and driving up prices for workers and families... 4. Pushing disastrous plans to “Defund the Police” and further divide our people over identity politics pandering... | Great America PAC has proven we can take on the Democrats and BEAT them, and we’re getting ready to do it again. Peter, will you please continue to back our indispensable effort of ensuring Republican victories by renewing your 2022 Membership Card RIGHT NOW? | We’re a few days into 2022, and I hope the new year is already off to a great start for you! Did you make any resolutions for the New Year? I did, but it’s the same resolution I had last year... [Fire Nancy Pelosi!](http://link.email.dynect.net/link.php?DynEngagement=true&H=e%2BlHqQR4V3vHsbMTFh525c13Jde3Gt%2BMvZephxG6johbuWydASW%2F%2FrMnRks%2Bb7sWvFOtWrWdluSb0DQIICruW3Nkwast9Hyq5YahetGTOxDpIQ7XehdsBg%3D%3D&G=0&R=https%3A%2F%2FLRYQG4ZTGNA.hatchbuck.com%2FTrackLinkClick%3FID2%3DRR1zWRDEbwya_QRQqbQQPMQUmekdZG6i8TDBJ4PZBVYIUNC9tRz-bRK-HUV6Kctn0&I=20220110154147.0000000d6366%40smtp-ad2-41-phx&X=MHwxMjcwODUwOjI0MjA1NTg5MTc7MXwxMjcwODUxOjE5MDIyNjI0Mjs%3D&V=3&S=EYIxQ-y33ytRLAaHlW4MwXx0sYTL08dSJgrRr9ikvps) Most resolutions fail because we don’t ask for help. I’m not going to make that mistake. On this day, 32 years ago, my favorite Capricorn was born
#

Hey folks,
On this day, 32 years ago, my favorite Capricorn was born — today is my fiancé Matt’s birthday!
**I need your help to show him some love from our team on his special day. Will you take a moment to sign his birthday card and wish him a happy birthday?**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Breaking: NPR paints me as Enemy #1
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Help me fight back |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8d257892b1&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
My name is Mark Finchem. I am the Trump-endorsed Election Integrity Conservative running for Secretary of State in Arizona. I am the only one who can fix our elections, and am actively working on ballot foolproofing and watermarking to make sure that elections are protected nationwide.

_And the media has picked up the scent! They know how much damage I could do to the Liberal Democrat fraud operation._

**And this is why they are on the attack.**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=44fe6e980d&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| When it comes to Election Integrity, the Liberal propaganda mouthpiece NPR thinks I am Enemy #1.

_They want me to lose at ANY cost._

_NPR_ “reports:”

_Mark Finchem was at the U.S. Capitol on Jan. 6._

_He says he didn't go inside, but he snapped some photos of people who did._

_"What happens when the People feel they have been ignored, and Congress refuses to acknowledge rampant fraud. #stopthesteal," he tweeted._

_The Arizona state representative was there to share what he called "evidence" of an "irredeemably compromised" 2020 election with Republican lawmakers from his home state of Arizona. To be clear, Republican election officials in the state deemed the results "free, fair, and accurate" and even a discredited GOP-led "audit" run in the state's largest county agreed Biden won._

_More recently, Finchem also appeared at a QAnon conference, and in speaking with NPR declined to describe what happened at the Capitol as a riot or an insurrection, instead making allusions to a sort of conspiracy involving law enforcement._

_Now, he is running to oversee voting in Arizona in 2022._

**Painting me as a conspiracy theorist is a blatant smear campaign to do everything in their power to prevent me winning Secretary of State.**

But let’s be honest, folks, _I’m used to this._

I’ve been attacked by the mainstream media all year as the leader of a huge grassroots campaign that led to the auditing of Maricopa County, which revealed and proved massive fraud.

**I’ve been endorsed by President Trump as a Champion Fighter for Election Integrity and have spoken at his rallies.**

**_I’m the only candidate in the country that has worked personally to develop currency-grade ballot protection and watermarking technology and have pushed to have this adopted nationwide._**

Folks, they’re not going after me because I’m a “conspiracy theorist.”

**_They’re going after me for my resume. They see what I’ve done. They know what I will do._**

I will fight back. I will strike hard. I will win.

**But to do this, we have to win the fight _ourselves._ We have to get the word out _ourselves._ We have to defend against the lying media _ourselves_.**

[And I cannot do this without your support! I need your support to win this race!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ecec2d21ca&e=44b8c466b0)

_[Whatever you can spare, please consider donating $25, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me fight against the Fake News Media and get the word out about our foolproof ballot protection technology!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5fc59db769&e=44b8c466b0)_

_[Chip in tonight so that we can immediately accelerate our campaign and petition drives to get patriots around America to pressure their lawmakers to adopt our currency-grade ballot watermarking!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=fe62c00f46&e=44b8c466b0)_

_2022 can be the safest elections yet!_
---
| [Thank you and God bless you!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=286e5b9fb6&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e8fa68d365&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. [Please contribute today](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2b5a4d5826&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE

| |
---

Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=fd0287d07d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=fd0287d07d).

name: Derek Marshall
subject: Here’s what Congress can do:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
Today, the second session of the 117th Congress began. **This term will be one of the most consequential in modern American history.** We will see how much of the agenda President Biden ran on will get passed in Congress. We will see how much power progressives can wield versus moderate Democrats. We will see to what extent extreme Republicans will stonewall the passage of crucial legislation.
**[I’m running for the House of Representatives because I believe our country needs strong, bold leaders to push back against the wave of fascism and fight for the brighter future we deserve. I rely on contributions to keep my campaign on a path to victory. Can I count on you to donate today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40546962/324844799/-210535405?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWY4ZTg2MS01ODcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C27VysriUx1veL1lfqpJq5x6uxGbYzQkYwIs3BWL2tQ=) **

**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40546963/324844800/-210535405?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWY4ZTg2MS01ODcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C27VysriUx1veL1lfqpJq5x6uxGbYzQkYwIs3BWL2tQ=)**

The American Congress is widely recognized as one of the strongest parliamentary systems in the world. **While we are not the birthplace of democracy, generations of Americans have worked hard to make our democracy strong, inclusive, and substantive.** We now face a turning point, one where we will see how strong our democracy is in the face of rising fascism and a Republican Party that is embracing increasingly authoritarian tactics.
**I’m running against one of those Republicans.** Now is not the time to tiptoe around the truth. **Jay Obernolte is a fascist, plain and simple.** He voted against the certification of the 2020 Presidential election results. He voted against the establishment of a commission to review and investigate the January 6th insurrection. He voted against the John Lewis Voting Rights Act, which was crafted to reinstate and expand protections around the right to vote.
**We may have gotten used to this behavior from Republicans, but votes like these signal at best, a blatant disregard for democratic ideals and at worst, welcome violence, suppression, and censorship into our system of governance.**
**[To defeat Obernolte, I need to shore up my resources so we can run the strongest possible race to challenge him. As a millionaire, Obernolte can dump his own personal wealth into his campaign. We rely on grassroots, individual donations from supporters like you. Will you chip in today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40546964/324844801/-210535405?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWY4ZTg2MS01ODcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C27VysriUx1veL1lfqpJq5x6uxGbYzQkYwIs3BWL2tQ=)**
**I’m an unapologetic progressive.** To my mind, progressive policies are precisely the balm we need to solve the massive inequalities in our society, inequalities that only serve to deepen the partisan divisions between us. **I am a strong believer in the idea that if we can dream it, we can win it.** That’s why I hope that in this 117th session of Congress, we will see Build Back Better passed. We will see Medicare for All. We will see a Green New Deal. **And when I get to the halls of Congress, I will make sure we fight for that better future. **
In solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23
* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40546970/324844805/-210535405?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWY4ZTg2MS01ODcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C27VysriUx1veL1lfqpJq5x6uxGbYzQkYwIs3BWL2tQ=)

these emails from us, please [click here to unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e61e7477-5772-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c/a1f8e861-5872-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWY4ZTg2MS01ODcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C27VysriUx1veL1lfqpJq5x6uxGbYzQkYwIs3BWL2tQ=&id=124407521).
clean_body: Peter, Today, the second session of the 117th Congress began. This term will be one of the most consequential in modern American history. We will see how much of the agenda President Biden ran on will get passed in Congress. We will see how much power progressives can wield versus moderate Democrats. We will see to what extent extreme Republicans will stonewall the passage of crucial legislation. = = The American Congress is widely recognized as one of the strongest parliamentary systems in the world. While we are not the birthplace of democracy, generations of Americans have worked hard to make our democracy strong, inclusive, and substantive. We now face a turning point, one where we will see how strong our democracy is in the face of rising fascism and a Republican Party that is embracing increasingly authoritarian tactics. I’m running against one of those Republicans. Now is not the time to tiptoe around the truth. Jay Obernolte is a fascist, plain and simple. He voted against the certification of the 2020 Presidential election results. He voted against the establishment of a commission to review and investigate the January 6th insurrection. He voted against the John Lewis Voting Rights Act, which was crafted to reinstate and expand protections around the right to vote. We may have gotten used to this behavior from Republicans, but votes like these signal at best, a blatant disregard for democratic ideals and at worst, welcome violence, suppression, and censorship into our system of governance. = I’m an unapologetic progressive. To my mind, progressive policies are precisely the balm we need to solve the massive inequalities in our society, inequalities that only serve to deepen the partisan divisions between us. I am a strong believer in the idea that if we can dream it, we can win it. That’s why I hope that in this 117th session of Congress, we will see Build Back Better passed. We will see Medicare for All. We will see a Green New Deal. And when I get to the halls of Congress, I will make sure we fight for that better future. In solidarity, Derek Marshall Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23 * = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • tel:\(760\ 486-2416)

name: Charlie Crist | Left Action
subject: To this day, Gov. DeSantis refuses to admit the 2020 election was legitimate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHARLIE CRIST, DEMOCRAT, FOR GOVERNOR
body:
that’s disqualifying and dangerous
| | | | |
---
| | | | | Folks, A year ago this month, a mob of insurrectionists stormed the U.S. Capitol, seeking to overturn the results of a fair and free election. They were incited by false claims that the 2020 presidential election was stolen, false claims that Gov. Ron DeSantis refuses to denounce. To this day, he still won’t admit the election was legitimate. In my view, this isn’t just disqualifying; it’s downright dangerous. [We need to take threats to our democracy seriously, so I’m asking 10,000 concerned Democrats to join me in calling on Gov. DeSantis to admit that the 2020 election was fair and democratic.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T338a8a18-8e63-4618-a17f-94416d536dd4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [Sign Your Name](https://default.salsalabs.org/T11127178-de94-46cd-a77e-3a8249c848fd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| As the tragic events of January 6th proved, claiming that a legitimate election was rigged isn’t a joke. These partisan lies lead to real-world harm, and there is no room in our state or our country for that kind of rhetoric. It’s well past time for Gov. DeSantis to put partisanship aside and reject the false claims that the 2020 election was stolen from Donald Trump. By supporting and spreading the Big Lie, he’s empowering the very same hate groups that fueled the insurrection, and I won’t stand for it. Floridians deserve better. [Please add your name to my petition demanding that the governor publicly reject the Big Lie. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5a69a41c-fa97-4ad0-ba53-abf91c64adc7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you, Charlie Crist
---

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Americans find this “British Bulldog”captivating
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD.
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmet2rv2sh5v3e7gg2pniulve0ngftq92esl4e1g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3gm1ob4cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zose62ih257lbnqle6b8ejstvkg9gd4etip5t448_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3gm1ob4cph2bs)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhm55c1re3bm5c67vmr1jvtj63ps8qfg2cpjbpu8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3gm1ob4cph2bs) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0jncbuva8ttttfq2icad4upooucetpcvhuqe108_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3gm1ob4cph2bs)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |
---

name: American Defense News
subject: Americans find this “British Bulldog”captivating
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zplgjvel52ntn5csvltvpcqf3mhj420na4bc4lp0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3gm1ob4cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tb66lq60sbnmkrb8t77mdr70p9ks8rb2ptlmpoj6odnmgrm8tb2e4q32db4mgrjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ap5jchjr4c36elib6p77m2qmash5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zukq58p0ehknkjbqr3uvfr8de5lidkag5hi9cgk8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3gm1ob4cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq0javp13qh6na8i8o3eso7aj03c4kv2772insjo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3gm1ob4cjh2bs)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z900qb0lsnjlpv005kfvddl1cesbbhrtfgvir3mo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3gm1ob4cjh2bs) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zogrh2bss14b5v3f8c3j87pk1v0jbkr1q6v6g5q0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3gm1ob4cjh2bs)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2zbil7gqbag5qp8gu6pdi47nu1gebdkcct6v87020).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z84j9aeq7t9p4vnivcefc9hmoalmsujujbukiimo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3gm1ob4cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Team Roe
subject: The results are in!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANN ROE FOR CONGRESS Ann Roe for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40547256/324846153/-766995749?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTE2MTk2MS01OTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6RW0_UkyTk8U2gLVsVX2toa8Ls5ua5DTU-DHxs6zuG4=&emci=14aa9d73-2372-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=71161961-5972-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15639879)

Hi team,

**We asked, and you answered.**

You might remember that last month we reached out to you because we wanted to know what issues WI voters wanted us to prioritize this year.

The responses we got were phenomenal and we want to say thank you for taking the time to speak up. This will help us immensely when it comes to knowing what our most important priorities should be.

**[But, before we share, could you chip in to support our efforts through the year? Your priorities matter, and we want to make sure that can can tackle all of them in 2022>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40547257/324846154/-1425244157?refcode=em22_220110_surveyresults&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTE2MTk2MS01OTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6RW0_UkyTk8U2gLVsVX2toa8Ls5ua5DTU-DHxs6zuG4=)**

Now we want to share with you the top issues folks voted on:

The four biggest issues you want us to address this year are **voting rights, climate change, gun violence prevention and healthcare.**
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40547258/324846155/-1425244157?refcode=em22_220110_surveyresults&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTE2MTk2MS01OTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6RW0_UkyTk8U2gLVsVX2toa8Ls5ua5DTU-DHxs6zuG4=)
---

Ann could not agree more with the results of this survey. We need to take immediate action to address these issues.

Let's start with voting rights: in states across the country, there have been sustained attacks on our right to vote. We must act to stop this, and when Ann is in Congress she will be working to expand voting rights not only in Wisconsin but in states across the country. **We cannot lose one of our fundamental rights as Americans.**

Each day we do not address the danger posed by climate change, the situation becomes more and more irreversible. We need a leader that will not be afraid of introducing bold legislation that will address the threat of climate change before it is too late. The very future of our planet hinges on the actions we take **_now._**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40547259/324846156/-1425244157?refcode=em22_220110_surveyresults&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTE2MTk2MS01OTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6RW0_UkyTk8U2gLVsVX2toa8Ls5ua5DTU-DHxs6zuG4=)
---

The average American family is struggling to make it through the day-to-day. We cannot keep ignoring the issues. There is too much at stake. Our communities and families need more jobs, better wages for our workers, quality health care, and education for our children. We need them now and we need someone in Congress who will make these issues a priority.

We appreciate the many diverse perspectives of Wisconsin voters, and Ann is ready to get to work to deliver for everyone.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40547260/324846157/-1425244157?refcode=em22_220110_surveyresults&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTE2MTk2MS01OTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6RW0_UkyTk8U2gLVsVX2toa8Ls5ua5DTU-DHxs6zuG4=)
---

The core essence of our democracy is threatened when we don't hold our leaders _accountable_ , and demand that they create the change our communities need. Steil has shown us time and time again that he is not the leader in Congress that the people of Wisconsin need him to be.

**We need a leader in Congress who will work hard to find the solutions and deliver results on the issues you care about most -- we know that Ann will be that leader.**

**[Can you chip in $5 to send Ann to Congress so she can tackle these issues and deliver for the people of Wisconsin's 1st district?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40547261/324846158/-1425244157?refcode=em22_220110_surveyresults&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTE2MTk2MS01OTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6RW0_UkyTk8U2gLVsVX2toa8Ls5ua5DTU-DHxs6zuG4=)**

subject: WTAS: U.S Senate Candidate Mike Gibbons Launches Statewide Bus Tour
body:
Check out what they are saying
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FMqhGyLtbob25aEbwKJd-h662LdcGFP0cbwbGetNE2B7P7uE-ggIsX2nlc5RGTngx_HfHKA98eiVhp5O8lC3Z13wbjBVycfFOae67I7IPLZu2feZbyJpAtj5og-as_vMA-a_RGySBFfg-RIyEkJYNrGPXKl75pYm429Mgy5T2-gCR9SDu3RkeA==&c=DpwSg_CJiDwx7uE1BmYMGnWgvn2ZrWdMPKXh_JEKFV7dzzi02W269A==&ch=yh6U3n1QLjiW8qxoxfADCV6-QHM0z20vDqG8BIINGZucOpRP1Ldz7g==)
---
| What They Are Saying: U.S Senate Candidate Mike Gibbons Launches Statewide Bus Tour
---
| U.S Senate candidate Mike Gibbons made several different stops at local businesses across Ohio during the launch week of his statewide bus tour. Gibbons discussed everything from economics and the national debt to being pro-life and against Critical Race Theory. He believes with his working class background and private sector experience he is the right choice to represent Ohio in Washington.

*** [Dayton 24/7 Now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FMqhGyLtbob25aEbwKJd-h662LdcGFP0cbwbGetNE2B7P7uE-ggIsRUZAPxIdU4JvvStCmmVt5BSk08u6GqK5B3vLjO2oFyK__Z4t2NcHCC9PAw-w4AmFfiLxGQbQ-clr6VyPp-2bYvzZ603wf0CjejpEPEGBSJ2wfo3_D2rpbdZxD0RKeNbk3UAp-Bb-jP_tgMpoREBiqlv7nsHC4Wp2uoceEzGcPQ_v6rlK6njZzAxh56_so-c4g==&c=DpwSg_CJiDwx7uE1BmYMGnWgvn2ZrWdMPKXh_JEKFV7dzzi02W269A==&ch=yh6U3n1QLjiW8qxoxfADCV6-QHM0z20vDqG8BIINGZucOpRP1Ldz7g==)
---
|
---
| "[Gibbons] said another difference between himself and other candidates in the field, 'I'm not interested in a career. I believe firmly in term limits. The founders wanted people to take the expertise they've built in the private sector to Washington. Apply it to the problems of the government and then come home and that's exactly what I intend to do.'"
*** [The Lima News](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FMqhGyLtbob25aEbwKJd-h662LdcGFP0cbwbGetNE2B7P7uE-ggIsRUZAPxIdU4JwmkJRYBlvQ2uCoWrUxfMQFstYkY5ExT57gW13ByIEq3VmGCt59DQWYujQUwx-3Gz7IvNAyZs3Y-msFIIQ-cSGZ4grseLXnlxZFPA-EdtRMhIWF0jrVzwxj_EWXWsSxWOHloxliIMIyrzmBM9lWoiMuaboXzIoaF9&c=DpwSg_CJiDwx7uE1BmYMGnWgvn2ZrWdMPKXh_JEKFV7dzzi02W269A==&ch=yh6U3n1QLjiW8qxoxfADCV6-QHM0z20vDqG8BIINGZucOpRP1Ldz7g==)
---
|
---
| "Gibbons believes what separates him from the rest of the Republican primary field is he isn't a lifetime politician. He says he just wants to guide the country back in the right direction for the good of future generations."
*** [Hometown Stations](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FMqhGyLtbob25aEbwKJd-h662LdcGFP0cbwbGetNE2B7P7uE-ggIsRUZAPxIdU4JAo3xK_5AUlwpcfM83rq125OtMJaY9sEUzQ6WQNeTN8tVlr47W25lvgoy9VG_GogneRdmkKm6YGbHoTH3_Z-R8pw7uKev6rENJdGvEEwo2BZnyV-bi7cGktHm9TqoB-KbeMvxfkvcBdYQnN9cLkJfc8CTTOjKMbiXyoIPJrtZpneWUvat3kQ7wlxbqfz8uu_frh_QPX8YmJtzUNrBunlSKPkybRKLNRPGTjoge6mynLpxZGs9Ffy04nyK7fWpMEGxGGITs8zSpVY=&c=DpwSg_CJiDwx7uE1BmYMGnWgvn2ZrWdMPKXh_JEKFV7dzzi02W269A==&ch=yh6U3n1QLjiW8qxoxfADCV6-QHM0z20vDqG8BIINGZucOpRP1Ldz7g==)
---
|
---
| "[Mike Gibbons](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FMqhGyLtbob25aEbwKJd-h662LdcGFP0cbwbGetNE2B7P7uE-ggIsR2Uaec9KM1lxDD2vhKLjpIPDa8522wfRWLb20v2xQsGxAvY4kYtLB_C8jjFeWUXmbNfRNWrGMfTlEyaVb-1mJoWMwE4kkdV8snI9NRWQC5o&c=DpwSg_CJiDwx7uE1BmYMGnWgvn2ZrWdMPKXh_JEKFV7dzzi02W269A==&ch=yh6U3n1QLjiW8qxoxfADCV6-QHM0z20vDqG8BIINGZucOpRP1Ldz7g==) was in town campaigning for his chance to go to Washington...He spoke to voters about his upbringing, and how he is a successful businessman, but also is a pro-life, second amendment supporting Republican who believes in defending the border, and is concerned with the left who believes he is the right fit for the job."
*** [Daily Advocate](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FMqhGyLtbob25aEbwKJd-h662LdcGFP0cbwbGetNE2B7P7uE-ggIsRUZAPxIdU4JNAMEP_nDE0hsiCHIEuZCH5O7Uc4shcaKwLevO3wJLb2pisj_BuLZYSgDCfURVbJOQ-_yBYhoepbBlfZ0JuiGqWZgs7QZnvwVUza06n11AAIFp8KJaPq4dc05x9zwMjUjzzqBq42HEWSxC-ROl-REW6NmyS1IzEw5OPpEcCRD_2Y=&c=DpwSg_CJiDwx7uE1BmYMGnWgvn2ZrWdMPKXh_JEKFV7dzzi02W269A==&ch=yh6U3n1QLjiW8qxoxfADCV6-QHM0z20vDqG8BIINGZucOpRP1Ldz7g==)
---
|
---
|
"Republican Mike Gibbons, who is running for the U.S. Senate seat soon to be vacated by Rob Portman, is on an 88-county tour of Ohio. On Jan. 6, he stopped at Montage Cafe in Greenville, to speak to voters about his platform, and answer questions."
*** [B](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FMqhGyLtbob25aEbwKJd-h662LdcGFP0cbwbGetNE2B7P7uE-ggIsRUZAPxIdU4JEM9qifnFUBF-zmAMnSGg6vcTxd9qKr7ds-8sXffyyGE5xMkjrxUVZlyCD-2ijrHs5e7aynhweV9KEVc4TaVbtMvr-ahGvLTeVu1wNIcm8gpY1366uddJ_YMRFj6KkBXPef-LdIsx0Spn6v_gu60S3yplrS0VzvkbF4euP3bqI6fAzPOXq4ol8A==&c=DpwSg_CJiDwx7uE1BmYMGnWgvn2ZrWdMPKXh_JEKFV7dzzi02W269A==&ch=yh6U3n1QLjiW8qxoxfADCV6-QHM0z20vDqG8BIINGZucOpRP1Ldz7g==)[ob Frantz Show](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FMqhGyLtbob25aEbwKJd-h662LdcGFP0cbwbGetNE2B7P7uE-ggIsRUZAPxIdU4JEM9qifnFUBF-zmAMnSGg6vcTxd9qKr7ds-8sXffyyGE5xMkjrxUVZlyCD-2ijrHs5e7aynhweV9KEVc4TaVbtMvr-ahGvLTeVu1wNIcm8gpY1366uddJ_YMRFj6KkBXPef-LdIsx0Spn6v_gu60S3yplrS0VzvkbF4euP3bqI6fAzPOXq4ol8A==&c=DpwSg_CJiDwx7uE1BmYMGnWgvn2ZrWdMPKXh_JEKFV7dzzi02W269A==&ch=yh6U3n1QLjiW8qxoxfADCV6-QHM0z20vDqG8BIINGZucOpRP1Ldz7g==)
"Always Right" with Mike Gibbons Discussing Senate Campaign
"The goal of trying to get elected requires you to go out and find those people that may not be interested in every word that comes out of your mouth. But, you have to know what you're made up of and what you stand for and what you believe in. So that's the idea here, and we're starting it in Parma, that's where I grew up."

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: We are looking for 25,000 people to step up and say they endorse Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign before Trump arrives for his rally this week. Can you add your name?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Donald Trump is coming back to Arizona this week. It’s the latest in his effort to flip Arizona in 2022, which could make it more likely he runs in 2024.
#

Friends —
We are looking for 25,000 people to step up and say they endorse Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign before Trump arrives for a rally this weekend.
Use this link to add your name:
[**Add your name to say you endorse Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign in Arizona.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-jan?source=em220110-1-7&t=1&akid=1916%2E6688874%2EvlliuI)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-jan?source=em220110-1-7&t=2&akid=1916%2E6688874%2EvlliuI)**
As you know, Donald Trump is coming back to Arizona this Saturday. It’s his latest effort to flip Arizona in 2022, which could make it more likely he runs in 2024.
But while our Republican opponents have been trying to out-Trump each other to earn his support, Mark is laser-focused on delivering for Arizonans and running a grassroots campaign that speaks to all voters.
That’s why we’re running this personal endorsement campaign this week. We are looking for 25,000 sign ups because that FAR exceeds the number of people who attended Trump’s last rally in Arizona.
So please — help us reach our goal. It’d be great if we could do it by midnight tonight.
[**Please use this link to add your name and say you endorse Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona. Help us reach 25,000 endorsers before Trump arrives.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-jan?source=em220110-1-7&t=3&akid=1916%2E6688874%2EvlliuI)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-jan?source=em220110-1-7&t=4&akid=1916%2E6688874%2EvlliuI)**
It’s hard to believe an act as simple as saying you support Mark could be so important, but it is. So, thank you.
Team Kelly

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history.
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl4c3n0k0e0s4j35a4vl4aaas276rorq8qtnp2bo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3im0oj4cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2e9skhc42i8jonv3bdocau59l1somiglj7m7vio_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3im0oj4cth2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2m0c1p49jccb4ch40sev5kub4vi92mvj2m4dr60_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3im0oj4cth2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Fwd: Today's anniversary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Friend – to all of you who spoke out for our democracy on the anniversary of the Jan. 6 Capitol insurrection, thank you.

Sadly, on the first anniversary of one of the darkest days for our country, Republicans at all levels doubled down on their extremism and allegiance to the man who incited the insurrection: Donald Trump.

Mitch McConnell released a partisan statement attacking Democrats rather than condemning Trump. The House Republican leader did the same.

Donald Trump himself attacked President Biden while continuing to spread the lies and dangerous rhetoric that led to the insurrection itself.

And across the country, Republicans are continuing an all-out assault on voting rights – introducing several hundred pieces of legislation to suppress the right to vote. That's why Senate Democrats are pushing harder than ever to pass federal legislation to protect the right to vote, and it's why I'm once again asking for your grassroots support in making it possible.

Please, in the wake of Republican obstruction one year on from the Jan. 6 Capitol insurrection, make your voice heard: If you believe the Senate should protect our democracy by eliminating the filibuster to pass voting rights legislation, click here to add your voice right now.

https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-0721voting?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1120-su-nd

Thank you,

Dick

From: Richard Blumenthal
Date: Thu, Jan 6, 2022
Subject: Today's anniversary and what we're fighting for

Friend,

One year ago today, on January 6, 2021, our country experienced an assault on the heart of our democracy unlike any other – an armed, violent insurrection at the Capitol incited by then-President of the United States Donald Trump.

I'll never forget the scenes from that day. They still make me sick to my stomach. Mobs swarming the Capitol, violently attacking, overwhelming, and injuring Capitol Police. Desecrating and damaging the building garbed in their red MAGA hats and carrying Trump flags. They hung nooses. Some wore antisemitic clothing. They personally threatened duly elected members of our representative democracy – including Trump's own Vice President. Collectively, they were there to do Trump's bidding: overturn a free and fair election, and usurp our democratic institutions.

But Congress persisted. After the Capitol was cleared, we returned to the Senate and certified Joe Biden as the President of the United States of America. Democracy was severely damaged that day, but, in the end, it won.

In the days and months that followed, the Republican Party did not distance itself from Donald Trump but rather consolidated around him and emboldened his anti-democratic impulses. A majority of Republican members of Congress refused to certify Joe Biden as President. A majority of Republican members of Congress voted against the bipartisan Select Committee to Investigate the January 6th Attack on the United States Capitol to uncover the full truth behind Jan. 6. A majority of Republicans across the country have pushed Trump's Big Lie as a means to institute dangerous voter suppression laws.

Today, on the one-year anniversary of this attack on our system of government, Senate Democrats are fighting to strengthen democracy. With zero Republican support, we are voting to pass legislation to put a stop to Trump-led voter suppression that's already succeeded in passing 34 restrictive voting laws in 19 states.

Voting is the bedrock of our democratic republic – and any so-called public servant who makes it harder to vote does our country and our people no service at all. But the people will win. Democracy will win. That's why, on today's anniversary, I need a showing of Democratic activism unlike any other – I need 25,000 supporters, including you:

If you believe the Senate should protect our democracy by eliminating the filibuster to pass voting rights legislation, click here to add your voice right now.

https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-0721voting?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1120-su-nd

We cannot allow Donald Trump and his party to continue their attacks on our democratic institutions. The greatest single thing we can do is guarantee voters' access to the polls. So please, add your name before my 11:59 p.m. deadline.

January 6, 2021 was one of the darkest days our country has ever experienced. But it also reminded us that democracy is fragile. It taught us that words and representation of the American people matter immensely. And today reminds us that we must continue fighting, with everything we have, to protect our democracy. Thank you for doing your part.

Dick

--

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here:

http://action.richardblumenthal.com/p/salsa/supporter/unsubscribe/public/index.sjs?unsubscribe_page_KEY=550&Email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&email_blast_KEY=1408326

Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

Republicans are eager to get Sara out of Congress because they know she is a strong progressive advocate on issues like making the expanded Child Tax Credit permanent, passing the Green New Deal, and lowering prescription drug prices. = | = We need to send a strong message to Republicans that Sara is here to advocate for her constituents, and she’s not going anywhere. name: Defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: BREAKING: Marjorie Taylor Greene Accuses Government of ‘Murder’ Over Witholding Ivermectin for COVID
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]Hi, did you see the email Marcus sent yesterday?
Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently banned from Twitter for spreading disinformation about COVID-19 and putting her followers at severe risk.
We welcome her removal from Twitter -- but the next step is to remove her from office. Can you donate $20 or more now to help us do just that? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
Marcus Flowers is a Veteran, a patriot, and a Democrat -- and he’ll restore honor and integrity to Congress.
Thanks for your support.
---- Begin forwarded message ----
From: Marcus Flowers <info@marcusforgeorgia.com>
Subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene was permanently suspended from Twitter
Sent on Sunday, January 2, 2022 at 1:05 p.m.
It’s official: Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently suspended from Twitter.
She deserved to be removed from the platform because of her dangerous incitements to violence and reckless spreading of harmful disinformation.
But here’s the thing: Our goal was never to get Marjorie Taylor Greene removed from Twitter. Our goal is to remove her from Congress.
I’m a Veteran, a Democrat, and I believe that the people of Georgia’s 14th District deserve so much better than Marjorie Taylor Greene. That’s why I’m running to unseat her in 2022.
So I have to ask: Will you join me in the fight to remove her from Congress by donating $20 or more to my campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
DONATE NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
Marjorie Taylor Greene has been removed from Twitter -- that’s a good thing. But let’s not pretend that was our goal. We have to remove her from office.
Thanks for fighting with me,
Marcus Flowers
Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
Marcus for Georgia
PO Box 532
Rome, GA 30162
United States

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Our BEST chance
body:
We’re facing tough battles in 2022, and the truth is: If we want to expand our Majority and ensure our progressive values are protected from Republican attacks, we need your help to flip governor’s offices. We have a huge opportunity to do that in Maryland – if we can elect Tom Perez.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40548640/324853360/-999108642?refcode=bpi-email-LaunchEmaillogo&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjhmZTRhNS02MDcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gDHgypiZK7ZjBuxCQeWxYWR1skorEk-MgHAvSWgjkEQ=)

Peter,

I value your time, so I’ll make this quick. Republicans across the country are pulling out all the stops to reclaim what they lost in 2020 – introducing a record 400 voter suppression bills to silence the people and spending millions to spread misinformation and threaten our Majority.

We’re facing tough battles in 2022, and the truth is: If we want to expand our Majority and ensure our progressive values are protected from Republican attacks, we need your help to flip governor’s offices. **We have a huge opportunity to do that in Maryland – if we can elect Tom Perez.**

**[Tom is a tireless fighter for the people, and I’m proud to endorse him. Now, in less than 48 hours, Tom is facing his first public filing deadline: Will you chip in $10, or whatever you can, to power Tom’s campaign and help send him to Annapolis to fight for our progressive values?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40548642/324853361/-1884169283?refcode=bpi-em-20220110-Filing-Deadline-4-ND&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjhmZTRhNS02MDcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gDHgypiZK7ZjBuxCQeWxYWR1skorEk-MgHAvSWgjkEQ=)**

---
I worked closely with Tom when he led President Obama’s Labor Department, the Justice Department’s Civil Rights Division and the Democratic National Committee, so trust me when I say that he will be the leader Maryland needs to push for progressive change and deliver. Tom is a compassionate leader, a great listener, and someone who isn’t afraid to do the hard work governing requires.

I know that if Marylanders elect Tom, he’ll uphold our shared values – ensuring health care is affordable, workers have a voice, justice is equal under the law, and education is accessible for Maryland’s kids regardless of ZIP code.

**Unfortunately, sending Tom to Annapolis won’t be easy. His race is a “TOSS-UP”, and Marylanders have elected Republicans to the governor’s office in three out of the last five elections.**

**_[So, I’m asking: Please chip in what you can to support Tom’s campaign and flip Maryland from red to blue. Grassroots supporters like you won us the House, the Senate, and the White House – and you’re what will make the difference in this race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40548659/324853377/-1884169283?refcode=bpi-em-20220110-Filing-Deadline-4-ND&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjhmZTRhNS02MDcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gDHgypiZK7ZjBuxCQeWxYWR1skorEk-MgHAvSWgjkEQ=)_**

Thank you for your support,

Speaker Nancy Pelosi

name: Team Gearing
subject: Need a sign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas
body:
Peter -
The newest batch of Gearing for Texas yard signs are here and ready to be delivered across the 114th District!
Need a sign for your yard? Secure your sign by chipping in $25 or more today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingsigns]

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90675/images/Gearing_Dem_v6.jpg]We’ve been out talking to voters across the 114th District on their doorsteps about Charlie’s vision to build a Better Texas for everyone, and Texans are fired up about this campaign.

Our neighbors are ready to elect strong leaders like Charlie who will go to Austin and work hard on the issues that impact us most here at home. They know Charlie will fight to restore reproductive rights and equality for Texas women (reminder- Charlie is endorsed by Wendy Davis! ), fix our power grid with more renewable energy, fund and defend our public schools, teachers, and students, work to ensure every Texan can afford to see a doctor, and stand up to the bullying of transgender and LGBTQ+ Texans from their legislators.

Show everyone that you're on Team Gearing by getting a sign for your yard today >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingsigns]

Together we can win this race,

- Team Gearing

Charlie Gearing is a born and raised North Texan running for Texas House District 114 in East Dallas. He believes we need to fight for the things that matter to Texas families – investing in our teachers and students, creating good-paying jobs, expanding Medicaid, holding ERCOT accountable, restoring voting rights, and rolling back dangerous abortion restrictions.
Donate Now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]Learn more at gearingfortexas.com [https://www.gearingfortexas.com/?]

Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas
Charlie Gearing for Texas
10440 N. Central Expressway Suite 1400 Dallas, TX 75231

https://www.facebook.com/gearingfortexas [https://www.facebook.com/gearingfortexas] https://twitter.com/gearingfortexas [https://twitter.com/gearingfortexas] https://instagram.com/gearingfortexas [https://instagram.com/gearingfortexas] campaign@gearingfortexas.com [campaign@gearingfortexas.com]

name: Alex Stovall
subject: I’m getting attacked for being a black conservative
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ALEX FOR CONGRESS**
body:
I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs cripple the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes. | Hey Fellow Conservative,

My name is Alex Stovall and I'm running for Congress in Arizona’s 9th Congressional District. I’m a twenty-six-year-old black conservative and I’m the left’s worst nightmare and let me explain why...

I grew up on government assistance and moved over 50 times in Arizona alone. **I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs _cripple_ the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes.**

Enough is enough. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Kevin McCarthy’s threat today against me
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
I want to preface this article headline I’m about to share with you with a caveat: Breitbart is a race-bating, despicable mouthpiece for the far-right and those looking to harness the anger of those on the fringes of politics. That being said... and maybe for that reason, Kevin McCarthy just did an exclusive interview with them. In the interview, McCarthy once again threatened to strip me of my committee assignments in Congress if Republicans win a majority. **Kevin McCarthy Plans to Strip Ilhan Omar off Foreign Affairs, Eric Swalwell and Adam Schiff off Intelligence Committee** Here’s the thing, Derek – this may be little more than McCarthy’s usual craven appeal to his base, but it is nonetheless a serious threat. If Donald Trump demands he do something, Kevin does it. And Trump believes that no one has done more to hold him accountable, or was more of a force in bringing about his impeachment than I was. (And I’m proud of it.) This is yet another reason why a Republican majority must never happen. McCarthy knows that I will never shy away from my committee oversight responsibilities. That I will always stand up to him, and expose his duplicity to the American people. But there is a far bigger concern than what McCarthy would do to remove Democrats from their committee assignments in an attempt to undermine accountability, and that is this: He will vote to overturn the next presidential election if Trump loses again. **We cannot – and I cannot express this enough – allow Kevin McCarthy to hold the Speaker's Gavel. We just can’t. We cannot allow the GOP to take the House. It would spell disaster.** **If you can, please pitch in anything meaningful to you right now to my re-election campaign. I am going to throw all my weight to ensure I hold my seat in Congress and help Democrats across the country win. body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/6GrdLViB0VimausNFBtgmuQyxc4Z_XmnNRfELvtl1lU=/czZz562_KbE6xk5QgszsspRG4o_vEnk2F47ktE1egZw=?refcode=E13391-20220110-FosterDogs-header-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) | Hi Peter, My team and I have been sending you lots of updates on what we're working on for our 2022 campaign strategy. But I also wanted to share a different type of report: our 2021 Year in Review of... Dogs! As you know, my wife Pam and I are huge dog lovers. And this past year we were able to watch 10 different pups. Just take a look at these furballs: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/6GrdLViB0VimausNFBtgmuQyxc4Z_XmnNRfELvtl1lU=/czZz562_KbE6xk5QgszsspRG4o_vEnk2F47ktE1egZw=?refcode=E13391-20220110-FosterDogs-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) If you're an animal lover like me, you know how much joy and companionship dogs provide. And if you've ever considered getting involved with a local animal shelter, I couldn't recommend it more highly. Pam and I have had so many laughs the past few years with our rotating cast of 4-legged house guests. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/6GrdLViB0VimausNFBtgmuQyxc4Z_XmnNRfELvtl1lU=/czZz562_KbE6xk5QgszsspRG4o_vEnk2F47ktE1egZw=?refcode=E13391-20220110-FosterDogs-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) And while I have you, if you have a second and can chip into our re-election fund, we'd really appreciate it. Is he crazy or just stupid? The numbers are conclusive, and the fraudulent and irregular votes are massive. The only reason he did this is because he got my endorsement and easily won his state in 2020, so now he thinks he has time, and those are the only ones, the weak, who will break away. The Radical Left Democrats and RINOS, like “Senator” Mike Rounds, do not make it easy for our Country to succeed. He is a weak and ineffective leader, and I hereby firmly pledge that he will never receive my Endorsement again! |

body:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeff?=
subject: A Friendly Reminder
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress
body:
Come, Learn & Make A Difference | | | |
---
|
# **Newsletter-January Vol. 2, #1**
---
| | |
## 10 January 22
**Just A Friendly Reminder - It's Time To Volunteer** In just under 10 months, we'll know the general election results.

Whether you're local or across the nation, there is much that needs to be accomplished-in person or virtual.

The campaign will be holding a series of virtual volunteer interest gatherings. Each will be around 30 minutes. Please attend and invite others to restore their Constitutional power. Remember, those who govern do so at the consent of the governed (that's us) in America. It's time to make a _real _difference. Keep in mind, you are not committing to volunteering, you are simply getting information to decide if you want to volunteer and how much you'd like to volunteer. Who can you invite?
**The Next Zoom Volunteer Interest Opportunity** Tuesday, Jan 11
7-8p The Zoom Link
**[https://us02web.zoom.us/j/87519135219](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=1b6dac0f2b&e=12a37459a2)**
Please do not post the zoom link on social media. **Meet & Greets** The campaign has been hosting virtual and in-person Meet & Greets with Jeff. Who do you know that shares our concern for the Country? Consider inviting them to meet Jeff and learn how they can make difference.
**[Email Us For More Info](mailto:Info@JeffWarnerForCongress.com?subject=Meet%20%26%20Greets)**

**[Donate Here](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=8d3cf26e1b&e=12a37459a2) **and Thank You For Your Amazing Support!

Remember, Jeff is standing with you and for you. Enough is Enough! Together, "We The People" can make a real difference. Now is our time to act. There is hope.

Please share this newsletter with others.

Standing with you,

Jeff
---
| [Jeff Warner For Congress Website](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=59f1dec890&e=12a37459a2 "Jeff Warner For Congress Website")
---
|
---

P.O. Box 634 Greenbelt, MD 20768

[info@jeffwarnerforcongress.com](mailto: info@jeffwarnerforcongress.com)

You can [update your preferences](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=e50c016c4c&e=12a37459a2&c=4bf83cd21b) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=e50c016c4c&e=12a37459a2&c=4bf83cd21b).
