name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Studying his accomplishments is needed
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD. Tho
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z0ahqsp501s0ik570m61ar90jocjnf2k23qnd7v8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3imco74cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zsm06nsrh5lek98s5m8uqfa5gsjv2q30g070jom0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3imco74cjh2bs)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zqisjckn9lsha74bp3n34iuit8nu71jo18sdo9d0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3imco74cjh2bs) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zfn6sra6ssc4oj2q6hh02t0aolpuaoipenjnlir0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3imco74cjh2bs)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Add your name: urgent opportunity to protect voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
The right to vote is fundamental to our democracy.
#
Peter,
Tomorrow, President Biden and Vice President Harris will be in Atlanta to discuss the immediate need for federal legislation to protect our fundamental right to vote.
**[We have an opening to finally pass voting rights legislation through the U.S. Senate and your voice could help make the difference. Add your name now to call for legislation protecting voting rights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40549899/324858312/1204330959?ms=dd_em_220110_1&refcode=dd_em_220110_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmNiMzZjYS02NjcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YoGMBmLwSJUxxHZ7LrxUdWrhyg9X3dos1C4G0RlW7iU=&emci=b62f0663-5a72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=3fcb36ca-6672-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=2727974)**
The right to vote is fundamental to our democracy. It shouldn’t be a partisan battle.
Yet, we are witnessing a nationwide attack on voting rights. In the last year alone, many Republican-led legislatures enacted laws to make it harder for Americans – especially people of color – to vote.
Federal action is necessary to stop these discriminatory state laws that infringe on Americans’ ability to participate freely in our elections.
**[Tell the Senate to act. Add your name now to support voting rights legislation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40549900/324858313/1204330959?ms=dd_em_220110_1&refcode=dd_em_220110_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmNiMzZjYS02NjcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YoGMBmLwSJUxxHZ7LrxUdWrhyg9X3dos1C4G0RlW7iU=&emci=b62f0663-5a72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=3fcb36ca-6672-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=2727974)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

**[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40549901/324858314/1204330959?ms=dd_em_220110_1&refcode=dd_em_220110_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmNiMzZjYS02NjcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YoGMBmLwSJUxxHZ7LrxUdWrhyg9X3dos1C4G0RlW7iU=&emci=b62f0663-5a72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=3fcb36ca-6672-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=2727974)**

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Let’s not kid ourselves
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Now that Ron Johnson is running for re-election, let me reintroduce myself:

My name is Sarah Godlewski, and I’m a Democrat running for the United States Senate. As a fifth-generation Wisconsinite from Eau Claire, State Treasurer, working mom, daughter of two public school teachers, and product of a proud union home, I couldn’t be more different than Ron Johnson.

You see, I didn’t run for public office for fame, money, or power. I first ran because politicians like Scott Walker slammed the door on working families. I believed Wisconsinites deserved to have someone fighting for their best interests, not bending to the will of wealthy donors and corporate interests.

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate because Ron Johnson has given up on working families. We need someone who will fight for the kitchen-table issues that matter most — like guaranteed paid leave, lower prescription drug costs, affordable child care, good-paying union jobs, the right to vote, and an economy that works for everyone. That’s why I’m in this fight.

[**It’s time to return this seat to the people of Wisconsin and elect a U.S. Senator who will actually get things done for workers and families. That’s why I’m humbly asking you to consider chipping in to support our campaign. We can defeat Ron Johnson and flip this seat blue, but our work must start now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40549942/324858467/1928095881?refcode=em22_220110_rojo2_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220110_rojo2_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWI1Y2FmZC02NjcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pQrrqnQw0ck6NUYGgTcUZmaWjmUWuspI8Fz3v09YQMw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$10**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40549943/324858468/1928095881?refcode=em22_220110_rojo2_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220110_rojo2_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWI1Y2FmZC02NjcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pQrrqnQw0ck6NUYGgTcUZmaWjmUWuspI8Fz3v09YQMw=)

Look, it’s no secret that Ron Johnson is the most vulnerable Republican Senator up for re-election, making Wisconsin the Democrats' best chance to flip a Senate seat. But let's not kid ourselves — this race won't be easy and midterm elections are historically tough for Democrats.

The good news is I have a track record of taking on powerful Republicans and running successful statewide campaigns in Wisconsin.**I’m also the only Democrat beating Ron Johnson in the latest poll of our race: 48%–46%.**

The bad news is Mitch McConnell and his dark money network will pour millions into our race to attack our campaign and protect Ron Johnson. It’s going to be a lot to compete with, and even more to overcome, but this incredible grassroots team has what it takes to fight back.

I’m not accepting any corporate PAC money in this campaign — never have, never will. Instead, our work relies on people just like you who give a few dollars at a time because they believe in what we’re building together.

[**Now that Ron Johnson has entered the race, there’s never been a more important time to give. Our state and our country deserve a better U.S. Senator. With your help, we’ll get one. Chip in any amount meaningful to you to help us flip this Senate seat from red to blue:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40549949/324858474/1928095881?refcode=em22_220110_rojo2_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220110_rojo2_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWI1Y2FmZC02NjcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pQrrqnQw0ck6NUYGgTcUZmaWjmUWuspI8Fz3v09YQMw=)

Tens of thousands of people — the vast majority of them living right here in Wisconsin — have contributed to our campaign in recent months, and it has meant the world to me. Together, we are proving that a campaign run the right way can compete and win.

I’m ready to take on Ron Johnson in November, but no one can win an election on their own. Your help and involvement could not be more essential, and your contributions truly make all of our efforts to win this seat possible. That's why I’m so grateful to have you as part of our team.

clean_body: Now that Ron Johnson is running for re-election, let me reintroduce myself: My name is Sarah Godlewski, and I’m a Democrat running for the United States Senate. As a fifth-generation Wisconsinite from Eau Claire, State Treasurer, working mom, daughter of two public school teachers, and product of a proud union home, I couldn’t be more different than Ron Johnson. You see, I didn’t run for public office for fame, money, or power. I first ran because politicians like Scott Walker slammed the door on working families. I believed Wisconsinites deserved to have someone fighting for their best interests, not bending to the will of wealthy donors and corporate interests. I decided to run for the U.S. Senate because Ron Johnson has given up on working families. We need someone who will fight for the kitchen-table issues that matter most — like guaranteed paid leave, lower prescription drug costs, affordable child care, good-paying union jobs, the right to vote, and an economy that works for everyone. name: Great America Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6755%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=4WD7JasaDsIhhMuCQwCXGA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69656%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dHGb1htnoOUkXD6x1D8GqQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69657%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JT7TXb1UqcHS1ORh2uPhKg&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69658%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7jEnRrdNPdYZ2swm9wHkng&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

Hello,
If you voted for Chuck Grassley the first time he ran for office, you’d have to be at least 87-years-old. That’s how long Senator Chuck Grassley has been a politician.
And over his several-decades-long career, Grassley has taken millions of dollars in campaign contributions from corporate PACs and special interests. Wall Street, Big Pharma, insurance companies, the NRA... you name it, he’s taken their money.
**Democrat Admiral Mike Franken is running against Chuck Grassley for Senate in Iowa, and the latest polling shows he can win: Just 27% of Iowa voters want to reelect Grassley this November!**
But Mike’s not taking corporate PAC money. If he’s going to go up against Grassley and McConnell’s millions and win, he’s relying on grassroots donors like you to give instead.
**We’re facing a critical fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, but right now, we’re still very short of our $50,000 goal and what Mike needs to win. If we’re going to hit our goal and turn Iowa blue, Mike is counting on you to give right now:**

clean_body: Hello, If you voted for Chuck Grassley the first time he ran for office, you’d have to be at least 87-years-old. That’s how long Senator Chuck Grassley has been a politician. And over his several-decades-long career, Grassley has taken millions of dollars in campaign contributions from corporate PACs and special interests. Wall Street, Big Pharma, insurance companies, the NRA... you name it, he’s taken their money. Democrat Admiral Mike Franken is running against Chuck Grassley for Senate in Iowa, and the latest polling shows he can win: Just 27% of Iowa voters want to reelect Grassley this November! But Mike’s not taking corporate PAC money. If he’s going to go up against Grassley and McConnell’s millions and win, he’s relying on grassroots donors like you to give instead. We’re facing a critical fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, but right now, we’re still very short of our $50,000 goal and what Mike needs to win. subject: SEAL PAC Endorses Amanda Makki for CD 13
body:
U.S. Navy Veterans Group Supports Amanda Makki | | | | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=de05d161f5&e=c2296cffff)
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=2515cea688&e=c2296cffff)
---
|
---
|
---
| [Contribute to Amanda Now!](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=8b854bd2b5&e=c2296cffff "Contribute to Amanda Now!")
---
| Hi Friend,

This week is off to an incredible start! SEAL PAC just announced its support for Amanda Makki in the race for Florida's 13th District. SEAL PAC is committed to supporting and electing conservative leaders.

SEAL PAC is chaired by veteran U.S. Navy SEAL Team Six Commander Ryan Zinke. Zinke served as United States Secretary of the Interior in the Trump administration.

**“Amanda’s experience, impeccable character, and proven good judgment are exactly what we need in Congress,” said SEAL PAC Chairman Ryan Zinke. “Amanda’s dedication to our country in the weeks after 9-11 when she served in the U.S. Army General Counsel's Office is a testament to her resolve to put her country first. We know she’ll bring the same level of dedication to the people of Pinellas County.”

“I am honored to have the support of SEAL PAC in this race. I am grateful for their recognition of my lifelong conservative track record and commitment to public service,” Makki said in response to SEAL PAC’s endorsement. “I have never wavered in my commitment to fight for our veterans.”**

The momentum behind Amanda Makki is growing at an unbelievable rate. Amanda won the Conservative Grounds straw poll with a whopping 68% of the vote! She returned to the national spotlight this morning for a live interview with Ed Henry on Real America's Voice at the famous coffee shop.

See you on the trail!

Team Makki

Catch up with Amanda Makki! Check out these links:
* [Where Amanda Stands on the Issues](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=3eb760a376&e=c2296cffff)
* [Amanda's Endorsements](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=f85dadb6d1&e=c2296cffff)
* [Amanda In the News](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=adcf7da87c&e=c2296cffff)

* [Amanda In the Communit](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=3b3c6df24b&e=c2296cffff)[y](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=2a11cc0819&e=c2296cffff)

Amanda Makki discussed her work to help Trump with the Wisconsin re-count and what she did to fight Obamacare in Washington. As the only lifelong conservative in the race for FL-13, Amanda is never afraid to discuss the issues.

name: Sheriff Joe Lombardo
subject: Nevada needs law enforcement leadership
body:
Those who know me know that I’ve spent my entire life focused on keeping communities safe - for the last 30+ years, I’ve been doing just that as a proud law enforcement officer.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aDuP0jBx6p-V_xYJu_RYvScgL-nsfhHi4hzUngpPhBhmCPqxKjmQzcgWDIR7frC2dzmCLAOTKvStqA3E0YIyrvLgA3xovh5lH3JVFw5nQ1u1fxT-cXY7YeYdmlDq5d7HRB1vkZAc_s7SzsaIoOkkGDFGQLIsIBWI8Wx1mjGfj4y84lf_OCwXQ6Bg1FTkF92xviOk5LkKiwcm0QIeJz1Uz8BkhfHRzSDRlhkPCr7fxRM=&c=NmJXxnUUzcYSwlT_iFBNNWcJwzLuNsRBK2Yo2ltW74fSoNh_fBpgcA==&ch=aH-kaltniA84UWeHG2g0SoopCL9JZNmbGugMcpnUWfdyFe0QnHREdg==)
---
|
---
| Peter,
Those who know me know that I've spent my entire life focused on keeping communities safe - for the last 30+ years, I've been doing just that as a proud law enforcement officer. The feeling of making a positive difference and protecting innocent lives is as rewarding as it gets.
But that's exactly why I personally know that the recent threats to public safety from liberal politicians are dangerous to Nevada families. Public safety is at risk with their upside down policies.
That's why I'm setting out to change things in this great state with a run for Governor - [will you help me bring law enforcement leadership to Nevada this year to help ensure our safety?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aDuP0jBx6p-V_xYJu_RYvScgL-nsfhHi4hzUngpPhBhmCPqxKjmQzcgWDIR7frC2dzmCLAOTKvStqA3E0YIyrvLgA3xovh5lH3JVFw5nQ1u1fxT-cXY7YeYdmlDq5d7HRB1vkZAc_s7SzsaIoOkkGDFGQLIsIBWI8Wx1mjGfj4y84lf_OCwXQ6Bg1FTkF92xviOk5LkKiwcm0QIeJz1Uz8BkhfHRzSDRlhkPCr7fxRM=&c=NmJXxnUUzcYSwlT_iFBNNWcJwzLuNsRBK2Yo2ltW74fSoNh_fBpgcA==&ch=aH-kaltniA84UWeHG2g0SoopCL9JZNmbGugMcpnUWfdyFe0QnHREdg==)
---
| | | [SUPPORT THE MISSION](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aDuP0jBx6p-V_xYJu_RYvScgL-nsfhHi4hzUngpPhBhmCPqxKjmQzcgWDIR7frC2dzmCLAOTKvStqA3E0YIyrvLgA3xovh5lH3JVFw5nQ1u1fxT-cXY7YeYdmlDq5d7HRB1vkZAc_s7SzsaIoOkkGDFGQLIsIBWI8Wx1mjGfj4y84lf_OCwXQ6Bg1FTkF92xviOk5LkKiwcm0QIeJz1Uz8BkhfHRzSDRlhkPCr7fxRM=&c=NmJXxnUUzcYSwlT_iFBNNWcJwzLuNsRBK2Yo2ltW74fSoNh_fBpgcA==&ch=aH-kaltniA84UWeHG2g0SoopCL9JZNmbGugMcpnUWfdyFe0QnHREdg==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aDuP0jBx6p-V_xYJu_RYvScgL-nsfhHi4hzUngpPhBhmCPqxKjmQzcgWDIR7frC2dzmCLAOTKvStqA3E0YIyrvLgA3xovh5lH3JVFw5nQ1u1fxT-cXY7YeYdmlDq5d7HRB1vkZAc_s7SzsaIoOkkGDFGQLIsIBWI8Wx1mjGfj4y84lf_OCwXQ6Bg1FTkF92xviOk5LkKiwcm0QIeJz1Uz8BkhfHRzSDRlhkPCr7fxRM=&c=NmJXxnUUzcYSwlT_iFBNNWcJwzLuNsRBK2Yo2ltW74fSoNh_fBpgcA==&ch=aH-kaltniA84UWeHG2g0SoopCL9JZNmbGugMcpnUWfdyFe0QnHREdg==)
---
| We can't afford leadership that prioritizes CRIMINALS over the rights, prosperity, and safety of law-abiding Nevadans.
And only proven law enforcement leadership is going to fix this mess - [so that's why I was hoping you would support this important mission now that Election Year 2022 is finally upon us.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aDuP0jBx6p-V_xYJu_RYvScgL-nsfhHi4hzUngpPhBhmCPqxKjmQzcgWDIR7frC2dzmCLAOTKvStqA3E0YIyrvLgA3xovh5lH3JVFw5nQ1u1fxT-cXY7YeYdmlDq5d7HRB1vkZAc_s7SzsaIoOkkGDFGQLIsIBWI8Wx1mjGfj4y84lf_OCwXQ6Bg1FTkF92xviOk5LkKiwcm0QIeJz1Uz8BkhfHRzSDRlhkPCr7fxRM=&c=NmJXxnUUzcYSwlT_iFBNNWcJwzLuNsRBK2Yo2ltW74fSoNh_fBpgcA==&ch=aH-kaltniA84UWeHG2g0SoopCL9JZNmbGugMcpnUWfdyFe0QnHREdg==)

name: Mia McLeod
subject: Gov. McMaster thinks COVID deaths are nothing to panic over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia for South Carolina
body:
If the latest COVID surge isn’t worth “panicking” over, I’m not sure what is... | | | Friend, It may be a new year, but Henry McMaster is up to his same ol’ nonsense. **Despite a surge in COVID-19 cases and hospitalizations across our state, Henry McMaster reiterated that this is nothing to panic over — a claim even his own state health leaders disagree with.** _Seriously, Governor? If this isn’t worth being concerned about, I’m not sure what is..._ McMaster’s “business-as-usual” approach has resulted in the loss of over 14,000 South Carolinians — deaths that could’ve been prevented under the right leadership. We couldn’t have started off the year with a more emphatic reminder that Henry McMaster is unfit to lead us through this pandemic. **[Let’s make 2022 the year for change. Chip in to my campaign for governor to help us kick off the new year on a path to victory so we can send Henry packing this November.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xOVKxhIUbYt3VKvuRN9Ed6LmDxcUTbAsMgtdikhdvrXnTY2MT7kny3_crXfF8_A36KzxvWmp8zJH1hSPhn6i1dmOKY33kpNOjp1JXBC1J3MZWLNi5rb959vjCs629kanwvZ-x_ad_Qbm86sfJBQoBHa6kXHYlhp1ivhyPb2luiDOGiPi38nPuKuIxnTf_prOF3f61jTXrVitwt3-jpDn9t5dLOrtypG-DkNGJWNeFHszf8Z6e8LuzENNIE7mlVb_aaFum-5unkP8vTEXgvhf73XxuqgiSiVV3bu8psxOU2FD5ogLQwbukH94smJqs8ZJ6YrtQqKhDUwU0Q7UGH9bsatsv_frg7dF3zcZGC8HTOchAPjXWRApLs6xggHqybDr-JyO2fGd1H234-uX6vPojtXa7Ryynd3GHefEVpn_PXZkJKAtHXFsqwOXnS2Yc1Aah8CnQ1Q8FRyhAUIJcVJY4F/3il/KLZ4Cq-PSpmZhUpO4sNqqg/h0/2BatxUEPh7rTBmPnlzANjnUhWdo9A6Z9ADYMudl_YOA)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [donate: $10](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xOVKxhIUbYt3VKvuRN9Ed6LmDxcUTbAsMgtdikhdvrXnTY2MT7kny3_crXfF8_A36KzxvWmp8zJH1hSPhn6i1dqCdq_Hc_fHuMEeC6YhNuAZwhHlunr0kNqTHD_ZzSz5ug93XluHAC65WK3_xk_knViYBR9YNJPlYpKF-Vsvoj0LxQd51TNg3HCIL9xt-scXeIJ0jeib3t9s0IEzsLJFUVokP9_vIPO2kOLYxGREZiGsRcEk0vSxhBWBOgu5dh3SCnhk9xJ-30HSZAVKqCxkHr6ZLbj1ixth5DLo-QMFulMPOy06WGgErijLwk_hYxuRASN0Qfx25cKbk3LCiCtEU5CDdYvoCoFxdNK-u5RIy3Kz1h3zdM-hIMyuAB5taj1hc-kxQjSjckBxZYbB3QAtB-zxga4ND5mb0NIhvL5kPNB77UZYvo6ufjXZSlEvoacW3hoCcwBmqy5hOIrV9Qdj_hB0_3cWtL99XeuJODoAXEOg/3il/KLZ4Cq-PSpmZhUpO4sNqqg/h1/B1Ki2zOxSEE1zn5oBtrR_Lg1H_OvDc2_zyfIdNp8bco)

clean_body: If the latest COVID surge isn’t worth “panicking” over, I’m not sure what is... | | | Friend, It may be a new year, but Henry McMaster is up to his same ol’ nonsense. Despite a surge in COVID-19 cases and hospitalizations across our state, Henry McMaster reiterated that this is nothing to panic over — a claim even his own state health leaders disagree with. Seriously, Governor? If this isn’t worth being concerned about, I’m not sure what is... McMaster’s “business-as-usual” approach has resulted in the loss of over 14,000 South Carolinians — deaths that could’ve been prevented under the right leadership. We couldn’t have started off the year with a more emphatic reminder that Henry McMaster is unfit to lead us through this pandemic. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, — Mia Please, disregard if you are a registered lobbyist. | | | Paid for by Mia for South Carolina | | Sent via . People tell me constantly that they only see my social media posts if _they pull up my page manually_. The only time people see our content is when we pay for ads.

**I don’t want** to wallow in the mud with other candidates who are being unethical with their campaigns**. ** **I don’t want** to watch as the current governor sits on the fence to see which direction the wind blows**. ** **I DO want** to defeat the status quo and provide the leadership so desperately needed now. Idaho is headed toward a potential catastrophe. We're stuck in a swamp of corruption, lethargy, and bad leadership. We can’t allow this to happen anymore. My website explains my vision for Idaho. We must follow the Constitution, enact a Taxpayer Bill of Rights, develop & promote jobs, overhaul a failing education system, support a pro-life agenda, enact a moratorium on refugee resettlement in Idaho, ban state agencies from hiring lobbyists, and ensure better management of State lands. I endorse voter ID and call for government BY & FOR the people. We’ve been traveling the state to talk with true Idahoans who share our concerns and opinions. We want to reach more, but have significant expenses to cover travel, promotional literature, and event costs. You can make the difference. Our goal is to have 2,022 people contribute a significant donation to help us win the 2022 election for Idaho. The maximum donation to the campaign is $5,000 but anything and everything helps! The time is now to take a stand with me for the future of Idaho.

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I’m embarrassed to ask.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z25si4uk41ohtio1q74rtb1v18167bmuv94qov10_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4objehhm8t9jesojct1lmgp38pdlmlp71d9mm2r68sjjclhnbdb7chgnedj4e1jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm9cr4c1p3aphh6sqr9ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdgm8o75clhm2p724no)
You’ve already done so much.

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znkp6nbenocgm3sjn9ov2chnp68n0us2opf3qplo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3imaor1cjh2bs)
---

Folks,

I’m a little embarrassed. You know my parents always taught me to be grateful, not ask for too much, and thank those who were nice enough to give me a gift. So, before I get to the bad news, let me just say that your strong support in 2021 made me happier than a penguin in an ice chest.

**Your donations gave me the resources to fight the Left’s agenda, and your kind words gave me the support to keep fighting.** I couldn’t do it without you. That’s why I hate to have to ask for your support so soon again, right after you did everything you could to help me in 2021, but there’s just too much on the line not to ask.

I missed my 2021 fundraising goals, and my Radical Left opponents noticed. They’ve not only taken notice, but they’re taking action. They’ve called in the big guns to pour sickening amounts of money into their campaigns to try and beat me in 2022 and push their Socialist Agenda. This can’t happen.

**I NEED YOUR HELP. I’M HUMBLY ASKING.**
The only way we’re going to save America, Take Back the Senate, and stop the Left’s Liberal Agenda is by standing together. We’ve got to start 2022 off right, and I’m hoping you can help me do just that by rushing what you can below.

| [**RUSH $25**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn4v20mcjc819o0fd087rmgpc66gjpgjbtnfa5mg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3imaor1cjh2bs)
---
[**RUSH $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmev97o4t9mt69l628g5qddo6cgvcf56vd2n2js0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3imaor1cjh2bs)
---
[**RUSH $100**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk3rnduoa6iaiogltdpoda0md3pjs86h3qjfj12o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3imaor1cjh2bs)
---
[**RUSH $250**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuf7ppl4jiaedotvnesoa1veu3gjv2ndo15huiog_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3imaor1cjh2bs)
---
[**RUSH $500**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqje17d9ikjnvvs3vf0a25eiteuhpsrqehc80ur8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3imaor1cjh2bs)
---

I appreciate your understanding, and I hope you’ll help me catch up.

Thank you,

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztr95k9kqukh0bbb91tslm8fu16hc6eareg7b6eo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c3imaor1cjh2bs)

body:
Donate to our 2022 Kickoff Fund
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40550885/324862701/4943049?refcode=em_fr_2022.01.10_b1_lm_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2M5NGRmNC02YTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yWhrxfB9TKJI6JbzvMc3Inn9reeAB8DkwsH5RR33IOU=) Hi Peter,

My team and I are working on starting this election year as strong as possible, so we’re launching a 2022 Kickoff Fund. This fund will help us raise the resources we need to build a team that will win in November. name: Nikki Fried
subject: If DeSantis won’t do it, I will

body:
In 2022, we’re taking bold climate action

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40550801/324862444/-1987745334?refcode=climateaction&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDZmMzI2Yy02YTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pC3v5oHX_vZczPVAXTNztieKL3hh0MxHwE5D21GPByc=) I won't sugarcoat this, Peter: If there’s any state that’s most at risk from the effects of climate change, it’s Florida. Already, Florida families and businesses are feeling the impact of climate change, from increased severe weather to the threat of rising sea levels. Already, Floridians are at risk of losing access to clean drinking water. **And Governor DeSantis isn’t doing a thing to stop it. So, as usual, I’m taking matters into my own hands. ** Here’s what we’re going to do in 2022, Peter:
1. Push for the restriction of dangerous pollutants like polystyrene
2. Hold noncompliant farms accountable for practices that harm our environment
3. Introduce new regulations to protect our drinking water, reduce carbon emissions, and promote energy efficiency
4. Work with members of the Florida Legislature to pass historic legislation to protect our environment and fight climate change
5. **_Defeat Ron DeSantis and put a stop to his anti-environment agenda_**

For the past three years, I’ve fought to protect our environment. I’ve enacted new rules and regulations to reduce emissions, increase energy efficiency, and clean up dangerous pollutants. **I’m ready to take bold action to protect our state from the climate crisis in 2022. I have the experience, the drive, and the compassion to lead our state forward in this fight, but I can’t do it without your help, Peter. ** If we stand together, we can protect our health, our economy, and our environment from the impact of the climate crisis. We can end Ron DeSantis’ dangerous environmental policies that hurt Florida families and businesses.**And we can make 2022 a historic year for climate action.** [**If you’re with me, click here to chip in $10 today and help me make our climate action plan a reality.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40550802/324862445/-1987745334?refcode=climateaction&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDZmMzI2Yy02YTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pC3v5oHX_vZczPVAXTNztieKL3hh0MxHwE5D21GPByc=) **** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately._ | [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40550803/324862446/-1987745334?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=climateaction&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDZmMzI2Yy02YTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pC3v5oHX_vZczPVAXTNztieKL3hh0MxHwE5D21GPByc=) | [$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40550804/324862447/-1987745334?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=climateaction&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDZmMzI2Yy02YTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pC3v5oHX_vZczPVAXTNztieKL3hh0MxHwE5D21GPByc=) | [$20](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40550805/324862448/-1987745334?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=climateaction&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDZmMzI2Yy02YTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pC3v5oHX_vZczPVAXTNztieKL3hh0MxHwE5D21GPByc=)

subject: ICYMI: Political analyst says Doug is a leading contender
body:

Hi friends, **ICYMI:** I wanted to be sure you heard this recent segment of the Forward Maryland podcast. Bill Woodcock, a respected Howard County political analyst and the former president of the Young Democrats of Maryland, [**confirmed that****Doug Gansler is a leading contender for the Democratic gubernatorial nomination,**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yU89dMu3rlDSfoSYdNOvxA9CmgTFvCzeHdT0gyBWRPQGwtbSDCrwS91inVgxzmMdNaE2UdQ_aUiAMNv2KwWFKyfOPWuCtYKKuZSw9a1AAYFMZDyOBUo_MFsQTdqcQzEct_igc9tqm6L7cS6JztwJECasG75EPvG5hMhDmKXmvdFfnSguiyB2yt7nEEbWhEoCGLsvMpHsFyoUPEx95QRjUgsLNChAXJDaTzHS7goI83kXWei4nNNsU-zNy8GO6py7BzqWvtP8NPNpY8HTy0cPYZtJ5KGOzE-2cfYcAsUu68sVAo60n5_mMDJVE0hFBvmUj8a95qlfYGq9FF5n6vakr8VS_Dkyk14hr72UKaXSGaMGSCZAey8yIvEdSR7Jg3I4TUomKIQy2v4N7JNh501vABTsx7I95R6ti2aq8tdml-3w/3il/q8aA2yutSomUuJQc5LNAHg/h1/M8YRiAOr9f4VS4NwlGGqThi_h4vp6abrhx7sq8tclps) noting:
---
|
---
"If Gansler is successful in the Democratic primary, which I believe the primary is going to have to be won on visions, competence, economy, jobs, fairness, and equality... If Gansler can beat who is the Democratic frontrunner and the current number one candidate in my list, he can certainly beat Dan Cox." [...] "One could see Doug Gansler emerge as that party regular candidate to oppose Comptroller Franchot."
---

**Bill Woodcock is right.** Doug has the real experience needed to face the challenges of our time -- crime, COVID recovery, climate change, and choice. Our team is proud that Doug's record and standing in this race are getting recognized by political experts, but there's still a lot of work to do. name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Lowering the cost of prescription drugs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40550912/324862839/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODUxZjIxZi02YjcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HAAwrx8q1yFRc3U0HPR33lTS9D1nhW4e3v6fBYIimZA=&emci=3c6c291b-3572-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=6851f21f-6b72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,
Life-saving drugs like insulin have become outrageously expensive in the last few years. Many families across Arizona have been forced to ration their medication or choose between putting food on the table or filling their prescriptions.
**That is why we need legislation to lower the cost of prescription medications.**
Allowing Medicare to negotiate prescription drug prices with manufacturers and cap out-of-pocket costs for some prescription drugs for Medicare recipients at $2,000 a year would immediately and profoundly help Arizona families.
**Right now, we as taxpayers are footing the bill for overpriced prescriptions because Medicare isn’t allowed to negotiate drug prices.**_That ends up costing working families as much as $25 billion over five years._
In Congress, I will fight like hell to lower prescription drug costs because I firmly believe that healthcare is a right, not a privilege.
No one should have to choose between putting food on the table or paying for life-saving medication.
I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work, but in order to get to Congress, I need your support. clean_body: Friend, Life-saving drugs like insulin have become outrageously expensive in the last few years. Many families across Arizona have been forced to ration their medication or choose between putting food on the table or filling their prescriptions. That is why we need legislation to lower the cost of prescription medications. Allowing Medicare to negotiate prescription drug prices with manufacturers and cap out-of-pocket costs for some prescription drugs for Medicare recipients at $2,000 a year would immediately and profoundly help Arizona families. Right now, we as taxpayers are footing the bill for overpriced prescriptions because Medicare isn’t allowed to negotiate drug prices.That ends up costing working families as much as $25 billion over five years. In Congress, I will fight like hell to lower prescription drug costs because I firmly believe that healthcare is a right, not a privilege. No one should have to choose between putting food on the table or paying for life-saving medication. I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work, but in order to get to Congress, I need your support. = = = Thank you for all that you do to make our campaign a success, Kirsten Paid for by Engel for Arizona Engel for Arizona PO Box 40721 Tucson, AZ 85717 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please.

Friends,

We have an affordable housing problem in Southern California that has gone unfixed for decades. Right now, nearly 1 in 3 residents in CA-46 are severely rent burdened in one of the richest states in one of the richest countries in the world.

For the last several years, we’ve had a representative that has done nothing to ensure affordable housing for the working people of our district. **That has to change. **

Mike Ortega vows to fight for a federal rent control program and expand benefits for low-income housing. [Help us get Mike in office >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40550935/324862891/-1122995658?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220110affhousing_TO_full_SLB_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjgyNWQzYi02YjcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NScxd_DkvaWDDEXtvbsgB3qPlUn5m-HWMuydbTc_KTw=)

No one should have to choose between paying their rent or bills. No one should have to worry about the majority of their income going to rent because rent prices keep rising. [Mike Ortega has a plan to fix that for Southern California families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40550936/324862892/-1122995658?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220110affhousing_TO_full_SLB_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjgyNWQzYi02YjcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NScxd_DkvaWDDEXtvbsgB3qPlUn5m-HWMuydbTc_KTw=)

[The people of District 46 deserve a representative in Congress who will fight for affordable housing and protect renters. Join us in getting Mike to Congress >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40550937/324862893/-1122995658?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220110affhousing_TO_full_SLB_l3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjgyNWQzYi02YjcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NScxd_DkvaWDDEXtvbsgB3qPlUn5m-HWMuydbTc_KTw=)

Team Ortega

| Friend,
Biden was late sending his budget to Congress.
Meanwhile, Nancy Pelosi and her caucus go on a historic spending spree! All put on the American taxpayer's credit card.
Of course, Pelosi and Biden don't care if they spend America into the ground. They think they can use your tax dollars for every single big-government pet project they have.

With your support, I can continue my fight in helping take back the House and putting fiscal responsibility in Congress. You're instrumental in this fight. Proud patriots like you truly make the difference in this battle.

body:
Folks are working even harder to play catch up -- not to mention the endless obstacles we face along the way. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40551121/324863581/-851526706?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjBmYzhkYS02YzcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g9EayvwkJT6ov0u7Poxio8BSE2UySMs8fWmnPP-Utnw=)
Friend,

This should go without saying, but I’m not a career politician.

North Carolina's 14th District is my home and the place I take great pride in being a part of. I’m an educator, a coach and a pastor, and I have invested the future of my family here too.

I’m running for Congress because we have work to do. Folks in Western North Carolina are concerned about paying the bills. Times are hard, and folks are working even harder to play catch up -- not to mention the endless obstacles we face along the way. An ongoing pandemic. Fewer and fewer job opportunities. And if folks do get hired, wages are too low.

Like you, I’m not about making excuses, but I am ready to rewrite broken policies so we can empower families in our communities.

**[If you're ready to make wholesale changes to support working families, make a contribution of $3 today to support our campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40551122/324863582/1573964380?refcode=em-1.10.21-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjBmYzhkYS02YzcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g9EayvwkJT6ov0u7Poxio8BSE2UySMs8fWmnPP-Utnw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40551123/324863583/1573964380?refcode=em-1.10.21-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjBmYzhkYS02YzcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g9EayvwkJT6ov0u7Poxio8BSE2UySMs8fWmnPP-Utnw=)

I don’t answer to the corporate PACs and wealthy elites -- I’m here to serve the people. I'm here to take our shared goals to Washington and help working families take power back in their lives. **That’s why my campaign is centered on the issues -- affordable housing, education access, and creating more pathways to economic prosperity.**

We can win this race, but I'm counting on your help to do it:

**[I know you work hard for every dollar you earn, but today I'm hoping you take a moment to chip in $3 to help me flip North Carolina's 14th District for the people. name: MAGA Mo Monday
subject: With 134 days left until Election Day, here's what's happening on the trail and in my campaign.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | To keep receiving updates from my campaign, please add us to your address book.
---
[](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=O2VuetiQea1aep2z7TECUy6SeOo3fSqjV85jUBNqUYg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=monday_jan_10_2&n=1)
---

| Happy **MAGA Mo Monday** Peter! We're only 134 days until the primary Election Day on May 24th. Make sure you stay up to date with all the latests at [mobrooks.com](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=O2VuetiQea1aep2z7TECUy6SeOo3fSqjV85jUBNqUYg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=monday_jan_10_2&n=2).
### On The Trail
It was a great week on the campaign trail last week with stops in Mobile, Baldwin, Butler, Elmore, and DeKalb Counties. I enjoyed meeting with folks, hearing about the issues that we’re facing as a state, and talking about why we need a proven conservative in the United States Senate. We're traveling to every corner of the state, working hard for your support.
### This Week
This week, I’ll be back in Washington, DC with Congress back in session. Liberal Democrats in Congress are going to use the new year as an excuse to push their far-left agenda before we toss them out of power in November. My fellow Freedom Caucus conservatives and I are not going to let that happen. I'll be standing up to Nancy Pelosi and The Squad each and every day, to stop their socialist agenda. I will also be making in-state stops in Jefferson, Walker, and Monroe counties at the end of the week. Come out and see us!
### In The News
This weekend, I joined Fox News to discuss my bill to end vaccine mandates and my belief, based on both classified and unclassified briefings that I have attended, that COVID-19 is a bioweapon originating in the Wuhan bioweapons lab. You can check out the full interview by clicking the image below! [](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=avQzzHJnGJZEKjm1xE1nNLEz7R-LNwkQj_Pzx9jBuQo54VAU2DgX6N1Ck2fvCgsCVonFNGif0uJXcP1moafO6A&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=monday_jan_10_2&n=3)
### Get Involved
This campaign is powered by you. Conservative grassroots leaders across Alabama are the backbone of this campaign. If you haven't signed up to volunteer, you can do so [here](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=hvw5smsGZmC0zsVkF6hKG4VT3iyu91onNSLG8ZGGFleveBv8QA-CfxJ-FwPOFlxZ&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=monday_jan_10_2&n=4)! If you know someone looking to intern, or if you want to get more involved, email the team at [info@mobrooks.com](mailto:info@mobrooks.com) so we can connect.
### Picture of the Week
Martha and I enjoyed time on the trail with Corky Hawthorne, the Montgomery County Chairman of our campaign, and Cedric Coley, our Montgomery County Co-Chair. Be sure to check out all of our posts from last week and be sure to like us, follow us and most importantly SHARE us on [Facebook](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sJAQfbjrgl12zjz4yECp3EspAYwyHliJnJgvrx2-6Fd&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=monday_jan_10_2&n=5), [Twitter](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvQpzdP2h-MkR1RgQ68Ld6g&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=monday_jan_10_2&n=6), and [Instagram](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73ywFhIE26WWSjD3TNoGUDBzjurmiCr1IGU1y66ajEMFQdM3N4Eq0EkGZlk8wprVldYQ&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=monday_jan_10_2&n=7).
### Endorsement of the Week - New campaign State Co-Chairman Terry Lathan
“Follow the votes- Mo Brooks has a solid conservative voting record that is the gold standard of Alabama principles. Mo has a strong history of voting to preserve our liberties and freedoms while standing in the gap to stop the progressive left as they attempt to destroy our nation. Mo’s actions and focus are textbook Alabama values. His passion and experience is second to none. On day one in the US Senate, Mo will continue to put our families and America First. Our nation needs Mo Brooks now more than ever. His votes prove his loyalty to Alabama.” Have a great week and see you on the trail soon,
Mo P.S. The establishment is terrified of me, because I will never work for special interests, I will only work for you. I'm never going to support cheap foreign labor and I don't support open borders, which is why they're doing all they can to stop our campaign. [Can you chip in $10 today to stand up to the open-borders special interest groups who are funding my opponent? ](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rm-mUEavjjWvnh57s05qGjY8y_a_Ds7Kkn0Mv9gLhQPqQ&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=monday_jan_10_2&n=8)
---

My fellow Freedom Caucus conservatives and I are not going to let that happen. I'll be standing up to Nancy Pelosi and The Squad each and every day, to stop their socialist agenda. I will also be making in-state stops in Jefferson, Walker, and Monroe counties at the end of the week. Come out and see us! In The News This weekend, I joined Fox News to discuss my bill to end vaccine mandates and my belief, based on both classified and unclassified briefings that I have attended, that COVID-19 is a bioweapon originating in the Wuhan bioweapons lab. You can check out the full interview by clicking the image below! Get Involved This campaign is powered by you. Conservative grassroots leaders across Alabama are the backbone of this campaign. If you haven't signed up to volunteer, you can do so ! If you know someone looking to intern, or if you want to get more involved, email the team at mailto:info@mobrooks.com so we can connect. Picture of the Week Martha and I enjoyed time on the trail with Corky Hawthorne, the Montgomery County Chairman of our campaign, and Cedric Coley, our Montgomery County Co-Chair. Be sure to check out all of our posts from last week and be sure to like us, follow us and most importantly SHARE us on , , and . Endorsement of the Week - New campaign State Co-Chairman Terry Lathan “Follow the votes- Mo Brooks has a solid conservative voting record that is the gold standard of Alabama principles. Mo has a strong history of voting to preserve our liberties and freedoms while standing in the gap to stop the progressive left as they attempt to destroy our nation. Mo’s actions and focus are textbook Alabama values. His passion and experience is second to none. On day one in the US Senate, Mo will continue to put our families and America First. Our nation needs Mo Brooks now more than ever. His votes prove his loyalty to Alabama.” Have a great week and see you on the trail soon, Mo P.S. The establishment is terrified of me, because I will never work for special interests, I will only work for you. I'm never going to support cheap foreign labor and I don't support open borders, which is why they're doing all they can to stop our campaign.

There are so many reasons we’re proud to be on Team Shelton:

It’s not just that Alisha is a mental health counselor, who will bring the same compassion and advocacy to Nebraskans as she does to her sessions.

It’s not just that Alisha was raised right here in the district and knows what the folks of NE-02 need because she is one of us.

It’s not just that she is committed to fighting every day for the issues that matter most, like accessible healthcare, abortion access, and voting rights.

**It’s all of these reasons and more that make us excited to elect Alisha this November.**

What’s more, NE-02 is one of just seven districts in the entire country that voted for Joe Biden in the 2020 presidential election but has a Republican representative. That means that going into the crucial midterm elections, we’re in a uniquely flippable seat — and Alisha is the candidate who is going to flip it. Hey folks — Jessica Velasquez here, Chair of the Democratic Party of New Mexico. Martin asked me to reach out as we kick off a critical election year for our state and our country. **Our state party shows up for our communities — and works every day to elect bold Democratic leaders who will show up, too.** That couldn’t be more important at a time when we need to protect Democrats’ majorities in Congress. New Mexico can play a key role in defending the majority by flipping Trump Republican Yvette Herrell’s House seat blue and re-electing the strong Democrats who are fighting for our communities every day. We can secure victories for Democrats across the board, but only if we have the resources to hire organizers and recruit volunteers to reach out to New Mexicans across our state. name: American Update
subject: Americans find this “British Bulldog” captivating
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8313%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=lZpjIJDYXpiiCk5xTgnqyg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11363%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PtXJ%2btcDzuNO3T8lepKqoA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11364%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ltHSXWY7d8kj%2fwq0fJNlvg&sysid=1)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11363%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PtXJ%2btcDzuNO3T8lepKqoA&sysid=1) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift--before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11375%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vvnjH1mS4cWocImGoL%2fZWA&sysid=1)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I'm worried
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |

I'm worried, folks. New Hampshire is shaping up to be the most competitive Senate race of the year. Mitch McConnell and far-right groups have spent more money attacking my campaign than any other Senate Democrat in the country – **over $7 million and counting.** But to make things worse, in 2021, we didn't raise as much money as other vulnerable Democrats, meaning **my campaign is getting hit the hardest, but we have the fewest resources to fight back.** With our slim 50-50 majority, control of the Senate could come down to this seat. **So when I see that we're being outraised and outspent, it makes me worried.** I'm no stranger to tough fights. In 2016, I won my race by only 1,017 votes—that's 0.14 percent. I know that we can hold this seat and protect our vulnerable Senate majority, but it's going to take all of us working together. **[Can I count on you to chip in $5, or whatever you can, to help us get our fundraising back on track and protect this critical Senate seat? clean_body: Delina decided to return to nursing and has been working several days a week at our local hospital. | = | Our local hospital, like so many across the nation, has been struggling with healthcare worker shortages and increasing amounts of patients. Seeing this strain on our community, Delina decided to return to nursing and has been working several days a week at our local hospital. = Delina’s commitment to our community has always been clear to us on the campaign trail, and is even more apparent now as she has taken time to resume nursing while campaigning. When Delina was working as a nurse, she had to care for people while advocating for their needs to make sure they were safe and taken care of — and that's exactly what she plans to do as a member of Congress. name: Mike Gallagher
subject: Wisconsin needs a fighter in Washington.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin
body:
My friend Ron Johnson announced announced that he is seeking re-election to represent the great State of Wisconsin in the U.S. Senate. [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=73acaaa044974407abf1b83ea920f559&_e=VxPA9m8r0DXgH1YwJTwXFSt-nKWRsvYIcKOMr9I6Pg0YTF2eUiMVLU_DLRHDpKm5ROqe38hIN6W0fPbzqHXRFibCnLzJWUOE-TMHGhqDgfIGpkfNyVave1Ch2ZjnYtyu_hJhS0iXCHX5v45qqp2PMlNoFEoyeIco6ZQb8C2zzqQ0DMjfJoEwPUqy_FXdYK81Rd8XG2zjYE1NG4wgmiElwr1fahiAydANbc1eNFdB9ENmCZmgSry6hkqPAKInuYwEzUQmqifg2niGgOlcyP4R_0y4EZy9vBseIw_4k6zxpjcqaQQjDFabxsgDkm18akkhz-B0JbsIQsYr6kIb3fgyp42_xRzHEDbHxp_lqy4j-8QXQFD6jjd1SuZSlCBYtSZa4E8ZbacSnKWNd2-dhWE3trGr4pIiGRNBbrcnbd4JMtxbGquE8wW3Rhq09LqDfPdt) Peter, Ron Johnson just announced that he is seeking re-election to represent us in the U.S. Senate.

This is great news.

Ron believes our country's best solutions are not found or created in Washington, but in the places that matter most: our neighborhoods, businesses, schools, and churches. He knows that America's strength starts from the bottom-up and he's determined to make Washington realize that. Most important of all, Ron will make the case to voters that America is a place for good and one worth forever fighting for. That's the type of fighter Ron Johnson is and it is why I am proud to support him. [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=73acaaa044974407abf1b83ea920f559&_e=VxPA9m8r0DXgH1YwJTwXFSt-nKWRsvYIcKOMr9I6Pg0YTF2eUiMVLU_DLRHDpKm5ROqe38hIN6W0fPbzqHXRFibCnLzJWUOE-TMHGhqDgfIGpkfNyVave1Ch2ZjnYtyu_hJhS0iXCHX5v45qqp2PMlNoFEoyeIco6ZQb8C2zzqQ0DMjfJoEwPUqy_FXdYK81Rd8XG2zjYE1NG4wgmiElwr1fahiAydANbc1eNFdB9EPArRmx0lUxIjwSYA0qrL3gDAINxbArHiBXMGdAoGqXA7SlnawNpGU1vqJwh0FJrP_tgqXOCDS6XvJzUudt-AV_QE5mkTzulbnKjFy3yfc2ee8Ki0gxvFCi8Kg22FL9SGzhvOEq36tmNL_lGZTcsYGYE0KBev53emwqcJzBhq6WaXV3mqU1stl8AZvLTpAXGj8ocbB-_ctM1FbAicCiYTEx) [**HELP RON KICK-START HIS CAMPAIGN**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=73acaaa044974407abf1b83ea920f559&_e=VxPA9m8r0DXgH1YwJTwXFSt-nKWRsvYIcKOMr9I6Pg0YTF2eUiMVLU_DLRHDpKm5ROqe38hIN6W0fPbzqHXRFibCnLzJWUOE-TMHGhqDgfIGpkfNyVave1Ch2ZjnYtyu_hJhS0iXCHX5v45qqp2PMlNoFEoyeIco6ZQb8C2zzqQ0DMjfJoEwPUqy_FXdYK81Rd8XG2zjYE1NG4wgmiElwr1fahiAydANbc1eNFdB9EPEdBGcklL8eD7572yS4xd_8ifNyTCeM-jSKUHve44RJRDw-wmO1-eubs6NsTd2Pq4PpCUIXCuRz0gO25-iZjn8c0L4FXzm1kTcAfa0vO7iZ2JuJeIBxIKTAAVoO7gkHYB88vU5UNP2DqzXc12g_KJ_OhWGo0PKFa4UQ-uSs_xaU-AMGcSDlt31eCDLR5SgYmKPNE6UssO3YjDCl9OqQ5Uh) But that's not what you'll hear from the far-Left candidates and political pundits who have made it their mission to destroy him. Just look at his last two races. They dragged him through the mud, said there was no way he could win, and spent millions to defeat him. But here's the thing: Wisconsinites knew better and showed up for Ron. We need to do that again this year.
In 2022, with so much at stake and with the Senate majority possibly hinging on Wisconsin, we need you to get involved early. I’m asking you to stand with Ron Johnson and help his campaign get off to a fast start. [**SHOW RON YOU'RE WITH HIM**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=73acaaa044974407abf1b83ea920f559&_e=VxPA9m8r0DXgH1YwJTwXFSt-nKWRsvYIcKOMr9I6Pg0YTF2eUiMVLU_DLRHDpKm5ROqe38hIN6W0fPbzqHXRFibCnLzJWUOE-TMHGhqDgfIGpkfNyVave1Ch2ZjnYtyu_hJhS0iXCHX5v45qqp2PMlNoFEoyeIco6ZQb8C2zzqQ0DMjfJoEwPUqy_FXdYK81Rd8XG2zjYE1NG4wgmiElwr1fahiAydANbc1eNFdB9EMRz17nZIwmVkgsHHkAj6ROKSDCacS1Ivt5c1uFfQmGBLI3mmj89Gmb6Anyz0pIhlHDWSbqLxcE1vOlxtQCPxwAssNj-vhqAsWBcxJ9QdGg3BmvHJOU4NJIVjVKCSXjBE21j4BCK96GfuI8s4vxfxKaL8LcPx5D4jRJAFeL_B_FVHTetUTMauD_2JfVo92P5qziBdNg1M5tiYhseK6V07iW) With your help, we will turn Wisconsin red and prove the pundits, media, and far-Left wrong again by electing Ron Johnson in November. Mike Gallagher | |

name: John Fetterman
subject: re: The latest on Dr. Oz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This is not okay.
#
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40735?refcode=ema20220110-4151&t=1&akid=4151%2E434096%2E25qJMp)
Derek,
^^^ Over the weekend, I read this _New York Times_ op-ed about Dr. Oz’s Senate campaign. 🙄
Now I can’t get this point out of my head.
**_Despite what appears to be an earnest desire to help people, “The Dr. Oz Show is not a public health effort. It’s a business.”_**
Derek, Dr. Oz has been trying to sell fake medical advice to the American people for YEARS.
Diet pills, “raspberry ketones,” miracle supplements — even hydroxychloroquine.
In fact, Dr. Oz built his *entire* career on promoting quack treatments + fake cures in the interest of personal financial gain.
And NOW he wants to cash in and buy Pennsylvania’s U.S. Senate seat with million$ of his personal wealth? 🤔🤔
_Yeahhhhh..._ I don’t think so, Derek.
**I don’t know who needs to hear this, but Dr. Oz is not what we need as PA’s next U.S. Senator. We absolutely MUST raise a lot of money online in order to stop him.**
**[Will you make your very first donation of $5 to support John Fetterman for U.S. Senate today? Just $5 has a direct and immediate impact on our ability to compete with self-funding quack candidates like Dr. Oz. We can’t flip Pennsylvania and save our Democratic majority in 2022 without online support from people like you in Cresco. Can I count on your support today?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40735?refcode=ema20220110-4151&t=2&akid=4151%2E434096%2E25qJMp)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40735?refcode=em20220110-4151&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4151%2E434096%2E25qJMp)**
Thanks,
John Fetterman

# Statement on Congressman Perlmutter
---
| (Jan. 10, 2021) U.S. Congressional candidate Erik Aadland today acknowledged the announcement by Representative Ed Perlmutter regarding his retirement from Congress and Colorado's Congressional District 7. Erik, a Republican challenger, thanked Perlmutter for his eight terms of service in Congress. Perlmutter has represented CD7 since 2007. Prior to that he served as a Colorado State Senator from 1995 to 2003.
"Congressman Perlmutter has served this district for almost two decades, putting aside personal ambition to represent CD7," Aadland said. "He also gave of his time to serve our state in the legislature. I thank him for his dedication, and I look forward to discussing and debating new ideas that will represent the people of the district in coming days."
Erik said he looked forward to a vigorous debate with the Democrat challenger who will eventually take Perlmutter's place in the November general election.

clean_body: | | | | == | | | Statement on Congressman Perlmutter | (Jan. 10, 2021) U.S. Congressional candidate Erik Aadland today acknowledged the announcement by Representative Ed Perlmutter regarding his retirement from Congress and Colorado's Congressional District 7. Erik, a Republican challenger, thanked Perlmutter for his eight terms of service in Congress. Perlmutter has represented CD7 since 2007. Prior to that he served as a Colorado State Senator from 1995 to 2003. "Congressman Perlmutter has served this district for almost two decades, putting aside personal ambition to represent CD7," Aadland said. "He also gave of his time to serve our state in the legislature. I thank him for his dedication, and I look forward to discussing and debating new ideas that will represent the people of the district in coming days." Erik said he looked forward to a vigorous debate with the Democrat challenger who will eventually take Perlmutter's place in the November general election. | | | | | | == | | | PO Box 630552 Littleton, co 80163 | == == == | | | | | | | Aadland For Congress | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | | Sent by mailto:info@aadlandforcolorado.com in collaboration with |

| The thought of Pittsburgh being the city that could launch a Trump comeback is sickening to me. Friend, Over the weekend, I learned that Mayor Gainey and County Executive Fitzgerald both supported a proposal to have Pittsburgh host the 2024 Republican National Convention. Frankly, I think that our city playing host to a political institution which harbors and propagates far-right extremism, and anti-democratic sentiment not only misrepresents our values as a community, but it’s irresponsible and dangerous. We shouldn’t be offering up our city to the Republican Party to use as a megaphone and national stage to voice anti-democratic values months before the 2024 election. The thought of Pittsburgh being the city that could launch a Trump comeback is sickening to me, and I’m honestly surprised no one else in this race has said anything about it. **The people of Pittsburgh deserve a representative who isn’t afraid to stick up for Pittsburgh values even when it isn’t politically convenient—and I promise to always be that person.[If you’re with me, then please, make a donation to this campaign right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40551722/324866315/-2042008336?refcode=em_20210110-fr-JD-pittsburghrnc-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTgxYzE0MC03MTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rSBsTTBn8k6eMdn1hUY-JgWS7kfsQk_5fg7d6vFC4hk=)** The truth is, Pennsylvania is a swing state that President Biden narrowly won in 2020. The Democratic Party cannot risk our region’s leadership being viewed as complicit with the Republican Party in promoting the ideas of white nationalism, xenophobia, and autocracy whatsoever. No amount of short-term economic influx is worth our dignity. This is a moment of moral reckoning for our leadership. This is a moment to renounce the allure of big business in the name of democracy. That’s true leadership, and that’s what this district needs. [**So please, make a donation to this campaign today, and I’ll work every day to be the leader that the Pittsburgh region deserves.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40551724/324866317/-2042008336?refcode=em_20210110-fr-JD-pittsburghrnc-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTgxYzE0MC03MTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rSBsTTBn8k6eMdn1hUY-JgWS7kfsQk_5fg7d6vFC4hk=) Thanks, Jerry
**_[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40551726/324866319/-2042008336?refcode=em_20210110-fr-JD-pittsburghrnc-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTgxYzE0MC03MTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rSBsTTBn8k6eMdn1hUY-JgWS7kfsQk_5fg7d6vFC4hk=)_**

Gavin Newsom just announced: The primary for our Special Election will be held on April 5th The countdown is on, Peter. We have less than 3 months to WIN this race! = | = Peter, this is our moment to flip this deep‐red district BLUE! He's running for Congress in California to replace Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who just abandoned the Central Valley. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy. One more thing: MAGA Republicans are desperate to keep this open seat red with Devin Nunes stepping down. We came so close in 2020, even though Nunes outspent our campaign four-to-one. [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Hi Peter,
Time is short, so I’ll keep this quick. I’m looking over the books this evening ahead of our critical January 12 fundraising deadline, and I just wanted to take a moment to thank all of you for your support in these last few days. In this final fundraising push, grassroots supporters from all corners of the state have stepped up to ensure that our campaign finishes out strong ahead of our fundraising blackout period this Wednesday.
We’ve been making incredible progress, but we just have a little more work to do. In these last critical hours, I’m setting a final fundraising goal of $7,500 to ensure that we have the resources we need to win this election. Click here to RUSH a donation. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/financedirector011022?amount=20.22]
If we can reach this goal, our campaign will be in a formidable position as we end this fundraising period. We’re building a people-powered movement to create a people-centered government, and grassroots supporters like you are crucial to our efforts.

Tom

name: Sen. Chris Murphy
subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
John is exactly the kind of person we need in elected office.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40551988/324867901/-1613255896?refcode=BLU-KING-20220110-2-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=72f0476b-7172-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmYwNDc2Yi03MTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KY5yWPEsGpnIgHuHIBuyIbgTgGWZaZcT7QetyFRB67g=)
---
Peter,

My friend John King’s campaign has an official fundraising deadline in just a few days, so I’m reaching out to ask you to consider making a donation to his campaign. But first, I want to share why he deserves your support to be the next governor of Maryland.

I got to know John during his time in the Obama administration, and I quickly saw his passion for creating accountable, effective public institutions that make people’s lives better. **John is exactly the kind of person we need in elected office. He brings an incredibly important perspective as an educator to the decision-making table at a moment when that has never mattered more.**

We just saw in Virginia how much an effective message on education can matter in gubernatorial campaigns, and there’s no one better prepared to win — and lead — on these issues than John. But it’s going to require a lot of grassroots support, and John’s biggest fundraising deadline of this campaign is coming up in just a few days.

[_**Will you make a $10 donation to support John King’s campaign for governor before his official January 12 fundraising deadline? He needs to make important investments in organizing now to make sure Maryland is blue in 2022.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40551989/324867902/-1613255896?refcode=BLU-KING-20220110-2-EM&&&&amount=10&refcode2=72f0476b-7172-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmYwNDc2Yi03MTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KY5yWPEsGpnIgHuHIBuyIbgTgGWZaZcT7QetyFRB67g=)

Long before he was a public school teacher or Education Secretary in the Obama administration, John was a kid who faced incredibly difficult struggles. As a young man, he lost both of his parents, acted out in anger, and got kicked out of school. But he found teachers in his community who believed in him and refused to give up on him.

John says they transformed and saved his life. His story is one that is only possible in America — the kind of story we aspire to tell ourselves about what our country can be. John's story represents the promise of progress, as he's running to lead a state where his great-grandfather was formerly enslaved and to make history as Maryland’s first Black governor.

And this deadline is a chance for his campaign to show that his story and message are really resonating with Marylanders and that he has what it takes to win.

[_**Please consider making a $10 donation to John King’s campaign for governor of Maryland. Every donation sends a powerful message about the grassroots support for John and makes clear that he has what it takes to flip Maryland blue.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40551990/324867903/-1613255896?refcode=BLU-KING-20220110-2-EM&&&&amount=10&refcode2=72f0476b-7172-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmYwNDc2Yi03MTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KY5yWPEsGpnIgHuHIBuyIbgTgGWZaZcT7QetyFRB67g=)

Your support would mean a lot to John and to me today, so thank you in advance for pitching in.

Every best wish,

Chris Murphy
U.S. Senator, Connecticut

name: JoshRileyForCongress.com
subject: Peter, we’d love your thoughts here.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress
body:
At the close of 2021, we shattered fundraising records and proved we have what it takes to build a winning campaign.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40552094/324868827/452725312?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWNmZmJkMC03MTcyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WpyVmxSm2kqr_voPOExReSWv5zHxx6MZgjjmDiQ0ATo=&emci=c4d099b2-6872-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=1ecffbd0-7172-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=4588596)
---
| Peter,

At the close of 2021, we shattered fundraising records and proved we have what it takes to build a winning campaign.

Now, it’s 2022 — the year we make Claudia Tenney a *former* member of Congress. Again! And for good this time!

Your voice is at the center of this campaign, and it always will be.
