| | | Team -- Christie recently reached out to personally invite you to join our Majority Strategy Group, and she asked me to review the first round of feedback we received.

**Unfortunately, we didn't get enough responses from Pennsylvania to share results with our Senior Leadership Team.**

We need to lock in our decisions to defend and expand our Senate majority ASAP -- so we extended the deadline until midnight tonight. But responses received after 11:59 P.M. will not be considered, _so please click this link to accept my invitation now:_

**[www.dscc.org/MajorityStrategyGroup/members/#9716520](https://go.dscc.org/go/4520?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20220110-Diana-StrategyGroupBump-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220110-Diana-StrategyGroupBump-ETG-sl1&akid=2552%2E9716520%2EWZG6Tp)**

_**NOTE: Please do not share this link with anyone, as it may corrupt our data**_

Thanks,

Diana
Research Director, DSCC

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Christie
Date: Sat, Jan 1, 2022
Subject: Your answers impressed me.

---
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/4520?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20220110-Diana-StrategyGroupBump-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220110-Diana-StrategyGroupBump-ETG-sl1&akid=2552%2E9716520%2EWZG6Tp)
Hi team -- I want you to know that I reviewed this community's past survey responses and was extremely impressed.

**That's why, after careful consideration and multiple conversations with our Senior Leadership Team, I'm inviting you to join the DSCC's exclusive Majority Strategy Group.**

The handful of folks in this group provide critical input to our Senior Leadership Team and are helping us finalize the Democratic Party's official strategy to defend and expand our Senate majority.

We were _only_ able to flip the Senate because of the strategic decisions you helped us make leading up to the 2020 elections. And I'm 100% confident your input will help us win again.

**So please, click this link to accept my personal invitation right away:**
**[www.dscc.org/MajorityStrategyGroup/members/#9716520](https://go.dscc.org/go/4520?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20220110-Diana-StrategyGroupBump-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220110-Diana-StrategyGroupBump-ETG-sl1&akid=2552%2E9716520%2EWZG6Tp)**

_*To maintain the integrity of our data, we ask that you please do not share your link with non-members._

I'm excited to have you on the team!

Christie
DSCC Executive Director

Peter,
---
Failed President Biden has done all he can to abandon our soldiers when they need a leader who gives them the resources to succeed, both abroad and at home.

Where Biden abandoned our soldiers and their sacrifice with his disastrous Afghanistan withdrawal, President Trump did an incredible job addressing the issues of the VA on a national scale.

**However after nearly one year of Biden in office, our Georgia VA is in need of some serious improvement.**

With the radical Democrat agenda allowing shortages and economic downturn to persist, our veterans and our veteran families are suffering from ridiculous waiting periods and a lack of accountability when it comes to healthcare and other services.

_The nightmare scenarios of having to wait months to get a pair of eyeglasses or making 170-mile drive round-trips need to go._ **End of story.**

**As your next Congressman, I will make it an absolute priority that the Georgia VA gets cleaned up immediately.
**
Donate any amount to my campaign to **show that you support helping our veterans** receive the care and benefits they deserve for the sacrifices they’ve made to defend our nation.
---

clean_body: | | | | Peter, Failed President Biden has done all he can to abandon our soldiers when they need a leader who gives them the resources to succeed, both abroad and at home. Where Biden abandoned our soldiers and their sacrifice with his disastrous Afghanistan withdrawal, President Trump did an incredible job addressing the issues of the VA on a national scale. However after nearly one year of Biden in office, our Georgia VA is in need of some serious improvement. With the radical Democrat agenda allowing shortages and economic downturn to persist, our veterans and our veteran families are suffering from ridiculous waiting periods and a lack of accountability when it comes to healthcare and other services. The nightmare scenarios of having to wait months to get a pair of eyeglasses or making 170-mile drive round-trips need to go. End of story. As your next Congressman, I will make it an absolute priority that the Georgia VA gets cleaned up immediately. Donate any amount to my campaign to show that you support helping our veterans receive the care and benefits they deserve for the sacrifices they’ve made to defend our nation. | | | | | | Every dollar received gives us the resources needed to hit the ground running on Day One and immediately work toward cleaning up our VA offices. In Liberty, Marc McMain Congressional Candidate for GA-10 | | | [Paid for by Marc McMain for Congress, Inc.]() Our mailing address: Marc McMain for Congress, Inc. P.O. Box 191 Loganville, GA 30052

name: CharlesBooker.org
subject: They're using every fear tactic in the book to try to take us down.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Last month — while our team focused on getting emergency relief to the
people of Kentucky and helping to rebuild in the aftermath of last month’s
devastating tornadoes — a new Super PAC, backed by Philadelphia-based
Hedge Fund Manager Jeff Yass, launched an assault on our campaign.

They’re using every fear tactic in the book to try to take us down. Here’s
just a glimpse of the lunacy we’re up against:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220110?refcode=em20220110-1435https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220110?refcode=em20220110-1435&t=1001&refcode2=1435_346206_CWVuEN&akid=1435%2E346206%2ECWVuEN ][IMG]

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220110?refcode=em20220110-1435&t=1021&refcode2=1435_346206_CWVuEN&akid=1435%2E346206%2ECWVuEN ]While Rand focuses on him, Charles is going to keep doing the work of
the people — right now in Kentucky, and in the U.S. Senate. But we need
your support to get there. Will you please chip in $5 or
whatever you can afford to our campaign?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220110?refcode=em20220110-1435&t=1022&refcode2=1435_346206_CWVuEN&akid=1435%2E346206%2ECWVuEN ]Contribute $5

It's time to elect someone who's the complete opposite of the disastrous
leadership that Kentucky’s had for ages,
Peter.

Someone who knows what it's like to not have enough money to eat.

Someone who looks at his community and asks, "How can I help?"

Someone who isn't afraid to fight for the right thing — even when it isn't
politically convenient.

Kentucky deserves better leadership than what we’ve been getting for
generations. We believe that electing someone better — creating this
change — is possible.

But change starts by building relationships with Kentuckians who’ve been
left behind, and doing it early. To do it right, we need the resources to
reach all across Kentucky — and we need to be ready to respond to any and
all attacks from Rand’s Super PAC.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220110?refcode=em20220110-1435&t=1023&refcode2=1435_346206_CWVuEN&akid=1435%2E346206%2ECWVuEN ]So, Peter,
can you please chip in $5 or anything you can to our
campaign right now? It costs $0.05 to reach a voter in Kentucky so every
dollar you can give makes a big difference.

Let’s win this,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220110-1435-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1435_346206_CWVuEN&akid=1435%2E346206%2ECWVuEN

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1435%2E346206%2ECWVuEN

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Red Lodge HQ
subject: He abandoned us when we needed him
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACK BALLARD FOR MONTANA
body:
One in every five Montana residents is a registered hunter. So, hunting issues are Montana issues. But Matt Rosendale doesn’t seem to think so. In fac | | | [](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=49096b756e584ecea776b24e73f6ad70&_e=y_bLT5l9uaWlgM791yRHhAKrZBhGe_i0wWIkjkalhB9eoiAIGvLZeyJgKtskSae_xHkjLf7p3D1OeggEzwnArEm1APA8nkXiPaXv7M1mGirrvLJGeIvF-uX6gHG5b4PikSbquCfHTu_dgENSmw6lMyPSfsIF5MBteTXyfvCEvzYVRmTKV7yjiXu0HARhPgMSIta7rT1RdWEbIJD8Z9XK5dtFLcd0ZRVQrrBQHkZzYxGwWbBpK9h44_LMLM0tfnp3wsX37HgxERHvyDU6cqhpoJGxp3q0kEFuDjhKTiCGesanq6Iff9kII_UUDpjckjaoDk78toCqpCLVKVt1cPDvIr4cMgMO9ObhuPsOLaw_akvyuN_GQK2AwZ3_yvueAF7bfhCp5pi_c0v36BMKJE3_rWkx4hgQg8Eu-zBlNMJ57qUKfolDw4mWyTucmUYrU3J3nym91paFkkj-hfMNVXsUY6pHqtvEFV71inb1DVAnWv5QdxKwm1YyNcefi3ZhxIs1) Peter, One in every five Montana residents is a registered hunter. So, hunting issues are Montana issues. But Matt Rosendale doesn’t seem to think so. **In fact, he couldn’t even bother to show up for a bipartisan Congressional vote that directly affects the health and safety of the hunters in his state.** CWD is a fatal neurological condition that’s spreading rapidly in our country’s deer, elk, and moose. Meats must be tested for CWD before they can be consumed to ensure they’re safe. Last month, Congressional Democrats and Republicans cosponsored The Chronic Wasting Disease Research and Management Act which passed on an overwhelming 393-33 vote. Matt Rosendale did not show up for a vote that arguably affects his constituents more than any other state’s population. **His people needed him and he failed to even show up.** Jack Ballard is one of the many hunters directly affected by the CWD Research and Management Act. You can ALWAYS count on him to show up for votes that affect our community. **[Will you chip in $5 to help us elect him in With Texas gaining its brand-new 38th congressional district, Wesley is running in 1 of just 5 must-win congressional districts that will decide the fate of the House majority – and thus, the fate of Pelosi’s retirement plans. But because Pelosi knows Wesley can END her reign over the House, she’s made him her #1 TARGET as we officially begin the election year. With Pelosi’s DCCC already sitting on a war chest of more than $131 MILLION this year, Wesley will need the support of every last grassroots conservative to fend off their attacks. That’s why I promised Wesley I would leave no stone unturned... I told him that I would reach out to every America First patriot across the country to ensure he has the resources to FIGHT BACK against Pelosi. clean_body: Our sheriffs know I’m the candidate for safety and security. | Friend, When we saw Kenosha burn while radical liberal Tony Evers failed to lead, it was evident that a return to law and order MUST come in 2022. That’s why I’m truly honored by the overwhelming majority of Wisconsin sheriffs who have endorsed our campaign for governor to fire Evers. Like you, Wisconsin’s law enforcement community knows that the Democrats’ failed liberal policies have led to soaring crime rates – but enough is enough. Together, we will take back Wisconsin from the radical Left and restore law and order to our great state. 2021 marked the highest number on record of fatalities among police officers in America... It truly breaks my heart to see law enforcement suffer as a result of leftist politicians abandoning them when they need support the most. Here in Wisconsin, our police officers know I will ALWAYS have their backs – and it’s why I’ve earned the endorsements of so many of our sheriffs. 2022 will be the year we take back Wisconsin and hold Tony Evers accountable for his FAILURE to keep our citizens safe, but we can’t get the job done without your help. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Tim Ryan
subject: I’m asking for $5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1992%2E3611125%2EeJKCCa ][IMG]

Folks—[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6435?t=1007&akid=1992%2E3611125%2EeJKCCa ] I’m about to ask you to chip in $5 toward my
grassroots campaign. But first, I want to tell you why I’m confident we
can prove the skeptics wrong and win this battleground race.

1. Republican Senator Rob Portman is retiring, leaving Ohio’s Senate seat
wide open. Republicans are fighting it out in a messy and expensive
primary—giving us a stronger chance of flipping this seat blue.
2. Ohio already has a Democratic Senator. Sherrod Brown has proven that
Ohioans want to elect a Senator who puts workers first.
3. A recent poll has me within single digits of my Republican opponents.
It’s still early in the race, and the more we get our message out, the
more voters we’ll win over.
4. Working people are fed up and ready for change. I’ve been traveling
all over the state, and Ohioans are sick of handouts for big
corporations and billionaires—they want good-paying jobs, health care
they can afford, and a fair shot for their kids to succeed.
5. We have grassroots momentum. While my rich Republican opponents are
propping up their campaigns with millions of their own dollars, we’re
powered by folks who chip in $5, $25, or $100 at a time.

So, yes, we have a real path to winning this race—but it will
take everything we have to pull it off.

Here’s my ask: [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6435?t=1008&akid=1992%2E3611125%2EeJKCCa ]Will you chip in $5 or more to help us keep up our
grassroots energy and hit our fundraising goals?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6435?t=1009&akid=1992%2E3611125%2EeJKCCa ]Chip in $5

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6436?t=1010&akid=1992%2E3611125%2EeJKCCa ]Other Amount

Together, I know we can get this done.

—Tim

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=1992%2E3611125%2EeJKCCa ][IMG]

touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=1992%2E3611125%2EeJKCCa ]click here.

body:

Fellow American - tonight is the NIGHT!

The University of Georgia is playing in the College Football Playoff National Championship tonight!

name: Team Fetterman
subject: Are you sick of the filibuster, Derek?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
It’s not looking good.
#
Derek,
There’s a big Senate vote coming up on filibuster reform this month — but honestly, it’s not looking good.
That’s because some Democrats like Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema are refusing to vote against the filibuster — instead choosing to block crucial voting rights legislation and blow up President Biden's bold agenda for working families across our Commonwealth.
**Look, Derek: Democrats should vote like Democrats, otherwise we'll just keep voting under the terms + conditions that Republicans set for us.**
**If we elect John to flip PA’s Senate seat, we will *never* have to wonder whether he will vote alongside fellow Dems, or let you down in the big moments.** But it means we need your support more than ever if we're going to win this race.
**[Will you rush a donation of any amount you can to our campaign today? It'd mean the world to our campaign team who are hard at work building the grassroots organizing power we'll need to flip this seat and defend our razor-thin Democratic majority in the U.S. Senate.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40743?refcode=ema20220110-4153&t=1&akid=4153%2E434096%2EE6i85z)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40743?refcode=em20220110-4153&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4153%2E434096%2EE6i85z)**
Right now, Democrats have the Oval Office, the House, and the Senate.
So it's deeply frustrating that we keep stalling on delivering key priorities to the working people who got us here.
John would gladly trade his career to cast that crucial 51st vote to transform our country with bold, common-sense legislation just like today's Freedom to Vote Act.
**And we can elect him.** But it’s going to take all of us coming together to stay on track and help John flip this Senate seat.
**[If you're with us in this fight, we’re coming to you today to respectfully ask: Will you kick in your first $5 right now to our campaign? John, Gisele, and our entire campaign team here at HQ would be so grateful.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40743?refcode=ema20220110-4153&t=21&akid=4153%2E434096%2EE6i85z)**
Thank you for fighting alongside us,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220110-4153-footer&t=22&refcode2=4153_434096_E6i85z&akid=4153%2E434096%2EE6i85z)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=4153%2E434096%2EE6i85z)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=4153%2E434096%2EE6i85z)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Official AOC Campaign
subject: Will you join our call to eliminate the filibuster?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
The Senate will vote on filibuster rule changes on or before January 17.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220110-2730-header&t=1&akid=2730%2E2526796%2EsI-QuJ)
There’s been a lot of talk about reforming or eliminating the filibuster in order to pass voting rights legislation.
To catch you up, we put together this email explaining everything you need to know about the filibuster, its origins, and why it must be eliminated:
**First, what is the filibuster?**
The filibuster is a Senate rule that requires 60 votes (a super majority) for ‘most’ legislation to get a vote in the Senate.
We say ‘most’ because numerous exceptions to the filibuster already exist. Since 1969, 161 exceptions to the filibuster’s supermajority requirement have been created. Now civil rights advocates are asking for another exception to be created so critical voting rights legislation can pass the Senate.
**What is the history of the filibuster?**
The filibuster is not by design, it was actually a mistake. Like the House, the Senate used to only require a simple majority — or 51 votes. Then, in 1805, the Senate was doing a clean-up of its rule book and took out the simple majority rule because they thought it was redundant — effectively it went without saying, how else would a democratic body operate?
It took decades for obstructionists to realize the unintentional gift they’d been given and start exploiting it, often to the detriment of civil rights. The longest continuous filibuster debate in Senate history was about passing the 1964 Civil Rights Act1 to end racial discrimination in public accomodations. During the Reconstruction and post-Reconstruction eras, senators used the filibuster to block other major civil rights legislation, including measures to prohibit lynching and end poll taxes.2
**What happens if we don’t reform the filibuster?**
We’re facing another era of anti-democratic reforms. The last presidential election had the highest turnout in U.S. history, and Republican elected officials responded with a wave of new voting restrictions — 19 states passed 33 laws restricting voting laws in 2021 alone, including restrictions aimed at making voting more difficult. In Georgia, you can now be charged with a crime for handing out water or snacks to voters waiting in line at the polls, and in Texas election officials could face criminal prosecution if they encourage voters to request mail ballots or regulate poll watchers’ conduct.3
There is a bill in the Senate that could address some of these restrictions — the _For the People Act (H.R. 1)_. But the filibuster is standing in the way of progress that people are demanding.
[Please add your name now if you agree that we must end or reform the filibuster in order to protect our democracy. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/sign/filibuster-sign-on/?source=em20220110-2730-P_ENG_EXP_LEG&t=2&akid=2730%2E2526796%2EsI-QuJ)
**[Add your name](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/sign/filibuster-sign-on/?source=em20220110-2730-P_ENG_EXP_LEG&t=3&akid=2730%2E2526796%2EsI-QuJ)**
We’ll keep you posted on the rule changes and how you can help.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

* * *
1 - [Senate.gov](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10366?t=4&akid=2730%2E2526796%2EsI-QuJ)
2 - [Facing South](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10367?t=5&akid=2730%2E2526796%2EsI-QuJ)
3 - [Brennan Center](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10365?t=6&akid=2730%2E2526796%2EsI-QuJ)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20220110-2730-P_ENG_EXP_LEG&t=7&refcode2=2730_2526796_sI-QuJ&akid=2730%2E2526796%2EsI-QuJ)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220110-2730-P_ENG_EXP_LEG&t=8&akid=2730%2E2526796%2EsI-QuJ)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=9&akid=2730%2E2526796%2EsI-QuJ) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=10&akid=2730%2E2526796%2EsI-QuJ) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=11&akid=2730%2E2526796%2EsI-QuJ)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: What matters to you most right now?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We want to be clear on our supporters' top priorities as we kick off this new year.
#
Peter, we're already ten days into 2022! 😲
Things are moving fast in D.C. as the Senate eyes a vote to change the filibuster and pass a critical voting rights bill. And Pramila hasn't stopped fighting for the passage of the Build Back Better Act, a wealth tax, canceling student debt, and so much more.
We want to be clear about our supporters' top priorities as we kick off this new year. **That's why we're sending this survey to members of Team Pramila like you****, Peter — because you're a key part of our movement for progressive change.**
[**Will you start our January 2022 Priorities Survey now? We're counting on your input to help guide our strategy for the big year ahead.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/january-2022-priorities-survey/?source=em20220110-{&t=1{mailing_id}&akid=947%2E420207%2EJRQbSt)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Free the J6 political prisoners!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Follow the Constitution! |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=cbcf020e4c&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

As someone who took an oath to the Constitution, I'm furious.

There are a number of American citizens, imprisoned in appalling conditions, for a year- WITHOUT EVER BEING CHARGED WITH A CRIME.

They are political prisoners and this is unconstitutional!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to reclaim Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=10a012bde3&e=afa21b7626), a swing district in the Orlando area. This is a targeted district by the NRCC and we can take this district!**

Breitbart reports:

_Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus Andy Biggs (R-AZ) and 20 Republican representatives on Tuesday demanded a congressional hearing over the reported mistreatment of January 6 political prisoners being held by the D.C. Department of Corrections, Breitbart News has exclusively learned.

In a letter addressed to House Judiciary Committee Chairman Jerry Nadler (D-NY) and House Oversight and Reform Committee Chairwoman Carolyn Maloney (D-NY), Biggs insisted their committees must conduct hearings on the political prisoners’ alleged mistreatment amid reports of civil rights violations:

The defendants are being held in solitary confinement for extended periods of time and there are numerous credible reports that they are being denied access to legal counsel and face retaliation for meeting with legal counsel.

They are being denied medical care, including one defendant who was denied treatment for non-Hodgkin’s. This is a disgusting abuse of power and a clear violation of their civil rights.

The letter also says the treatment of the political prisoners has “been so egregious” that Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-MA), the ACLU, and U.S. District Judge Royce C. Lamberth have spoken against it. _
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=f9b90ec04f&e=afa21b7626)
---
| That's right.... the treatment of the J6 political prisoners has been SO bad, even Elizabeth Warren and the ACLU have spoken out against it.

Let's see what the Constitution has to say about this:

The 6th Amendment to the Constitution says that:

_In all criminal prosecutions, the accused shall enjoy the right to a speedy and public trial, by an impartial jury of the State and district wherein the crime shall have been committed, which district shall have been previously ascertained by law, and to be informed of the nature and cause of the accusation; to be confronted with the witnesses against him; to have compulsory process for obtaining witnesses in his favor, and to have the Assistance of Counsel for his defence._

_Further, the Speedy Trial Act of 1974 establishes time limits for completing the various stages of a federal criminal prosecution. The Act establishes time limits for completing the various stages of federal criminal prosecution. The information or indictment must be filed within 30 days from the date of arrest or service of the summons. Trial must commence within 70 days from the date the information or indictment was filed, or from the date the defendant appears before an officer of the court in which the charge is pending, whichever is later._

Many of the J6 prisoners have been held over a year without a trial and without even being charged. Clear violation!

_Moreover, NOT A SINGLE J6 PRISONER HAS BEEN CHARGED WITH TREASON OR INSURRECTION. NOT ONE!_

**Nearly all have been charged with trespassing. Now, that's a serious charge, but does it justify holding in inhumane conditions indefinitely? I'd say that's unconstitutional!**

| **Look, here's what this all comes down to: the ruling class in DC thinks there are one set of rules for them, and another for you.

_They will abuse and politicize the J6 prisoners because they think they are better than the rest of us. BLM rioters could burn whole cities and kill innocent people, but trespassers have their constitutional rights suspended?_**

What a crock!

The only way to stop this travesty is to disband the J6 Commission and start an investigation into the abuses of the political prisoners.

I will do it because I have courage!

[I got more votes here in 2020 than any Republican ever had, because I stood up and fought for our freedoms!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=603aef4507&e=afa21b7626) Will you help me fight the Communists and fight for the Constitution?
